Title: Certification Tracking App for Contacts
Description:
Summary
A Certification Tracking App that allows businesses to log, track, and verify certifications tied to individual contacts (customers, employees, or students). This feature is useful for industries that require ongoing certification, such as firearms training, security, healthcare, and professional education.

Use Case: Firearms Training (Example)
A firearms training facility needs to track student certifications, expiration dates, and course completion.
Customers must provide proof of certification before purchasing certain items or booking advanced courses.
The business must ensure compliance with regulations by maintaining a certification history per contact.
Core Features

1. Certification Management
Ability to log certifications for a contact, including:

Certification name
Issuing organization
Certification date
Expiration date (if applicable)
Certification level (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced)
Upload attachments (e.g., digital copies of certificates)
Ability to assign multiple certifications per contact.

Ability to set renewal reminders for expiring certifications.

2. Verification & Compliance
Option to verify certifications via QR code, link, or API integration with certification bodies.
Automatic flagging of expired certifications in contact records.
Customizable compliance rules (e.g., deny service if certification is expired).

3. Integration with Contact Records
Certifications are tied to each contact’s profile in the CRM.
View certification history directly within a contact’s record.
Filter contacts by certification type/status (e.g., 'Show contacts with expired certifications').

4. Course & Training Management (Optional Expansion)
Ability to schedule training sessions and register contacts.
Track instructors, course materials, and attendance.
Auto-generate certifications upon course completion.

Business Impact
✅ Increases Compliance – Ensures businesses only provide services to properly certified individuals.
✅ Saves Time – Automates certification tracking, eliminating the need for manual record-keeping.
✅ Improves Customer Experience – Customers can easily provide proof of certification and receive renewal reminders.
✅ Enhances Revenue – Businesses can proactively reach out to customers when certifications are due for renewal, driving repeat training sign-ups.
Solution:
Customizing an app of this magnitude is certainly possible. 
That said there are auxiliary flows, we should consider like expiration, renewals, membership fees if applicable.

All of these additional workflows will expand the scope of the project.

Title: Estimate Reporting Improvement - Report on Estimates Converted to Ready to Invoice, Track changes in status
Description:
Summary:
Customers need a report that tracks when an estimate is converted to 'Ready to Invoice' within a specific time period. This would help sales teams and finance teams monitor and streamline the invoicing process.

Business Use Case:
Sales reps modify estimates and mark them as 'Ready to Invoice.' When this happens, an email notification is sent to finance. However, customers currently lack a way to generate a report that shows when these status changes occurred, making it difficult to track sales performance, forecast revenue, and ensure timely invoicing.

Current Workarounds:

Teammates have suggested using the Estimate and Invoice Reports, but these do not explicitly track when an estimate is converted to 'Ready to Invoice.'
Checking logs in the Method account for status changes is possible but not user-friendly.
Manual tracking or custom workflows may be needed, which adds administrative burden.
Requested Feature:

A prebuilt report that shows all estimates converted to 'Ready to Invoice' within a user-specified date range.
The report should include:
Estimate number
Customer name
Sales rep
Date the estimate was converted
Status change details (who made the change)
Linked invoice, if applicable
Optional Enhancements:

Ability to filter by sales rep, customer, or other relevant criteria.
A dashboard widget showing recent conversions.
An automated alert when an estimate is converted, similar to the email currently sent to finance.
Impact:
This feature would provide better visibility into the sales pipeline, improve communication between sales and finance, and reduce the risk of missing invoices.
Solution:
Tracking the date an estimate's status changes to 'Ready to Invoice' is straightforward. This can be implemented by logging status changes and capturing timestamps for reporting purposes.

To enhance this functionality, we can customize the report to include the following additional timestamps:

Estimate Created Date – When the estimate was first generated.
Estimate Sent Date – When the estimate was emailed or shared with the customer.
Estimate Approved Date – When the customer approved the estimate.
Status Change to Ready to Invoice – The exact timestamp when the status was updated.

This report could be generated as a standalone Estimates Conversion Report or incorporated into existing Estimate and Invoice reports. Additionally, filters could be added to sort by sales rep, customer, or specific time periods for better tracking and forecasting.

Title: Grid Improvement – Auto-Expand Full Descriptions Without ‘Show More’
Description:
Summary:
Customers want the ability to view full item descriptions in grids without needing to manually click ‘Show More.’ This applies to transaction screens and the customer portal, particularly when reviewing estimates.

Problem Statement:
Currently, long text fields (such as item descriptions) in grids are truncated, requiring users to click ‘Show More’ to expand them. This extra step is inconvenient, especially when reviewing multiple line items at once. Customers would like the descriptions to automatically expand so that full details are visible at a glance without additional interaction.

Proposed Solution:
Enhance grid functionality to allow auto-expanding descriptions in relevant fields. Possible approaches:

Auto-Expand Based on Content Length – Rows dynamically adjust height to fit full text instead of truncating.
Configurable Setting – Add an option in grid settings to enable or disable full description expansion per screen.
Hover-Based Preview – If full auto-expansion isn’t feasible, enable tooltips that show the entire text when hovering over the field.
Key Functional Requirements:

Apply to transaction screens (e.g., estimates, invoices) and customer portal.
Ensure descriptions remain fully visible without disrupting the layout.
Maintain readability and usability even when viewing multiple rows.
Allow users to toggle between expanded and collapsed views if needed.
Benefits:

Improves user experience by removing unnecessary clicks.
Enhances efficiency when reviewing transactions.
Provides better visibility of important details without manual interaction.

Title: Grid Improvement - 'AND' 'BETWEEN' operator to be included in advanced search
Description:
Currently, the advanced search in the grid only has an “OR” operator between the selections. This doesn’t work when trying to select a date range. 
Customer use case is that they want to filter certain records after and before specific date.
Solution:
This functionality is not available in regular grids.  However, it is available via editable grids. 

At the time of writing this; editable grids, still do not support some features such as custom grid views.

In theory, if custom grid views are not required for this workflow. The grid can be updated with customization to support between.

Title: Web to Lead Improvement - Transparent / Fields / HTML Embed
Description:
Customer was interested in using our Web to Lead form for their website. 

Their website has a current form that is fully built in and themed like their site, see attached.

Can we customize a way for our form to be 1) transparent 2) automatically color coordinate with the website 3)provide the ability to alter the background.
Solution:
At this time this cannot be customized within the platform. 

In theory they could use another form integration (Jot Form / Gravity Form) then use Zapier to do a lead pass into the CRM. 

We should certainly be able to support a simple HTML embed.

Title: Service Improvement Request – Human-Supported API Assistance (for Method)
Description:
Category: Customer Support / Developer Experience

Request Type: Service Offering Expansion

Background:
Currently, our API support is limited to community-driven forums. While this allows some scalability, it has proven frustrating for users who require more direct, reliable, or timely assistance when implementing or troubleshooting their API integration. Several users have voiced concerns about lack of responsiveness, unclear guidance, or no ownership of complex issues in the forums.

Request:
Introduce a tiered or limited-scope human-supported API assistance model. This could include one or more of the following:

Dedicated API support during onboarding or implementation phases.

Scheduled office hours or ticket-based access for API-related questions.

A paid support tier (or inclusion within existing paid plans) that grants access to a technical support agent familiar with API use cases.

Escalation paths from forums when issues remain unresolved after a defined time.

Expected Benefits:

Improved developer experience and faster implementation.

Reduced drop-off or friction during integration-heavy sales cycles.

Enhanced perception of Method as a developer-friendly platform.

Stronger retention for customers building more deeply integrated workflows.

Priority: Medium-to-High (based on feedback volume and impact on implementation timelines)
Solution:
At this time, support for API is available via Forums and in some cases email. 

This is something we should explore.

Title: Credit Memo Improvement - Invoice Improvement - Create a Credit Memo Directly from an Invoice
Description:
Summary:
Enable users to generate a credit memo directly from an existing invoice within Method:CRM, mirroring or partially crediting the original line items and amounts.

Use Case:
When a customer needs a refund, partial return, or adjustment to a previously issued invoice, users currently need to manually create a new credit memo and re-enter the relevant information. This feature would streamline that process by letting users create a credit memo from within the invoice view.

Expected Behavior:

From an invoice screen, users can click 'Create Credit Memo.'

A new credit memo is pre-filled with items, quantities, and prices from the original invoice (users can adjust before saving).

The credit memo links back to the original invoice for traceability.

Syncs cleanly to QuickBooks to reflect proper accounting adjustments.

Benefits:

Saves time by reducing manual data entry.

Improves accuracy by referencing the original invoice directly.

Aligns with common accounting workflows used in QuickBooks.
Solution:
This should be a pretty simple customization. 

We can determine which line / # of items need to be credited and create that credit memo. 
This is useful if we're just adding credit to the customer account.

That said, if a refund is required - it's important we consider doing a partial refund as well.
See the refund +1.

Title: Donor Pages - In Kind Donations / Physical Good
Description: Currently our Donor Page is set to collect money donation via checks/credit card. For many nonprofit, they also receive donations of furniture, foods, and stocks. How long would it take to set this up so this 'Donation' just comes into Method as a SalesReceipt?
Solution:
All Donations are technically Sales Receipts. However, when hardgoods such as furniture is donated, how do they currently keep track of this in QuickBooks? Is it added into their inventory as an item? Is it a Company Asset? Is it something that is even tracked in QuickBooks? The bookkeeper will know.

One potential solutions would be to add donated hardgoods as items in QuickBooks which can be generalized, i.e. Furniture, Clothing, Bedding, Toiletries, etc. We can then customize the Donate Now Page and/or the New/Edit Donation screen to add this as an option to select as a donation option. It may be a good idea to discuss how they use Classes in QuickBooks and how hardgoods will play a role.

Rough Estimate Right now is 3-4 hours.

Title: Global Search - Hide Records from Users (Employee Records)
Description:
Customer would like to restrict employee data from syncing over which is impossible.
In addition to removing searchability for employee data in the contact app, 
Is it possible to customize the main search tool to remove employees from showing up during searches?
Solution:
Peer to Peer user permissions are the best way to handle this problem.

Using Peer to Peer permissions, you're able to control what access each user has in particular to customer records and employee records.

Make sure that Unassigned / Missing Assignments are not selected and that Share All Records is turned off for all users.

Title: Ability to Track time per Line Item Instead of the whole Work Order.
Description:
In the Fields Crew App, the Customer is looking to calculate time spent on each service item rather than the entire Job and adds two additional columns to the Item's grid: Part Number and Notes.

This is important because some units / equipment takes longer to service than others.
We would like to know how much time we're spending per unit, even through it's one work order.
Solution:
There are 2 solutions here: 

1. If they don't mind the time for each service item not being synced to QB / having time entries for each than we can simply have a start and end time on the Work Order line item level without needing to create individual time tracking entries for each (2-5 hours)

2. If they do want to see actual time entries for every service item, it becomes a bit more of a cumbersome customization as we'll need to move the start and stop logic to the line item, create a new time entry for each and update the screen to no longer use the on screen start and stop (10-20 hours)

Title: Calculation - Calculating Area / Perimeter / Sqft / Square footage
Description:
Example: is in the glass making business and need a simple square footage calculator in Method, just side x length.

They would like a simple interface in the estimate screen to calculate a quantity in Sq ft via a simple math calcuation.
Solution:
We would just need 2 new fields, Length and Width in the EstimateLines Table. On the New/Edit Estimate screen, we would then add Lose Focus logic to Length and Width to calculate and add it into the Qty field.

I would recommend disabling Qty, unless they need the ability to overwrite this. I would not allow the User to enter a Qty and have it reverse calculate into Length and Width.

This estimate would increase if they need the following
- Updated Guest View Estimate screen
- Updated Estimate PDF
- Carry Length, Width to Sales Order or Invoices from the the New/Edit Estimate button clicks

Title: Zapier - Jotform Integration (Web to Lead)
Description:
One of my lead wants to have our web to lead page as robust as their current page built on JotForm. Here is the link: 
https://form.jotform.com/83014363795157

So based on each selection different results are displayed. 

Question: Can we customize something similar in Method using Web to Lead Page? 
OR Should be integrate with the current Jotform through Zapier? 
And once we customize or integrate with zapier, Can it also create an estimate?
Solution:
In general, Jotform is a specialized solution designed for the collection of information via a form. Matching the overall look and feel of the form would be difficult. 

If branding is a major deal, Zapier would be the logical route.
With Zapier we could certainly have a process that also creates an estimate for the customer. 

The zapier implementation would mirror our stock app flow:

1.) Create a Lead
2.) Create an Opportunity (with all the supporting information from the forms)
3.) We would be able to take the information on #2 and covert that into an estimate.

---------------------------------------------

With Method: 

We can do something similar to this form. We would need to update the form to have a bunch of Show/Hide actions throughout the form workflow to make it look and feel like what they have now.

Depending on the number of steps on the Web Form, we would need to design a space to store this information. The flow would go something like:

Web to Lead  to Opportunity to Estimate.
- Where all the custom information would need to be created, stored, and displayed at varying levels of the process.

Title: Reporting by Price Level or Customer Type
Description:
The ability to generate a report based on Price Level or Customer Type.
List the total revenue by category within a time period.
Solution:
This should be a simple customization. Here is what I suggest;

1. Create a custom table to hold this info. We don't want to add to the Price Level table to hold the sums as this will cause a Sync every time
2. Figure out what screen he would like to print this off of
3. The screen should hold a date range and the ability to select all or certain Price Levels to report on
4. We would need to create the report in Report Designer. If they want to be able to customize the report in the future, we should update a Preferences screen so that the User can change the report version to generate

With scoping and implementation, this should take roughly 3 to 4 hours

Title: Email Automation - Send a Summary Report of Outstanding Tasks via Email
Description:
Is there a way to generate a list of Activities / Opportunities to a user on a daily basis.

Where the user can interact with the email and bring them into the CRM.
Like an outstanding task list.

Ideally we want them to see this report in an email and interact with it bringing them back into the CRM to update those records.
Solution:
This is certainly possible.

Create a template like this can take some time; however, we can just create a list of opportunities.
Merge in links that provide a direct link to the opportunity in the list.

And have this scheduled and emailed on a daily, weekly, monthly basis using app routines.

Title: Multiple Attachment Widget
Description:
Customer would like to add a second attachment widget for a separate 'file box' on the Opportunities app.

Can multiple widget be used on the same screen and if not, what are some options for this customer?

Ideally, it would also be nice to separate customer facing attachments from internal attachments. So customers can upload and manage their own attachments. 

Keywords:
Attachments
Solution:
Please read the solution, workaround available. 

A second attachment widget associated with a transaction is not possible.
So in theory we could create a child table that maybe groups the attachments together.

What is the reason the customer needs a second widget? 
Let's say, one is for Internal use - aka contracts etc.
Another is for Client Uploads

IF this is the case, we could structure a workflow around that to support multiple areas to manage documents.
But in the most direct sense.

The original request of multiple attachments is not possible.  
The latter requests is likely around 5 hours.

Title: Removing time from the  activity calendar
Description:
Is there any way to remove time from the  activity calendar? (I have attached the screenshot)

customer wants it to show as a list rather than a scheduled calendar if that’s possible.
Solution:
This is not something that can be customized.
We're required to provide both a start and end date on the calendar so the range is effectively displayed.

In a scenario where the customer isn't interested in time, we can explore using all day events instead of timed events?

Alternatively a feature request would be best to handle this request for the calendar object - to not display start and end date on event details.

Title: Routing - The ability to re-arrange work orders based on distance
Description: Customer would like to know if it is possible to have an option to rearrange the sequence of work orders. They would like to be able to have the furthest distance first and the closest located routed last.
Solution:
Noami, when work orders are routed.
A sort order is automatically placed on them so that they can navigate from one work order generally with the shortest proximity.

If the customer is looking to calculate a distance for every work order from their 'office' to the 'Work site location' for every single order.

This is something that will need to be customized with an API.
However, the best recommendation at this time, would be to create a route, which will automatically sort the work orders in the selected period to be optimized to reduce all travel time.

Title: Ability to Rename Files Generated in Method - Invoice or Estimate template
Description:
Customer is wondering if we can change the file name of our Estimate/invoice PDFs.

They would like the name to appear as Estimate- ##### vs the long coded file name that appears out of the box.
Solution:
Renaming a report is available through the Generate Report action.
That said, the long string that sometimes follows report names are required in order to make the file name unique. 

More information is available here:
rhttps://help.method.me/en/articles/2623502-generate-report-action

Title: Contacts App - Make First Name not Required
Description:
The customer does not work with contacts.
They work with companies; however, do not want to make this field required when submitting a new customers & leads.
Solution:
At this time First Name is required by the platform.
It is used by many apps that depends on contacts for information.

For example activities, cases, and opportunities are all contact dependent today. 
Not having a First Name is problematic.

This is a feature request for future support of the platfom.

Title: API Integration - PowerBI
Description: The customer contacted us to inquire about integrating Method with PowerBI for merging data with other sources for visualization.
Solution:
• Method does not have a direct integration with PowerBI, but there are other ways to connect third party apps such as Zapier and Method's Open API.
• There is a feature request for integrating Method with PowerBI, and the customer's account will be added to the list.
• The customer's business need is to merge data with another source.
• The teammate will close the chat but is available for further assistance.
• The teammate will add the customer's account to the feature request list and notify them once it is released.

Title: Set and Lock Timezones for Public Page or Portal Pages
Description:
Would be ideal to give contacts or users the ability to set and lock a particular time zone so that it is clear what timezone is being referred to in the order

Use Case: My example use case is UtahMountainAdventures who do guided trips. When a contact sees the trip on the portal, it shows the time relative to where they are - but the contact is assuming that the time is posted as Utah time. Needless to say it causes some confusion. We made a work around by updating a text field but feel there is wider applicable to this requested functionality. I would also refer to MyBookMeLink which would allow you to see the timezone your in relative to the booking.
Solution: At this time this can not be customized. Since dates are generally shown on either a grid or a calendar this isn't possible.

Title: Recurring Work Orders - Have attachments on the series available on the individual work orders
Description:
Just like instructions, currently, when an instruction is added to a Parent Work Order it gets copied to all the Occurrence Work Orders. Customers want the same functionality with attachments too as this will be easy for them rather than going into each Work Order and attaching individual attachments.

Currently the attachments included on the main Work Order remains fixed there. It does not carry over to recurring work orders when this setup is enabled.
Solution:
This is customizable; however, it's great that we capture this as a feature request.

We could check to see if a work order is or has been related to a series, if yes, add the attachment automatically to the occurrence from the series.

Title: Outlook Gadget Improvement- New/Edit Activity - Attachment Object
Description:
We can add the Attachment Object to Outlook Widget and I believe that this should be a stock offering on our product if we want to push the use of our Email Gadgets.

My customer told me that it has saved them so much time being able to save an email and attach a document sent by the customer directly into the Gadget and has really impressed them.
Solution:
Certainly possible.

Adding an attachment to the email screen should take less than 2 minutes. 
The customer should then be able to drag and drop attachments from their emails directly into the outlook add-in / outlook gadget. 

Very very possible.

Title: Signature for internal approval of Estimates
Description: This customer would like to have the option of adding a signature for the internal approval process of the estimates, so when someone unchecks the 'Wait for sync approval' the system asks for the signature to continue.
Solution:
This is absolutely customizable; however, you can only have one signature per transaction.

If you wish to have an internal user sign off on an estimate, that's ok. 
However, the customer wouldn't be able to sign-off on that same estimate. 

There are other ways to potentially capture this but certainly customizable!

Title: Activity App Improvement - The ability to track time on an activity - Time Tracking on the New Activity screen
Description: Most often requested by Accountants and Bookkeepers. We want the ability to start a New Activity > start the clock > work away > add our notes > Clock out when the work is done.
Solution:
This can also be certainly customized, and written to the Time Tracking table.
The inverse is also possible where we can convert a time tracking entry into an activity.

This is a relatively small project but certainly valuable.

Title: Have the Activity Calendar as it's own Tile - Global Calendar - Calendar Support on the Dashboard - Calendar App
Description:
Many trialers do not know we offer a calendar - it's too hidden. 

Secondly, when they do discover its power, they want it to be a standalone app to make it easier for them to access (possibly to not have to remember that they need to go to Activity > ... > Calendar - they just want a one-click option to access the calendar right away).
Solution:
This is something we can certainly customize. Where we can create a custom app called, Calendar, and all we do is on load re-direct to the calendar they might benefit the most from using:

eg. Activity Calendar or Work Order Calendar

This is about a 10 minute customization TOPS!

Title: Estimate & Work Order Improvement - Automatically convert and accepted Estimate into a Work Order
Description:
The customer contacted us looking for a system that can display upcoming jobs on a map and automatically convert estimates to work orders. (English) Summary Customer is looking for a system that will show upcoming jobs on a map and automatically convert estimates from QB to the WO system when approved. 

Today in it's current state when an estimate is accepted, the user still needs to open the estimate and convert it into a work order.

Ideally it would be nice if this was just automated since all the information from the Estimate will end up moving to the work order anyway.
Solution:
This is a pretty simple customization. 

Since the convert estimate to work order functionality already exists in an app routine.
All that would be required is on PORTAL signature and acceptance, pass the record to the app routine and convert the Estimate to a work order.

Title: Method App Improvement - Link Emails / Method URls to open inside of the App Instead of the brower
Description:
The customer reached out stating that f I have the Method app installed on my phone, and I receive an email that an activity in Method has been assigned to me, when I click on the View Activity in Method from the email, it opens the browser instead of the Method app. Is it possible to have it open the Method app instead?

At the moment it doesn't give an option to open the activity in the App, would be a good feature to have an will improve the workflow and efficiency, if possible.
Solution: Cannot be customized but it's a great request. It revolves around intent code & how to handle method links in particular. Great Request.

Title: Transaction Improvement - Do not set Description only items to Quantity 1 or rate 0 - The ability to leave quantity and rate blank
Description:
The customer would like the ability to add a line item that is just a description without the quantity and rate field visible on the line item

Currently we do not have a way to remove or disable those fields on an editable grid.

The reason why the customer has requested this is because, the Quantity 1 is hidden on the print template but still visible on the editable grid. 

It's not causing a problem; however, it's just confusing forcing him to double check the information is listed correctly on both the screen and pdf.

Keywords:
Hide Quantity on Estimate
Do not use a Quantity of 1 on Estimates
Do not use a Quantity of 1 on Invoices
Description Line Items
Solution: Cannot be customized at this time, but this is a very popular request amongst QBDT users.

Title: Contacts App Improvement - Provide more clarity what contacts sync to QuickBooks - What contacts are CRM Only
Description:
Today, without a tremendous amount of CRM knowledge and knowledge of how Method works with contacts. It's very difficult to identify which contact is syncing with QuickBooks and which contacts are Method only. 

We depend on a cryptic 'contact type' field that really doesn't tell us much. It just tells us if the Contact is a 'Contact or an Alt Contact.

Internally we know what these represent but the customer is wondering why contacts aren't flowing to QuickBooks.

Keywords:
Secondary Contact
Contact Sync
Primary Contact
AltContact
Alternate Contact
Solution:
In theory, we could customize a tag that is added to the contact that shows whether or not that contact does 'Sync' with QuickBooks. 

I would probably create two tags:

'QuickBooks Contact' and 'Method Contact'. 
These tags could then be color coded, so the customer has and knows which contact updates flow to QuickBooks and which do not.

Title: Work Order Improvement - Ability to change service address - Change address on work order
Description:
Customer does a number work orders that are across of variety of addresses.
The customer does not want to use sub-customers and they would like the ability to change the service address on the work order.

Today they have to update the customer address, resulting in a loss of historical for previous work done.
Solution:
This is a relatively small customization:

1.) We'll need to create new address fields
2.) We'll need to update all list screens
3.) We'll need to update all work order templates to reflect new service addresses
4.) We'll need to update the routing utility to use the new address flow

Title: Contacts App Improvement - Show Lead Fields on Customer
Description:
Today when a lead is converted to a customer fields like:

Lead Rating
Lead Source
Lead Status 

Do not appear on the customer profile. 
Ideally we would like to see these fields after the lead has converted to a customer.
Solution:
Very Easy to Customize:

1.) New Contact
2.) Edit Entity 

Both customizations are certainly capable by removing the fields from the 'Lead' Section and making them available in the Lead and Customer Sections.

Title: Restore Data - The ability to restore a table to a previous date
Description:
A customization was run at the end of day.
This customization updated a bunch of fields in the table, and now we need to restore and review records that may have been incorrectly updated by customization.
Solution: Cannot be customized. Support tool available.

Title: Invoice to Bill Customization - Tracking Multiple Bills against an invoice - Tracking Multiple POs against an Invoice - Tracking time to recieve Purchase Orders or Bills
Description:
They create an Estimate - if the customer accepts the Estimate then it turns into an Invoice. When the products are ordered they are created as a Bill - it shows the Vendor with the client name/estimate number as the #. What would be the best way for them to quickly see all the places they placed an order - with date it was ordered and estimated delivery date. IF you look at the Bills section in Method you will see what I mean

It is showing the customer in the actual bill but we need to be able to look at the customers information and easily see the dates all their orders were placed, what date they are expecting delivery. One customer could have 5-10 different orders placed with different companies. If they are doing a kitchen remodel, orders might be placed for cabinets, counters, hardware, fixtures, glass - all from different companies

For example: Cabinets: Date Ordered field & Est. Delivery Date. Counters: Date Ordered field & Est. Delivery Date. Glass: Date Ordered field & Est. Delivery Date
Solution:
Something of this nature is certainly possible with customization:

I would approach it in 4 stages:
1.) We need to ability to Convert and Estimate or Invoice ---- into a Purchase Order or Bill
2.) When the transaction is converted, we link it back to the Estimate or Invoice (Estimate or Invoice Dropdown in the PO or Bill) 
3.) On the Invoice, we provide a grid (list) of all the Bills or Purchase Orders Linked to that Invoice.
4.) From here, we can create two or three custom fields to capture, Order Date, Delivery Date, and Order Status. 

This way the 'Invoice' now becomes the central project order management tool.

Title: Opportunity App - The option to push SMS updates to users
Description:
Ideally, when an opportunity is updated - I would love the ability to notify the assigned to on file that an update was made to their opportunity. 

Since multiple people are involved in the sale of an opportunity. 
I just need the ability to let them know about the Next / Last Step associated with the opportunity. 

eg. Attempting to call and schedule a meeting - left voicemail.
Solution:
Super Easy Customization. 
The way I would approach it:

1.) Have a phone number saved for every user
2.) Add a 'Next Step / Last Step' box to the opportunity
3.) Add a button under next step / last step that reads send SMS notification
4.) Send SMS.

Title: Ability to Combine Multiple Entity Types - When a Customer & Vendor Share the same Contact Information
Description: The customer mentioned that We have several different customers that are also vendors, is there any way to show the details on a single screen? Like sync the contact information and show only once.
Solution:
Xero users, get the benefit of a shared entity for customer & vendor.
QuickBooks users do not. 

In theory this could be customized; however, it may lead to system confusion.
If I had to tackle this, I would simply provide a link on the contact (regardless of whether it's a vendor or customer) for the alternate. 

Eg. Open the Customer Contact
- Have a button there to View Vendor Info.
- For Example 'Vendor Information Available - Click here'

The opposite if the customer opens the Vendor.

We could also create a relation between vendor and customer and then filter for those two options on all grids; however, this would require a considerable amount of work.

Title: Franchise Management Improvement - Franchise Billing Improvement - User Reporting - Access Reporting - Multi-tenancy Billing
Description:
Today, it is very difficult for a Head Franchise to report on their Method Subscriptions. 

There is no central location that provides them with a summary of each accounts, their users, and their subscription cost.

As a result users are required to:
1.) Take every invoice and summarize it

Title: The ability to better handle APIs that enforce rate handling
Description:
Currently, I have an integration that simply loops through a set of customers and returns the number of events.

Because our loops are so efficient, I actually run into a problem where - the API Service starts to reject my requests because of rate limiting. 

As a result I don't really have an option to 'slow' down method loops.
Counter-intuitive right?
Solution:
There is no immediate solution for this however it can be handled via customization by calling this webservice:

http://httpstat.us/200?sleep=1000

Basically all this URL does, is it enables you to 'Wait' 1 second before continuing the process. All you really need to do is calculate what the maximum rate is per minute, let's say 60 requests per minute. 

In that case you need to make sure your loop only iterates a once every second.

Title: Action Editor Improvement - New Action or Improvement - The ability to format a number
Description:
Today, we currently do not have the ability to format a number for use in email.

Ideally, it would be great if there was a way to format numbers with commas.
There may be other needs; however, really getting numbers into a legible state is pretty difficult.

Catalog Entry available for Commas in Email
Comma in Email or text fields
Solution:
Today we would need to basically:

1.) Divide by a thousand
2.) if the number before the decimal > 0 then
3.) Everything to the left of the decimal = 'Thousands' 
4.) Everything to the right is everything else  'Rest of Number'
5.) Repeat the process again for Millions by dividing by 1000
6.) Everything to the left of the decimal = 'Millions'
7.) Everything to the right is everything = 'Thousands'
8.) Join MIllions and Thousands temporary, to get the value of everything to the 'RIGHT' of them from the original number call this = 'Hundreds'
9.) Join with Comma Millions ',' Thousands ',' Hundreds

Title: Ability to share custom filter views with specific users
Description: The customer woud like to share their filters with specific user and not all, it would give them more control and will be helpful.
Solution: At this time it's all or nothing but this is a great request!

Title: Routing Improvement - Provide the ability to do Zone-Based Routing
Description:
Customer has a number of reps / technicians who are assigned to zones, cities, or counties. 

They would like work orders that are located within their zone routed for each of the respective reps associated with that area.
Solution:
Zone based scheduling is possible by assigning a location to a user.

Then you can batch the route based o the location and user.

Title: Insight Dashboard - Activity and Sales performance graphs
Description:
User would like to cast our Insight Dashboard onto a big screen at the office. 

They would like to add more graphical screenlets with a focus on:

# of calls, and emails done today, this week, this month

Value of estimates accepted today, this week, this month, this year to date
Solution:
This is customizable and possible. 

We should expect 30 minutes to an hour per screenlet.

Title: Improve Admin Permissions - Allow for more granular permissions (Allow invite but not access to all apps)
Description:
As of now an admin permission is required to add a new user  in the account. 
can there be a feature setup in an account where there is a Master Admin and they can give admin access along with restricted permissions. For example- 'I want our HR rep to have access to add new users, but I don't want her to have access to invoicing and seeing our pricing'
Note from Product: Super admin (Arshi)

Title: Copy Work Order items from Recurrence Schedule into ALL recurring Work ORDERS
Description:
Currently, when a user creates a recurring work order, there is the ability to copy items from the Schedule of Recurring Events work order (Parent Work Order) to a ocurrence work order (Child Work Order). However, it will only copy it into the occurence work order that you are currently on. That means that if you have a recurring work order that occurs many times, you will have to go into each occurence work order and copy it over one by one. 

This is not very efficient and having the ability to copy items from the Schedule of Recurring Events WO into all the occurence work orders all at once would save the user time.
Solution:
An app routine can be designed to pull all the items from the series and update all occurrences as needed.

That said, there are some considerations to think about:
1.) What happens if the series is updated? Do all recurrences get updated?
2.) If items are deleted on a recurrence to they get re-added?

Those workflows will need to be covered in detail.

Title: Customization Improvement - The ability to screens across apps
Description:
Currently the customer has a custom screen that they want to make available in another app. 

Their only option is to have consulting  / support copy the screen.
It would be great to enable customers to copy screens across apps.
Solution:
Of course a support tool is available for this. 

We should however exercise caution, as copying from a 'Stock' app into a 'Custom' app could result in potential license manipulation.

Title: Portal Improvement  - Opt out of billing should also hide transactions from the portal
Description: Right now if an Additional Contact is set to Opt out of Billing, they may still gain access to the portal and be able to view the transactions tied to the customer's account. We want to disable the Additional contacts from seeing transactions related to the account in the portal.
Solution: This is a relatively small customization; however, I would argue incredibly critical to anyone who uses the portal heavily.

Title: Reorder Reminders - Re-order Reminders - Customers who haven't purchased in sometime
Description: Customer is looking to have reminders created for themselves and potentially to customers based on a period of time since the customer last purchased services.
Solution:
Certainly possible, the most simple approach is to:

1.) Automate opportunity creation, once a period of time has passed since the last order eg. 6 months.
2.) From here we can track the deal and determine what level of communication is required .

Title: Invoice report enhancement - Subtotal by item category
Description: User is in the trophy business and would like an invoice report based on items category.
Solution:
This should be relatively straight forward; however, charting and reporting screens can be complex.

This is likely a single chart that is grouped on category.
If the items do not have categories today, we would need to create a custom field for that.
If they do (eg. QBO) then we should be able to link that information and build charts from that. 

Since the invoice screen has 3 filters (All, Overdue, Paid)

3 of these charts will need to be created and integrated onto the reporting page.

Title: MailChimp Enhancement - Log an activity to the contact to show that the contact has been sent to mailchimp
Description:
Customer uses mailchimp extensively; however, there is no easy way to determine if a contact or email has already been sent to a list. 

As a simple solution, it would be great if an activity could be logged when a contact is sent to mailchimp.
Solution:
Cannot be customized at this time. 

The send to Mailchimp flow is a pretty closed system.
As customizers we don't have a ton of flexibility around this workflow today.

Title: Paying Vendor Via ACH
Description:
User is in general contracting and is looking for a way to pay their vendors through Method via ACH. 

Can this type of workflow be customized?
Solution: This cannot be customized at this time.

Title: Vendor Progress Billing
Description:
User is in the custom conveyor industry and is looking for Method to help manage both progress invoices and vendor billing. 

Certain vendors will offer terms for invoicing at specific stages (assembly, delivery, installation). 

User is wondering if we can set up a workflow where a Purchase Order is turned into multiple progress bills based on the terms of a specific vendor.
Solution:
This is certainly possible depending on the customer needs.

We would need to establish all the different versions / terms that have different billing or invoicing flows. 

From there, create and track what's been invoiced / billed and what's pending.

Title: Portal Improvement - Ability to customize portal sign-in screen
Description:
The customer is looking for a way to add verbiage and instructions to the login page.
It would be great if we could customize this page.
Solution: At this time this cannot be customized.

Title: Partner Program Improvement - Allow a Support Seat for Partner Implementers
Description:
Currently partners would like a system that would provide them access to a customer account without having an admin explicitly grant access as a paid user.

In general what does happen is partners will take the username and password of one of the admins in the account and do the work as that user.

While this isn't ideal for the partner as they're license sharing, they're often tasked with having the conversation about 'inviting' them as a paid user. Creating some friction right at the start of the relationship, especially if they're being hired as a 3rd party to do customization.
Solution:
At this time this is not a service we 'Method' offers to partners. 

We should strongly discourage license sharing, as it does impact audit and audit trail records when information may be incorrectly updated or changed.

At this time, it's best that the user invite the consultant and treat them as an employee, providing them with only the appropriate permissions required to complete their jobs.

eg. Provide them with 'Customizer' access, vs. 'Full Admin' access.

Title: Work Order Improvement - The ability to capture status on Work Order Line - Job Line
Description:
The customer will build out a work order, where there are multiple stages involved.
Sometimes over a couple of days, when doing pool installs for example.

As a result, they want to keep all the tasks on one work order; but manage the individual tasks with a status to help them keep track of the work that's done and that's to be done.
Solution:
This is a quite a simple customization to add a status field to the line.

Furthermore, business rules can be created to prevent:

1.) Completing the work order when there are items pending
2.) Invoicing the work order when there are items pending

Title: Editable Grid Improvement - Improve Card Columns on Editable Grids to be up to par with expressions on Non-Editable grids
Description:
My Customer wants to use expressions on Editable Grids and stack fields together like Non-Editable Grids. 

The card column cut offs the information on the Grid when too much info is displayed. Expressions on Non-Editable grids did not do this. 

Support for word wrapping. 

Please bring them up to par.
Solution: Cannot be customized at this time.

Title: QBO Sync Improvement - Support for QBO Subtotals - Ability to add a subtotal in the middle of a Transaction
Description:
QBO provides the ability to add the subtotal in between the line items.
Please find the image attached.
Solution:
A solution for subtotals is available via the professional services team.

This solution is available as part of our catalog offering; however, will require implementation and testing to ensure it is working as expected.

Title: Chart Improvement - Ability to Export Charts and Reports with a professional looking logo
Description:
Option to export out the reports as PDF with charts and Method logo - a more professional looking report

We send out open invoice reports to our clients. I was able to download an excel sheet from the invoice report screen, but it doesn't look as professional as I would like.
Solution:
This is a great feature request, as this is not available in stock charting. 

However, as a work around
Charts and Exports can be re-created via the Method Report Designer.
That said, they will look likely different than their screen counterpart. 

The total development time for one chart / report is between 3-4 hours depending on the complexity.

Title: Push Notification Improvement - Ability to send push notifications from Activities
Description: The customer mentioned that he would like to get push notifications when an activity is created and as well when an activity is due.
Solution:
When an activity is created, sending a push notification is possible and should be simple to customize.

That said, when an activity is due or approaching a due date, this is something that cannot be easily customized at this time. Since, we don't have the ability to determine when an activity due date is approaching.

Title: Reporting Screen for Time Tracking
Description:
Today, we do not have a reporting screen for Time Tracking

We have a number of customers requesting this functionality.
We want to see daily, weekly breakdowns by user but also potentially the type of work being done and how much.
Solution: This is not a heavy task but it is repetitive / time consuming. We should probably discuss the details first to understand what reports they need and what they're expecting to see.

Title: HTML Editor Improvement  - Easy way to use GIF in the email body
Description: A customer has requested a more seamless way to incorporate GIFs directly into email bodies within Method, as other platforms make this integration fairly intuitive. While embedding an iframe or HTML snippet for GIFs can be a workaround, this approach isn't ideal for non-technical users who may find it challenging.
Solution: Nothing can really be done at the customization level.

Title: Email Campaign Improvement - Batch Follow-up Activities - Batch Activities
Description:
Customer is wondering if we can customize a way to create a batch  follow-up activity based on the recipient email  status (open, clicked etc.)

Additioanlly, they would like the ability to multi-select and send a followup email.
Solution:
This is certainly possible. 

Ideally we would go through every email status and determined if there was an interaction on the email (eg. Clicked). 

If so create a follow-up activity or alternatively, send a follow-up email after a certain number of days.

Title: AI Improvement - CRM Improvement via AI
Description:
Customer is interested in AI to help with:
1. Predictive Opportunity Scoring
2. Automated Follow-Ups Based on Behavior
3. Personalized Customer Interactions
4. Sentiment Analysis on Customer Notes
5. Optimized Task Scheduling for Sales Reps
6. Activity Trends and Opportunity Forecasting
7. Intelligent Notification Systems for Sales Reps
Solution:
Zapier, offers integrations with tools like ChatGPT to help enable some of these elements. 
That said this can only be facilitated through the use of an API today.

Title: Proposal App Improvement - Renewals - Better handling of services they need to be manually / automatically renewed
Description:
Problem Statement: Currently, our contract management process captures only the contract start and end dates, lacking automated reminders for contract renewal. As most contracts are on an annual renewal cycle, the absence of automated notifications places the onus on teams to manually track renewal dates, which increases the risk of missed renewals and impacts client engagement continuity.

Proposed Solution:

Automated Renewal Notification System:

Create an automated notification feature that sends reminders to relevant stakeholders (e.g., contract managers, clients, or specified team members) at customizable intervals (e.g., 90, 60, 30, and 7 days) before the contract expiration date.
Notifications should be configurable by contract type and client preferences to accommodate different renewal cycles if necessary.
Include renewal terms and relevant engagement documents directly in the notification to streamline the decision-making process.
New Contract Generation for Renewal Period:

Implement functionality to auto-generate a new contract for the subsequent period once a renewal decision is made. This new contract should:
Clone key details from the existing contract, including parties, terms, and clauses.
Provide fields for modifications to terms if needed, to reflect any changes in the engagement letter or scope for the upcoming year.
Archive the prior contract version for easy reference and continuity in tracking engagement history.
Enhancements to Engagement Letter Management:

Enable version control and storage of engagement letters with each contract iteration, ensuring that any updates to the engagement terms are readily accessible and trackable.
Benefits:

Improved Client and Contract Management: Automated reminders reduce the risk of unintentional lapses and ensure clients and stakeholders are well-informed ahead of renewal deadlines.
Consistency and Clarity: Storing contract versions allows teams to keep clear records of each period’s terms, simplifying reference to past agreements.
Operational Efficiency: By auto-generating renewal contracts, this feature will save time for teams and reduce manual data entry.
Solution:
Depending on the magnitude of the automated notifications and updates, the project scope can be large. However, a simple workflow would be:

1.) Mark contracts that should be renewed
2.) When it hits a certain threshold, eg. 60 days before contract end
3.) Duplicate the contact, update the engagement letter to reflect the latest version
4.) Send notifications to customer
5.) Rinse and repeat as required.

Title: QuickBooks Online Sync Improvement - Enable Creation of Bundled Items in Method
Description:
Summary:
Request to implement the ability to create and manage bundled items directly in Method:CRM, mirroring QuickBooks functionality. Bundled items are groups of products or services sold together as a single unit, commonly used in QuickBooks for streamlined invoicing and inventory management. Currently, Method only supports viewing bundled items synced from QuickBooks, not creating them.

Objective:
Allow users to create and manage bundled items within Method:CRM, ensuring a seamless workflow for businesses that sell grouped products or services.

Proposed Features:

Bundled Item Creation:

Introduce an interface for creating bundled items in Method.
Allow users to select and group multiple existing products or services into a single bundled item.
Customization Options:

Enable users to name the bundle, set a default price, and optionally define quantities for each component.
Allow optional visibility of component items on invoices (e.g., show/hide individual components).
Sync with QuickBooks:

Ensure that bundled items created in Method sync seamlessly with QuickBooks.
Maintain compatibility with existing bundled items synced from QuickBooks.
Bundled Item Management:

Allow editing or deleting of existing bundled items within Method.
Provide an overview of the bundles and their components for better inventory management.
Reporting and Insights:

Include bundled items in sales, inventory, and financial reports.
Track sales and performance of bundles alongside individual items.
Benefits:

Streamlined Workflow: Businesses can manage their entire inventory system in Method without relying on QuickBooks for creating bundled items.
Enhanced Flexibility: Allows customization and visibility options that better align with diverse business needs.
Seamless Integration: Maintains sync with QuickBooks to ensure consistency between platforms.
Improved User Experience: Simplifies invoicing and inventory processes for businesses selling bundled products or services.
Solution:
Last this was examined it was not available via the API.
Therefore, currently it cannot be customized.

Creating an FR to track requests.

Title: Work Order Improvement  -  Subscribe to Work Order Updates Without Assignment
Description:
Summary:
Introduce the ability for users to subscribe to updates on specific work orders without being assigned to them. This feature would allow stakeholders, such as supervisors, team members, or external contacts, to stay informed about the progress of a work order without being directly responsible for its completion.

Objective:
Enhance visibility and communication for team members and external stakeholders by providing an option to subscribe to and receive updates on work orders, regardless of assignment status.

Proposed Features:

Subscription Option:

Add a 'Subscribe to Updates' button to work order records.
Allow both internal users and external contacts (e.g., clients, vendors) to subscribe.
Notifications:

Send email or in-app notifications for key updates, such as:
Status changes (e.g., 'In Progress,' 'Completed').
Time tracking or resource updates.
Notes or comments added to the work order.
Subscriber Management:

Provide an interface to view and manage subscribers for each work order.
Allow work order owners or admins to add or remove subscribers.
Customizable Subscription Settings:

Allow subscribers to choose which updates they want to receive (e.g., status changes, new comments, completion notifications).
Audit Trail:

Track subscription activity (who subscribed and when) in the work order history for transparency.
Benefits:

Improved Communication: Keeps all relevant stakeholders informed without overwhelming work order assignees.
Enhanced Flexibility: Accommodates roles where updates are needed for oversight or collaboration but without direct responsibility.
Better Client Experience: Enables clients or external partners to stay informed about job progress without needing constant manual updates from staff.
Streamlined Workflow: Reduces the need for manual update requests and repetitive communications.
Solution:
While this is customizable it is tough to understand when notifications should or shouldn't be sent. 

We also have to monitor when certain fields change. 
The customization could be as simple as notify 'x' number of people or as complicated as any time something changes on the work order notify everyone who may be associated with this work order.

Title: Mailing Labels - Customizable Mailing Label Templates
Description:
Make it memorized in the format the client prefers, such as:

FirstName LastName
Address
City, State
ZIP

Make it available for future usage
To be printed for Christmas cards, thank-you greetings, mass-mailing campaigns, etc.
Solution:
Mailing labels are unfortunately, very difficult and tedious to customize in the CRM. 

While we are able to customize them using the report designer, there is a tremendous amount of trial and error required on the customer end to ensure they print as expected. 

Known problems are label drift, where the labels incrementally move in a direction (Usually) offseting after the first few pages.  
This is because some labels cover multiple lines and some few. 

Strongly recommend testing, as well as exploring export alternatives available on our help centre here:https://help.method.me/en/articles/5672373-how-to-export-data-to-print-labels

Title: QBO Sync Improvement - Sync with CC & BCC Field associated with Customer
Description:
The use case: User utilizes the additonal “CC email” field and 'BCC email'  from QBO and is looking for a way to bring this information over to Method. 

The user put multiple emails using commas in the 'email' field in QOO but since QBO has a character limit so not all the email addresses they want get synced over to Method. 

Having the ability to sync with the CC & BCC email fields would be a workaround for them to tackle the character limit issue
Solution:
Cannot be customized today.

The recommendation, would be to create Method-Only contacts to store the additional email / contact information.

Title: Ability to Capture Multiple Signatures
Description:
Multiple Customer / Contact Signature

The reason being that their work orders require 2 people to sign as proof of completion; in this case legal guardians. They then send a signed copy of that document
Solution:
Signatures need to be treated like related records (Think of Customers & Contacts)

1.) Create a separate Contact Signature table to store the Contacts signature that has an activity
2.) Add a Contact Signature Url field to activity table
3.) Create a Document Signature Page with Signature Table that has a signature widget
4.) Create a button on the Activity  to go to that Signature page with the current Work Order
5.) When the Signature gets signed, Save and update the Contact Signature Url on the Work Order

Title: Audit Trail Improvement - Track when the changes are made via an app routine
Description:
This account has 8-10 app routines, most of them related to Invoices. 
When troubleshooting it will be beneficial to see in the audit trail which app routine updated / created a record.

The audit trail shows blank App name and screen name when the log comes from a routine.

Right now, when I troubleshoot I compare the app routine run schedule with the date/time of update in audit trail to figure out which routine could have updated the records.
Solution:
This feels like a bug versus a feature request.
I'll review with the product team.

Title: Xero Improvement - Ability to do partial Payments
Description:
Problem Statement
Currently, when an invoice is paid using the Xero integration, the system requires the full amount to be settled in one transaction. However, many businesses operate on a model where:

Customers make installment payments over time.
Deposits are collected before final balances are paid.
Partial payments are applied due to credits, disputes, or payment plans.
Since the Xero integration does not support partial payments, users must manually track and reconcile payments, leading to inefficiencies, errors, and frustration.
Solution:
While a solution could be customized to track partials in 'Method-Only'.

I would recommend against this behavior, since this is a posting transaction. 
We should aim towards an ideal solution which is improving our ability to  sync with partial payments or work with Xero to make this functionality available if it's not's via the API.

Title: Invoice App Improvement - Be able to identify when an invoice has been sent or not been sent
Description:
Summary:
Customers want the ability to automatically remove invoices from their  filter views once the invoice has been sent.

Problem Statement:
A customer called in to request that invoices be removed from their custom filter view once they have been marked as sent. Currently, their view includes all invoices based on specific criteria, but once an invoice is sent, they no longer need to see it. The current filtering system does not support this behavior directly, and it may require additional customization.

Proposed Solution:
Introduce a filter condition that allows invoices to be excluded from a view once their status changes to 'Sent.'
Add an option in the filter settings to dynamically update views based on invoice status changes.
If customization is required for specific accounts, consider making this a configurable setting that can be toggled per customer.
Solution:
This is a relatively small customization:

1.) Create a field called 'Last Sent Date'
2.) When the invoice is emailed, automatically update it to the current date
3.) Alternatively if the invoice is manually sent, enable the users to specify the date.

Title: Remapping Improvement - Multi-Tenant Support
Description:
Summary:
Our Remapping Tool is designed to migrate users from one QuickBooks file to another while preserving their CRM data. As we expand support for enterprise-level accounts transitioning from QuickBooks Desktop (QBDT) to QuickBooks Online (QBO) or QuickBooks Enterprise Solutions (QBE/IES), we need to enhance the tool to accommodate multi-tenant accounts.

Problem Statement:
Currently, our Remapping Tool is optimized for single-tenant migrations, where a single QuickBooks file is mapped to a single CRM instance. However, enterprise customers often operate multiple QuickBooks files under one CRM account, requiring a more sophisticated remapping process. Without multi-tenant support, these accounts face significant challenges, including:

Manual workarounds to maintain multiple financial data sources.

Potential data integrity issues when switching QuickBooks files.

Loss of efficiency due to the inability to handle bulk remapping across multiple entities.

Proposed Solution:
Enhance the Remapping Tool to support Multi-Tenant Remapping, allowing enterprise-level accounts to seamlessly migrate multiple QuickBooks files while maintaining CRM data integrity. Key capabilities should include:

Mapping multiple QuickBooks files to a single CRM instance with configurable rules.

Bulk remapping options for large-scale migrations.

Selective data remapping to align specific accounts, transactions, and customers with the appropriate QuickBooks file.

Automated conflict resolution for handling duplicate or mismatched records across multiple files.

Audit trail and logging features to track migration history and ensure accuracy.

Business Impact:

Increased adoption of Method CRM by enterprise-level QuickBooks users who require more advanced migration tools.

Improved user experience and reduced churn by minimizing manual migration complexities.

Stronger positioning in the QuickBooks ecosystem as a scalable CRM solution for businesses with complex accounting structures.

Reduced support burden by providing a streamlined, automated process for large account migrations.
Note from Product: Multi tenant - (Arshi)

Title: API Integration - Make.com
Description:
Summary:
We would like to enable a seamless integration between Make.com and Method:CRM, specifically to support automated lead management workflows — such as capturing leads from external sources and syncing them directly into Method's Leads table.

Use Case:
Many businesses use Make.com as an automation hub to collect leads from form tools (e.g. Typeform, Gravity Forms, Google Forms), ad platforms, or third-party marketing software. These leads need to be pushed into Method:CRM to trigger follow-ups, assign reps, and manage the sales pipeline.

Desired Workflow Example:

A lead fills out a form or submits data via an external tool connected through Make.com.

Make.com passes the data to Method:CRM, populating a new Lead record (or updating if the lead already exists).

Optional: Trigger a Method action, such as assigning a rep or sending a confirmation email via Method.

Current Challenge:
There is currently no official Method:CRM app/module in Make.com's app directory. This forces users to rely on:

Custom API calls to Method (which require technical setup)

Zapier as a workaround (which lacks full customization or enterprise flexibility)
Solution:
At the time of writing this, Make.com does have a zapier integration on Makeforms. 
That said, this could be a simple integration.

The API is available here:
https://developers.make.com/api-documentation

Depending on how the data is stored and the scope of the work. The size of the project could vary.

Title: Estimate App Improvement - Internal Approval Workflow / Sales Manager Approval
Description:
Feature Overview:
Implement an internal approval workflow for Estimates where a Sales Manager or Accounting team member must review and approve the Estimate before it is sent to a customer.

Current Process:
Users are currently able to generate and send Estimates directly to clients.

There is no built-in approval gate or automated routing to designated approvers.

This introduces risk of incorrect pricing, unapproved discounts, or miscommunication.

Proposed Workflow:
User Saves Estimate

Upon saving, the Estimate is automatically flagged for internal approval.

Approval Routing

Estimate is routed to a designated approver (Sales Manager or Accounting) based on predefined logic (e.g., Estimate creator, department, or amount thresholds).

Internal Review

Approver reviews and either approves or requests changes with optional comments.

Customer Delivery

Once approved, the Estimate is automatically sent to the client using the designated delivery method (email, portal, etc.).

Additional Notes:
Permissions: User access and role-based permissions have already been reviewed and aligned with the approval logic.

Training: A team training session has been discussed to ensure end users understand the updated workflow and approval expectations.

Automation Goal: Reduce manual handoffs and avoid errors by streamlining the process with automation.

Business Justification:
Ensures pricing integrity and reduces risk of sending incorrect or unapproved Estimates.

Supports accountability and better alignment between Sales and Finance.

Enhances professionalism and consistency in external client communications.

Encourages proper internal checks without adding administrative burden.
Solution:
Customizing this solution could be pretty lightweight or heavy depending on the needs.

In general there are a couple questions to answer:

1.) Whom does the estimate get re-directed to for approval
2.) If rejected who can make modifications
3.) If something is changed how is the sales rep / author notified
4.) How is the audit trail / change log get captured and recorded for future review.

Depending on these questions; certainly customizable.

Title: Cases App Improvement - Track Multiple Contacts / Stakholders to a case
Description:
Description:
Currently, Method CRM allows a case to be associated with a single contact under a customer. However, many real-world customer service situations involve multiple stakeholders (e.g., billing, technical, operations) participating in the same issue or request.

Proposed Functionality:

Enable the ability to associate multiple contacts from the same customer (or optionally different customers, such as contractors or partners) to a single case.

UI should support:

Primary contact (default for communication)

Additional contacts (cc'd in email notifications, able to view case updates via portal or internal view)

All associated contacts should have visibility into the case timeline and notes, subject to permission settings.

Business Use Case:

A project manager, accounting rep, and technician may all need visibility on a warranty or support issue.

Sales and customer success teams often need to loop in multiple people without duplicating or creating redundant cases.
Solution:
Very simple customization to add multiple contacts to a case listing. 

This does get increasingly complication when notifications are involved, that said, certainly still possible with minor configuration changes.

Title: Invoice Reporting Improvement - Reporting by State
Description:
Description:
We need the ability to filter and group reports based on the state/province field tied to customer records. This would help us understand geographic trends and performance by region.

Use Cases:

Track revenue or opportunities by U.S. state or Canadian province.

Analyze support activity volumes by customer location.

Build dashboards showing trial conversion or churn by state.

Request Details:

Add 'State' as a filter and grouping option in the report builder.

Support summary metrics (e.g. total revenue, # of activities) grouped by state.

Ensure compatibility with dashboards and exports.

Impact:
This will help sales, support, and leadership teams gain insights into regional performance, allowing better targeting of outreach and services.
Solution:
This can be customized; however, a solution is available without customization / with minimal customization.

1.) Add Billing State to the Invoice List
2.) Then filter the list using the period (eg. This Month , This Year)
3.) Export to CSV
4.) Create a Pivot table on state

That said, customization can be used to create a report that does this automatically. 
Furthermore, we could generate totals for Taxes, Amounts etc.

Title: Auto Save - Autosave Support for In-Progress Transactions (Estimates, Invoices, Sales Receipts, etc.)
Description:
Overview:
Users risk losing progress when working on transaction forms (e.g., Estimates, Invoices) due to timeouts, browser crashes, accidental navigation, or session interruptions. This feature request proposes an autosave mechanism that periodically saves draft versions of transactions being worked on—ensuring users can resume where they left off.

Use Cases:

A user spends 20+ minutes customizing an estimate and accidentally refreshes the browser. All data is lost.

An internet connection drops mid-way through entering an invoice. Upon return, the user must re-enter all fields from scratch.

A mobile user switches apps and returns to find the session timed out, with no recovery of work.

Proposed Functionality:

Autosave every 30–60 seconds or on key events (e.g., field change, tab switch).

Drafts are saved per user, per transaction type (e.g., “Unfinished Estimate by Nelson”).
Solution:
This could be customized; however it is laborious. 

Part of the reason why it's not something I would recommend customizing is because their is no undo functionality. 
Without undo - autosaving could be a source for data loss. 

Naturally this is possible; however, I would strongly consider if the benefits outweigh the detriments.

Title: Payment Gateway Addition - Support for Zelle
Description: We use Zelle for payments, is method able to support Zelle payments?
Solution:
In theory, we could just add payment links to the email / pdf to drive to zelle if they have a public page for payments. 

However, an integrated solution is not possible at this time as it's not a supported gateway.

Title: Invoice Improvement - Ability to batch send Invoices - Batch Email invoices
Description:
Currently, invoices must be opened and sent one at a time from the Invoice app or the Invoice list screen. This can be time-consuming for users who handle large invoice volumes or need to send recurring monthly invoices to multiple customers.

Use Case / Business Impact:

Greatly reduces time spent on repetitive invoice-sending tasks.
Helps accounting/admin teams manage high invoice volumes efficiently.
Improves workflow during month-end billing or recurring invoicing cycles.
Solution:
We should be able to take the logic that is used to send an individual email and repurpose that to loop through a list of invoices and send them in bulk to customers.

Technically this is not difficult; however, extensive testing is required.

Title: Opportunities - Ability to Support & Track Vendors
Description:
Currently our Opportunity screen shows the Customer/Leads contacts. How long would it take to set up showing Vendors/VendorLeads and PO/Bills associated with them? 
Reasons why this is necessary - some businesses use Opportunities to track projects.
Solution:
We can implement a simple solution with a vendor dropdown then show 
lists of associated POs & Bills. If they need the ability to create POs & Bills from the opportunity that will take longer.

Title: Email Summary - Email Analytics
Description:
Can we give user/Admins an email alert if their sent-email in app fails to reach the customer? 

The Status (beta) has nearly a dozen statuses right now, would be nice to notify the user what failed, as oppose to asking them to go through a grid of recently sent emails to see what failed/sent.

========================================================
Solution:
This customization is pretty simple but it does take some really advanced customization knowledge:

1.) We need to identify everywhere emails are being sent (Ideally every email is being logged as an activity). For example: Transactions & Emails from the Send Email App.
2.) In the send email action we need to update a field called 'BatchID'. 
3.) Recommended naming of the BatchID = The name of the table + the recordid of that record.
4.) We should create 2 fields (Emailed Sent, Email Status) on the activity table.
5.) They create an app routine that is scheduled to run every evening.
6.) This app routine should loop through emails that have been sent in the last 30 days (using the email sent field)
7.) Then using the batchId call this webservice 
8.) https://api.method.me/email/notifications/{{account}}/stats?batchName=testBatch
9.) This will return the status of the email which you can they use to update the activity and show the end user.

Title: Owner Statement Summary (E.g. Month-end Statement Summary)
Description:
Currently if customers were to look at their open balances, they would see invoices  in their portal. If they just wanted to see a report that summarized their invoices outstanding as of August 31, 2019, there is no way for them to do this.

Using customer portals is there was a way they could run their own statements out of Method CRM from their portal?

I’ve attached an example of a customer statement for August. This is the customer that pays based on their month-end statement balance.
Solution:
The simplest build would just require 2 things
1. Custom print template
2. Customized portal screen with print button


With an additional 3-4 hours, a selectable date range plus the aggregates related to overdue balances in different data ranges could be added. (refer to footer example pdf)

Title: Portal - Multi-Tenancy - Shared Customers across multiple companies
Description:
How can we allow businesses with multiple QB files (some of which contains the same customers across files) to see their information centralized in one portal?

How can we allow multiple customers with the same email address switched between on the portal. 

For example: I have QuickBooks:Method 1, 2, 3.
John Smith is a customer in all 3 accounts.
I want to send him a portal link so he can update his info in 1 portal but the update is seen across all my 3 Methods and QuickBoooks, plus any transactions he owes.
Solution:
We are considering the following

1. All QB files are the same accounting version (Multi-tenanct Specific)
2. Contact's Name / Email is exactly the same in all 3 QB files 
3. The Contact's Entity FullName / Email is exactly the same in all 3 QB files
4. We are only viewing/updating Contact info and viewing their Entity's transactions

Guest - Customer Home
We would have to show the info in regards to 1 Tenant. We cannot display info from all three. Once updated, we would have to apply the updates to the other 2 Tenants. The Contact in this case would have different RecordIDs, so we will have to match everything based off of Contact Name. If the Contact Name is different in either of the Tenant, this would break

Guest - Customer Transactions
We would be able to open up the grid to view all Tenants. Once again, all Customer FullName would have to be the same to pull their transactions. If the Customer FullName is different, we their transactions screen would break

This process would be a bare minimum of 10 to 15 hours

Title: Opportunity - Add Items / Item List Directly to Opportunities  / Opportunity Line
Description:
1. Making line items grid available on New/Edit Opportunity screen. This way, sales reps can enter list of items that they are selling to the customer. 

2. Opportunity Amount will be auto-populated and reflect the total amount of every line items selected.
Solution:
There are limitations when we consider things like Group Items.
That said definately possible.
