If the user needed it on mobile & desktop the estimate would be 5-10 hours.

Title: Estimate - Create an Opportunity from an Estimate
Description:
Wants the ability to create an opportunity from an estimate and have a lot of the info copy over for him. 

Wants customer to copy over to opportunity, with the amount, date, and memo as the title.
Solution:
-Set up a button on the estimate screen to create oppotunity
- Check that there isn't already an opportunity tied to the estimate
- If there isn't insert the opportunity

We also need to know what stage the opportunity will set to and who it's assigned to. 

Note: On the opportunity table the name is a required field so as long as we're sure that we have a value for this, this will work

Title: Ability to Change Amount on the items grid
Description:
Customer would like the ability to change/edit the 'amount' in the line items grid.
They are a consulting firm and flexibility in pricing is key.

They would like the Amount field to be editable, like the rate and quantity field.
Which would then update the rate / cost accordingly. 

For example rather than $100 * 30 = $3000.
The customer would like the option to just type $3000 and have the qty & rate updated as needed.
Solution:
Technically, the Rate and the Quantity are the only things that can be manipulated, not the Amount field.

We can create a Method-Only Amount field on the line level. 
That will basically populate both Quantity and Rate, and therefore update QuickBooks Amount.  

The only risk is when / if they create transactions in QuickBooks; this Method-Only amount field would be blank.

Title: Reporting Screen for Sales Orders
Description:
Today, we do not have a reporting screen for Sales Orders.
We have a number of customers requesting this functionality.
Solution: This is not a heavy task but it is repetitive / time consuming. We should probably discuss the details first to understand what reports they need and what they're expecting to see. One thing to keep in mind is that Sales Orders only sync with QuickBooks Desktop, so if this is a QuickBooks Online user then the data they may want to see may not be available without additional customizations to the Sales Order process itself.

Title: Ability to Convert a Work Order to a Bill
Description:
The objective here is to convert work order lines into bills based on a vendor.

Since the customer subcontracts a lot of their work, they would like to keep track of what work has been billed / needs bills created.
Solution:
This process requires a few things:

1.) We need to be able to know what vendor we want to create the Purchase Order or Bill for
2.) What the charge is, What Item we would associate with that charge.
3.) Store a link on the Work Order or Work Order Line to that Bill so we know that this item has already been billed for. 
4.) Lastly we would need to make sure we understand if the flow requires a Purchase Order first or just straight to bill

Title: Ability To Assign a Crew to a Work Order & Track Time Against the Work Order
Description:
My customer uses crews.
They need the ability to configure a crew on a work order.

A crew should have a crew leader (AssignedTo)
and people under.

When a work order is started, everyone on the crew should have time tracking logged against them
Solution:
Pretty Straight Forward but will take time the devil is in the details:

1.) Are all users assigned to
2.) Do we need a screen to manage crews (same people, different people, different crews)
3.) When a crew is added to a work order, does the crew leader need to flexibility to remove members of the team on a job.
4.) Batch time tracking is certainly possible; all the above applies.

Title: Followup activities from Opportunities
Description:
Customer would like to retain the ability to create followup activities from the opportunities app after initial save.

Currently, once an opportunity is saved, the attachment widget replaces the create followup checkbox.

User would like to have create a follow-up checkbox and attachment widget to be always visible.
Solution:
Possible should be small.
Testing is the bulk of the work required.

Title: Ability to Batch Invoice for the parent customer vs sub-customer
Description:
User has multiple large organizations where sub-customers are used to manage the relationship between parent customers and multiple physical locations.

When they are invoicing from the batch invoice feature in the Workorder app, they would like the batch action to group based on parent customers vs sub-customers so all WOs completed for the parent and all of its corresponding subs are combined into a single invoice.
Solution:
This is certainly possible today we group on Entity.

Grouping on a sub- of the entity should certainly be possible; however, the business rules will need to be evaluated by a consultant for example are there ever conditions where the sub is not used for invoicing.

Title: Ability to  have invoices and proposals show the provincial and federal sales taxes separately
Description: Customer would like to know if Method can  be customized so that proposals and invoices have 2 multipliers - i.e. qty and number of days qty X #days X rate = $, and  invoices and proposals to show the provincial and federal sales taxes separately.
Solution:
Yes, this is possible.

Basically the objective here would be to have proposals calculate recurring amounts the same we do on transactions.

We'll need to explore this more. 

Sales Tax Capabilities are certainly also possible; however, it does depend on how they're configured in QuickBooks and whether we can replicate their calculations.

Title: Ability to edit activity from calendar view without it going to another screen.
Description: Customer would like to know if it is possible to edit an activity from the calendar view and have it stay on the calendar view screen without going into the actual activity screen for that specific activity.
Solution: Create a feature  request this would need to be facilitated by the platform.

Title: Marketing - Automation of a Voicemail / Voice Message
Description:
The user wants to explore a 3 way Production Drip based on Work Order stages and would like to send email, SMS and robo-call.

Can we customize an automatic phone call with a recorded message? 

Additionally, can this message be a smart message? essentially using Text to Voice technology to support Method merge fields.
Solution:
At this time the platform does not support text to voice; nor can we robo dial or autodial.

That said there may be marketplace solutions / zapier connections that may leverage and automate this workflow.

I would encourage exploring APIs that offer this functionality and exploring their integration with Method.

Title: Time Tracking - Reporting on Employee Overtime
Description:
Customer would like to build a report for tracking overtime for their field crew users.

They would like to set up a base number of hours per day per fieldcrew and track overtime on a daily basis.

They would like a generate an end of month report capturing field crews and their overtime hours.
Solution:
Overtime calculations to say the least are complicated.

Simplified version of considerations:

1.) How many hours per day
2.) Type of employee (hourly / salary)
3.) Different rates
4.) Holiday / Double time
5.) Overtime on Holiday / Double time
6.) If someone works 40 hours in 3 days are they eligible for overtime, with 2 days off in lieu?
7.) How and when does lieu apply?

The number of variables and considerations make this incredibly difficult to customize.
Can be done, but all parties should expect this to be iterative.

Title: Grids / Lists - Color Coding Rows
Description:
The customer is transitioning from an excel work order workflow.

they have an organized list in Excel, where the status is priotized and color-coded.

They are wondering if we can customzie the status colors into their WO grid based on status.

They prefer this interface vs creating multiple view filters based on status.
Solution: Please create a feature request or instruct the customer to use tags.

Title: Ability to control which contacts has access to the customer portal
Description:
Customer would like the ability to control which contact is able to view specific screens on the customer portal.

They would like to 1) restrict transaction access to only billing contacts, 2) control who is able to create a case based on a fixed criteria.
Solution:
There is an existing feature request for this.

We can quickly add a checkbox to contacts, that enable transaction access.
If this is false, show the recent transaction tab; however, keep the page blank / provide a message to contact the admin to enable transaction access.

Title: Ability to add headers to estimate line items
Description:
Customwe is looking to add options and section headers to estimate line items.

They mentioned 'With almost every estimate we need to separate out locations and options for customers. We currently have no way of labeling these breakouts in Method. '

Does this possible via customization?
Solution:
This is not possible via customization; however, I just created a feature request for freezing columns.

This would be an appropriate FR, to the header row.

Title: Time Tracking Calendar
Description:
Customer want's to visually see time tracking entries on a calendar.
Customer may require the ability to update time tracking entries via calendar view.
Solution:
- Calendar base table must always be activity
- Link the Entity on the Time tracking to a user
- Create a new activity type that is app specific
- In theory you could create an activity for an employee contact for the time period of the work done - here you loose the reference of what customer you're doing work for.
- If the time tracking is assigned to a person (AssignedTo) Then it'll work well, keep in mind this isn't required.
- Lastly each time tracking should have a link to ActivityRecordID
- A nightly app routine should run through the time tracking table, to make sure start & end and duration hasn't changed. If it has changed from the activity do an update. Changes to time tracking can occur inside of QB and not Method.


Risks
-------
- Remember to schedule the app routine nightly to make sure we catch TT entries from QB 
- Evaluate whether the customer wants to update time tracking entries via the calendar. You may need to update the Time Tracking from the Activity. Reverse the flow.

Title: Ability to make certain invoices not editable after closing period.
Description: The customer would like the ability to make invoices in their closing period uneditable so to avoid them going into conflict if a change were to be made.
Solution:
Small Task, simple customization.

However, it's important to remember that can a customer update 'custom' Method fields on a closed invoice?

This is also a great feature request.
Please submit asap.

Title: Ability to Track Opportunity Stage on the Contact
Description:
The customer would like to be able to track the Opportunity Stage on the contact level
- This information would then link over to related apps like Email Campaigns to help target certain contacts with different messaging based on the stage of the sale.
Solution:
This is certainly possible; however, it's important to understand the nature of Contacts and Opportunities.

A customer or contact, can have multiple opportunities.
So we would need to establish a business rule that updates the contact or customer with the current opportunity status. 

If a customer has multiple opportunities, which stage should they be set to for example.
Certainly possible; scope would need to be reviewed in detail to better understand how information should be handled since there is a one to many relationship.

Title: Snapshots - The ability to customize snapshots on stock apps
Description:
The customer is looking to customize snapshots on the contacts app.
They wish to have snapshots that are more user specific, rather than company summaries.

In particular, the number of contacts by rep.
Solution:
This today cannot be customized; snapshots are technically managed by the app developer. 

There are other means to customize this information; however, snapshots, specifically are not customizable at this time.

Title: QBDT Sync - Add Support for To-do / To do / Todos
Description: Currently in QBDT, customers are able to manage their tasks as Todos. These Todo's are not linked to a customer but something they want to bring over and sync with the CRM.
Solution:
To Dos, are not something that can SYNC with Method Today from QBDT.

However, customers can export their To-Dos from Method and Import them as activities into the CRM.
The To-do table format is pretty simple, and can just be imported into Method as needed.

The estimated time, is based on the volume of to-dos and any processing or data massaging we need to do in the system.

Title: New Contact Improvement - Automatically Create an Opportunity when creating a Lead
Description: Creating a Lead and then an opportunity is a Multi-step process. Could we speed up the process on lead creation to automatically also create a lead. Most of our leads come ready to buy or ready for an estimate. So really this is a one step process.
Solution:
This is certainly possible.

1.) On the New Contact page, we could add a few fields that are required on the opportunity. 

2.) When the information is saved, we can create the Lead, Contact, and Opportunity all in a single go.

Title: Contacts App Improvement - Show Assigned To / Show Sales Rep by Default
Description:
It seems obvious that we should see the who the customer is assigned to on the contacts list. 

It's strange that I have to click into a company to see who is the person in charge of that account.
Solution:
Very Easy Customization.

DIY - Add Column to Grid HC Article.

Title: API Integration - Ships Go (Container Tracking Platform ShipsGo)
Description:
Customer is looking to create and track shipments on board cargo ships using the API.

They want to be able to send a 'Shipment' as well as retrieve updates about that Shipment on Purchase Orders.
Solution:
API Integrations are generally separated into two major parts:

1.) There is a GET request
2.) There is a POST request

Typically GETs, are just retrieving information from the API. This type of integration is generally pretty easy. 

Typically, POSTs, are a little more difficult since it requires you to push information into the database, and potentially return a link. 

In general, this API has a very flat structure.

Title: Transaction Template Improvement - Add the reference number and table name to the output file - Transaction Print Report
Description:
Customer would  like the template's name to be used as the invoice number.

For example: at the moment is says, downladable qbv2 and a lot of numbers.
(screenshot attached)

They are  looking for is the name of the document when its downloaded to be the invoice name.
They mentioned 'QuickBooks would keep the invoice number as the name of the document as when downloaded.'

Does this possible via customization?
Solution:
Yes, this is customizable and there is a help-centre article that takes you through the process:
https://help.method.me/en/articles/7061707-change-the-filename-of-a-transaction-print-report

Title: Tables & Fields Improvement - Multiple TagList field type support for a single table - Multiple Tags
Description:
Client has a taglist in Monday.com and is using an API to import information, the list in method only shows as a csv list. 
They have different fields that represent different information on Monday.com but they are demonstrated as tags.

Tags enable use to color code and make information about the record more flexible. 

However, we don't want these tags to be available everywhere. 
eg. a Multi-select field would help for this purpose as well
Solution:
Today a multi-select field or additional tag list field cannot be created on a table. Tables are just limited to a single TagList Field. 

Great request.

Title: Browser Support - Support Opera Browser
Description: The customer contacted us to inquire about the compatibility of Method CRM with the Opera Browser.
Solution: Method CRM is not currently compatible with the Opera Browser. The recommended browsers for a better experience are Chrome, Edge, and Safari.

Title: Items App Improvement - Items are known as Products & Services - Rename the Item App
Description:
Please rename “Items” to be “Products & Services”. This is equally important for QuickBooks online users since the inventory products and services there are now called “Products & Services” too. “Items” seems to be QuickBooks' old ways of collecting items - in newer QB editions they are called Products & Services.

Both Xero and QuickBooks have transitioned from calling Items 'Items' and have moved to 'Products and Services' for most verbage in QBO.
Solution: Some elements can be customized; however, ideally this is something that could be tackled more broadly by product.

Title: QBO Work Order Improvement - Ability to Have Discount carry over to Work Orders
Description:
My Customer would like the ability to have discount carry from the Estimate to the Work Order and then the Invoice.

Today discounts are captured on the footer of an estimate; however, when this estimate is converted to a work order.

The discount context is completely lost.
Solution:
This can certainly be customized by creating a custom field for discount on the work order then passing the discount along from the estimate to work order to invoice.

However, in a scenario where there are multiple work orders being created for an invoice. Some math might be required to calculate the updated subtotal per work order.

Title: App Ribbon Improvement - Opportunities App Improvement - Make 'Work Order' be available on the Side Panel of Opportunity
Description:
We have Work Orders that happens after tracking the project/opportunity for weeks or months before it comes to fruition. Right now there's no ability to see any Work Order linked to an Opportunity in Method, or the Opportunity linked to that Work order.

Another scenario are multiple properties-clients. They will give us a painting job for one of their homes/businesses and tell us another their other properties. We want to link this Work Order to the other opportunities as a reference point, but cannot do that in Method right now.
Solution:
Since the Opportunities app is a stock app this cannot be customized.
However, definitely a valuable addition to app ribbons and creating better interconnected applications.

A custom field could be used instead to indicate that a work order and case are linked; however, the app ribbon would be ideal.

Title: Last Viewed, Last Modified - Timestamps on all apps and records.
Description:
The ability for a screen to auto-stamp when a user has Viewed and Modified any contents on the mentioned screens, and to keep a running log.

Show: UserName and Date/Time stamp of when they last Viewed/Modified any content on screen. 
Having a running list helps.
Solution:
Estimate here is 'per' app.
However, this can certainly be customized.

While not ideal customization to keep a running list of when a record was opened and edited is possible. 
Recording the changing is likely not possible at this time, but opens and modification time stamps can certainly be created. 

Alternatively the audit trail is always a good resource to educate customers on.

Title: Validation Improvement - The ability to validate websites as valid
Description:
Today we are not able to validate URLs. 

Because of this, Users are able to create Contacts that hold a website that is not a valid URL which then causes Sync Conflicts.

If we had the ability to validate URLS, we then could add this validation to the New Contact and Edit Contact’s Website field to help reduce these Sync Conflicts in customer’s accounts.

This is an issue because, the QB API / SDK, does validate the website data we send; however, they send us invalid data for these fields.
Solution: Ideally, we could customize rules around periods and must start with; however, it's best we address this at the platform level.

Title: Contacts App Improvement - Provide more granular preferences or permissions based on Entity Type
Description:
The contacts app is a mishmash of a lot of data.
Admins in particular would love to get more granular to restrict access based on Entity Type.

For example, If I don’t have access to vendors, I shouldn’t be able to create a new vendor? Logical right?

We can sometimes solve this with permissions
Also customizing the new contact page and contact list views.
Last but not least on View Contact Load.

Today all of this needs to be tediously customized. 

The ability to restrict what people can see or do on contacts:
Vendors
Employees
Customers 
Customer Leads
Solution:
This can be customized depending on the users needs. The estimate here could be 10 minutes to 3 hours. It really depends on the scale of the implementation. 

Steps to customize:
1.) If the restriction is global then this customization is simple as we can just hide options across all screens.
(This could be a very small customization)

2.) If the restriction is not global, then
a.) Create a few additional fields for each entity type on the user table
b.) On screen load, check their access to entity types
c.) Save that list of values to a object on screen and then use that to filter.

For example if Nelson only has access to Customers & Customer Leads, Save this as a permission, on load create a comma separated list. Then filter grids & dropdowns based on these two options.

On the new contact screen, we would need to devise a series of radio buttons that will basically reflect all the options available to that user.

Title: Improve Mailchimp Integration / Export Experience - Mailchimp Error Message
Description:
The customer would like to have a message to let them know if there any duplicates when sending contacts from Method to Mailchimp. Currently, there is no way to tell if they were rejected or skipped over.

Ideally I would love a similar experience to the Import process where we provide an export of:
1.) Contacts that didn't have emails
2.) Contacts that were unsubscribed in Mailchimp so couldn't be added to audience
3.) Email was already in the Audience
4.) Email have syntax errors
5.) Emails were either invalid or role-based (addresses assigned to a role as opposed to a person, for example: info@email.com, noreply@email.com, webmaster@email.com, etc)


Ideally an list of contacts, with the reason they weren't imported would be amazing.
A grid view or export would be great. 


Keywords:
Mailchimp Integration
Mailchimp Contacts
Send Mailchimp Contacts to Mailchimp
Solution: Cannot be customized today.

Title: Transaction Email Improvement - Show the Invoice or Estimate content in the email - HTML Transaction Template
Description:
The customer is looking for an HTML version of the Estimate and Invoices. 
Ideally, they want the customer to open the email and see exactly everything they need.

No Portal requirement
No attachment. 

Just a straight summary on the email of the invoice or estimate. 

Keywords:
Show Items on Emails
Item Email
Estimate with Items
Invoice with Items
Transaction Emails
Solution:
This is very customizable.
Creating these HTML Transaction Templates can be complicated:

1.) You first need to setup the table html
2.) Loop through Items and insert TR records
3.) Then close the table
4.) Send email.

Testing these transaction emails is also very important since email formatting is difficult.

Title: Calendar Improvement - Better Filtering - More Filtering Options on the UI for Invoice Status
Description:
As a dispatcher, Joel currently had 8-10 work orders scheduled a day. 

His calendar is not only his place to see where people are on a certain day, but he also uses it to track open work orders and work orders that have not been invoiced.

Joel is looking for a way to filter the calendar for all work orders that:

1.) Have not been invoiced yet (InvoiceStatus = To be invoiced)
2.) or Work orders flagged as (Invoice Status = Do not invoice & Status <> Completed)

This allows him to visually keep track of all work that is currently pending.
Solution:
This is a quite simple customization; however, there is not ability to toggle these filters on an off easily.

In theory we can just add 2 additional filters to the calendar:

Group - Any 
1.) Invoice Status = To be Invoices

Group - All
2a.) Invoice Status = Do not Invoice
2b.) Status <> Completed

Title: Improve Opportunity Import - Improve Activity Import - Improve Cases Import
Description:
Today Importing CRM Data is just incredibly difficult and and almost impossible unless you're excel savvy. 

You need 2-3 imports & exports at a minimum to process the data and link all the appropriate fields. Doing it wrong 2-3x before getting it right or getting frustrated as an end user.

Specifically when Importing Opportunities for Leads. It's very difficult. 
I am required to Import the Leads.
Export the Contacts associated with those Leads.
Look up those Contact RecordIDs update the Opportunity
Then import the opportunities

Keywords:
Solution:
Importing is challenging always.

Depending on the size of the leads list or how often the user is importing leads & opportunities together, we can certainly customize the flow to provide a better experience:

1.) We can create a template that covers all the essential fields for both Leads and Opportunties. 
2.) Using this template we can create a custom table the user can import to
3.) Then using this custom table, we can design a button that

a.) Looks for an existing customer or lead using the information provide
b.) If one is not found we can create that lead and get the contact id
c.) If one is found we can just retrieve that id
d.) Then we can insert the opportunity and link it to the customer & contact

While this is an expensive option, it really does away with all the confusion, multiple imports and exports associated with this type of import.

Title: Ability to exclude Non-donation Items
Description:
Customer is an organization that accepts donations + sells items, often in the same sales receipt, Donations + Candles for Example. 

The current donation receipt and thank you letter shows the total amount on the sales receipt. preferrably, the candles should be excluded from the total. 

Can we customize the Thank you letter, specifically replacing the SalesReceipt.TotalAmount field which currently includes both Non-donation and donation items?
Solution:
This can be customized; however, it's important that this level of customization is something that would only be available via Method as the original transaction and it's state likely wouldn't change in the system or QuickBooks:

1.) Create a linked field to the item on the sales receipt to determine if it's a donation item
2.) Then we filter out all items on the non-donation receipt
3.) Using this, we also calculate the total for all 'Donation Items'
4.) Save this information to the Transaction as a 'Donation Total' field

On the thank you letter we would then show only the donation total & the donation items. 

--------------

To achieve this without customization just create a  seperate sales receipt for non-donation items vs. donation items.

Alternatively another customization could be to split the sales reciept up and automate this task with a simple click.

1.) Create a button called split receipt
2.) If the receipt contains both donation and non-donation then create a new transaction and delete one of the entries

Title: Method Product Improvement - Integrate CSM's calendar within Method Account
Description:
Right now the user only has a choice to talk to a Support agent. However, the nature of there questions are not always support related. 

As we get a lot of calls where users want to get in touch with their CSM regarding XYZ issues, I think it would be convenient for them if they have the calendar's link somewhere within the Method Account or they know that he/she is the dedicated CSM for their account and they can get in touch with them by booking a time on the calendar. 

Where it should say get in touch or book a time with your CSM using this button.
Solution:
Great request, could you help me understand the type of issues a CSM would get that a CSR couldn't answer or help the customer with?

In theory if a CSR could do what a CSM did, is this something we still need?

Title: Donor App Improvement - Donation App Improvement
Description:
Customer is looking for a way to create donation statement and summaries. \
They currently use QBooks deposit transactions for taking in donations. 

Can Method be customized to track QBooks deposits as donations?
Solution:
Currently this cannot be customized since we do not support sync with Deposit Transaction.
However, if we did, we could certainly design a donor flow that support Deposits vs. Sales Receipts which our current flow does.

I've listed this one as a Donor app improvement.
I've also added another feature request to support syncing with the Desposit Transaction type.

Title: Provide the user with a confirmation on save - Improve user feedback when saving - Show message on save
Description:
Customer was wondering if it was possible to customize an alert when clicking a save button, specifically our Sent email app and Items app. 

Unlike in account settings, save buttons in most apps do not trigger any feedback. 

Can we customize an alert on the screen? ideally with the same experience as changing account settings
Solution:
This is certainly something we can customize with one of two routes:

1.) On Save Show a message
2.) On Save we could also update and show Last Modified On or By.

Title: The ability to open records on a new tab - Open Screens in Method in New Tab
Description:
My Customer would love the ability to be given the option to open a screen in new tab without navigating to it.

The reason being is that they'd like to open up a record to view later while going through a list of records.

Also as a side note, they find it weird that they can open up the sync conflict as a new tab with navigating to the record, but couldn't do that on other screens/grids
Solution:
This is certainly customizable and quite simple:

1.) Generate a URL for every records (eg. Contact Record)
2.) On row click, add a go to webpage action
3.) Pass the URL from step 1.

Tada, you're now able to open into a new tab. 
Keep in mind, on mobile, tablet, and the Method App. 

This functionality will not work as desired - so a custom grid should be used for 'Desktop' and All other applications.

Title: Method App for Zendesk - Zendesk App - Zendesk Sidebar
Description:
Customer wants to see if Method has an app for Zendesk like the gmail and outlook integration so we can see customer data on each Zendesk ticket.

Over here customer wants to display the customer activity of Zendesk customer. He does not want to use Zapier as it is a trigger and not a display of activity. Can we provide any customized solution for him?
Solution:
Zendesk and Method are indirect competitors. 
There is no Method app, that can be ended with Zendesk.

The customer would need to hire a ZenDesk Developer / developer to create a custom app using our API if they wish to leverage Method's information or data within Zendesk.

Title: Account Accessed Notification - User Login Notification - After Hours - User Tracking
Description: Customer is looking to have a feature, in which when any user login into the Method account after their office hours then the Admin should get a notification via an email.
Solution:
This can certainly be customized but it would need to revolve around the 'loading' of an 'App or screen'

Example; everytime the contacts list is loaded, check the user, the time, and then send an email to admin that a user has accessed the system. 

It's important to note, that a user could stay signed in, so tracking sign-in isn't necessarily the best path forward.
While this flow isn't perfect, it can help provide a notification to the admin on access / when a user is accessing.
Note from Product:
Sign in (arshi)

Internal for Arshi - Looks like would need office hrs settings to be able to implement this also not requested often. will dig deeper

Title: Proposals Improvement  - Capability to access PDF versions of sent proposals from the Proposal App
Description:
The customer is looking for the ability to download the PDF's of the proposals sent or signed by the customer from the Proposal App only, a button that says download PDF would be much better.

Users currently have to go to the portal link that was , then from here, they're able to download the PDF from the signature widget. 

The PDF provided by Method does not match the signed agreement the customer can download and save from the widget on the portal.
Solution:
This is actually quite simple.

All that's required is that if the proposal = signed, show the signature widget on the proposal screen.

From here the customer can see and download the same PDF the customer has access to from the Portal. 

Very simple customization.

Title: Improve Columns on the Mobile App Experience - Add QTY Column to Mobile Transactions
Description:
The customer is looking to show Quantity on Mobile view of transactions. 

At present, when multiple columns are added, they overlap. Furthermore, there is no option to horizontally scroll and view all columns.
(Video attached)
Solution:
Is it possible via customization to enable horizontal scrolling and resizing of the column width within the grid?Show less	This is certainly customizable but there is some trial and error.
Depending on the device we might do one of the following:

1.) Build an expression (See Help Centre on how expressions are created)
2.) We might switch the Grid to an Editable Grid, which would enable horizontal scrolling and better column support.

Title: The ability to calculate commission or a predefined percentage on a transaction line
Description:
The customer is running a small consulting agency and would like a way to apply a split for payment between the agency and the consultant delivering the service based on a predefined percentages. 
 For example, Consultant X will get 90% from what the agency invoices the client when delivering item Y ( a workshop for the sake of the argument). Ideally I would have a screen where I could select a pair of Consultant - Item and set a percentage. This percentage will be used to calculate what the agency should pay the consultant.
Solution:
In general this is just math, so the customization is quite simple:
However, where the complexity exists is when and how things are used:

1.) Create a preference associated with the consultant
2.) Then based off of that preference, any transaction they're associated with
3.) Calculated the total pay to consultant
4.) Then from there we have a simple system to calculate invoice splits.

The same would apply for commissions per line as well. 
1.) Create a preference associated with the item, this item always pays 5%
2.) Then based on the amount show the commission value.

Title: Estimate App Improvement - Signed Checkbox - Signed Status
Description: The customer would like to know the difference between Estimates that have been manually approved by their staff versus estimate who have been approved by the customer using the portal with the customer signature.
Solution:
Customizable.

1.) Create a checkbox on the estimate 'IsSigned'
2.) If the estimate has a signature associated with it
3.) Update 'IsSigned' to true

Show on the Estimate List.

Title: Contacts App Improvement - Email Portal Link from Contacts App
Description: The customer recommend it would be easier to either have a email button near the customer portal link on the contact Screen or should have it set up to send the customer portal link from the customer portal link itself.
Solution:
100% customizable and quite simple:

1.) Create an email template as a welcome to the portal
2.) Create a button on the view contact screen
3.) Send the email using the template while merging the URL in

Title: Time Tracking App Improvement - Rounding Up, Down, or Closest
Description:
I don't always want my time tracking entries to round up.
I would prefer that my time tracking entries are always rounded closest. 

So if the time is  25 minutes --- Round to 30. 
If the time is 18 minutes --- Round down to 15. 

Ideally, this would just be a preference on the account to keep my time tracking entries nice and round.
Solution:
This should be possible, however, we would need to investigate if there are any rules where roudning down / closest is not applicable. 

For example, if a time tracking entry is less than 15 minutes. 
Do we round to 0?

Does the minimum amount of time need to pass before this rule is in place?
Should be possible but there are additional questions we should ask as we scope.

Title: Global Search Improvement - Show Email
Description:
Today, it's very difficult to search based on customer email.

Searching by Email just doesn't provide us with enough information. 
Because these fields aren't visible on the search card, we don't know what the search is matching on or what fields are being matched.
Solution: Cannot be Customized

Title: Secondary Estimate Status Field to Indicate the Status of the Related Work Order
Description:
Estimates are great, and are usually the main point of visibility for a customer as to what's going on. 

However, the estimate status isn't enough when jobs may be delayed or are waiting to be scheduled.
Ideally, the customer would still use the estimate as a point of reference, but it would be great to see a status that reflects that actual status of the work that was estimated.
Solution:
This is Quite Simple:

1.) When an estimate is converted into a work order
2.) We create a link between both transactions
3.) The status of the work order can then be viewed on the Estimate
4.) Which could be shared on the portal.

Title: App Ribbon Improvement -  Estimates App - Show related Invoices, Sales Orders, and Work Orders
Description:
Request: On the App Ribbon, have the Invoices, Sales Orders, Work Orders that relate to the Estimate show

Use Case: This will make it easier for the Customer to go to the related transaction much more quickly and it will have the same layout and format as the Opportunities.
Solution:
This cannot be customized at this time.

Logically speaking these apps are connected and should allow for a connection.

Title: User Profile Improvement - Allow for Access to Mobile Phone Field for Customization
Description:
Ideally, it would be great to decouple user phone number from SMS activity notifications. 

The customer wants to store the phone number but this can only currently be done if notify by SMS is active.  Also to be able to retrieve the user phone to use in customization.

The field is also not accessible at the table level to help with customizations
Solution:
Hi Thomas,

Your assessment is correct, this field is both not accessible if SMS for activity notifications is not turned on.

It's also not accessible to customizers.

The solution today is to create a new field on the user table and store a phone number associated with the user.

Alternatively, if the user is linked to an entity, the phone number could be retrieved from the entity profile.

Title: Invoice Reporting Improvement - Show Invoice Trajectory - Report YTD Total vs. Last Year.
Description:
Customer would like to built a report comparing their customers year to date invoices against the previous year total.

This would allow them to visualize their target and potentially report on trajectory alongside.
Solution:
Certainly possible:

1.) Collect all invoices over the course of the year
2.) Divide by the number of days passed
3.) Multiply the result by the number of days in the year.

- Repeat the same for last year this time.

4.) Compare
5.) Show a trajectory to the end of the year.

Visually this might be challenging to create; however, certainly possible.
For charting etc. I would quote this up to 3-4 hours since, we would likely need a table to store this information and display it.

Title: Grid Improvement - Advanced Search Improvement - Do not cut off tags in Advanced Search
Description: Selected tags are cut off in the advanced search making it difficult to know what their selecting.
Solution: Cannot be customized.
Note from Product:
Michael - Sept 16-2024
This is fixed now via chips in editable grids. In late 2024/Early 2025, editable grids will replace read-only grids everywhere

Title: Ability to Rename Stock Apps - Estimate to Quotations
Description:

This change should flow from the App:

Into the Email Templates
Into the Print Templates
and Guest pages

Basically anywhere where this is a reference to the work Estimate in this example.

Cannot be customized; however, most screen titles and pdfs can be updated.

The actual title on the app, cannot.

Title: Time Bucket - Time Retainer - Prepaid Invoice Hours - Professional Services Time Tracking
Description:
1. Need to track the time bucket customers have purchased and deduct the time based on usage accordingly.
2. Display remaining time for the period purchased (month, quarterly, yearly) package.
Solution:
This is certainly customizable and how we manage dedicated consulting options here are Method:

1.) Create the invoice for the prepaid quantity of time or money
2.) From this invoice, once paid, calculate the total number of hours and insert it into at TimeBucket Table
3.) Using time tracking entries, we should be able to write negative entries into the time bucket table
4.) As you subtract, you can surface up total time remaining / used on the screen.

This is quite a simple customization; however, the devil is in the details.

Title: Payments App Improvement - Show the Invoices listed on the Payment in the Header
Description:
The customer would like to have a column on the payments list screen that displays the invoice number associated with payment.
Use case: I need to be able to show more than one since a payment could cover multiple invoices.
Solution:
This is certainly customizable, we've actually implemented something similar for our Method Account

1.) You can create a table on the main payment list to just show the ReceivePaymentAppliedtoTxn Table
2.) This will provide a list of each individual sub payment, TransationID here is just a recordID text field which isn't great.
3.) Create a field called 'InvoiceRecordID'
4.) Loop through the payment transaction table and update this new field where transaction type = Invoice
5.) Using this dropdown you can potentially link in invoice and payment information together and show it on the list.

Title: Improve Opportunity Contacts Dropdown
Description:
You must select a 'Contact' in order to save an opportunity right now.

You cannot find a/the record (based on EntityName/CompanyName) if the account is empty of 'FirstName'. You might know the account you want to link the Opportunity to, but if there is no FirstName inputted, the search will yield no result.

REQUEST: Improve search on the Opportunity screen to search by Contacts and Company/Entity Names.
Solution: This is certainly customizable but we should improve the dropdown to support searching on both Customers and Company Name.

Title: Work Order Improvement - Updating Future occurrences using the last on time occurrence - Changing all future occurrences based on the last work
Description:
Customer is in the HVAC service industry and is utilizing work orders for recurring maintenance. 

On occasion, the field crew would identify a service change (new equipment Etc) and they would like the ability to update all future recurring work orders with the new service.
Solution:
I believe this customization should be possible 

When a work order is completed, we could ask the user, do you want to update the series work order.
- This would this find the parent work order and update it.
- Future work orders could then bring the updates items in when they're opened in the Work Order App.

Title: Sub-Customer Flow - Select a Existing Contact when Creating a new Sub-customer
Description:
Customers utilise Jobs/Sub-customers heavily and create a high volume of sub-customers from Method.

Can we customize a roster of additional contacts (linked with the parent) once they choose a customer in the Job-Sub-customer field when create a new contact?

They would ideally like to choose from the current roster of additional contacts associated with the parent customer and effortlessly create them as additional contacts associated with the sub-customer.
Solution:
Yes,

This is customizable the way I'd structure it:

1.) Build all contacts on the main parent
2.) When creating a sub customer, choose from the list of contacts and assign them to the sub job. 
3.) Save that information into the file and keeping track of the primary contact for that job.

Title: Xero Sync Status - Provide a more helpful message to users or MethodSupport on the status of the sync
Description:

I would love to know:

# of Pending Contacts
# of Pending Transactions 

Information what would help inform us how much 'time' it's going to take to get the account up the par.

Right now it's a bit of a guessing game especially for older Xero accounts, who may have hundreds of records.

Title: Portal Improvement - Eye Dropper to adjust Brand or Colors of the Portal
Description:
Our user was setting up the customer portal and added a logo. 

They wanted to pick a brand colour (color) and spent a significant time trying to match the colour with their logo.

The ability to use a colour picker to grab the colour code of the company logo directly would greatly enhance this process for the many business that do not know their colour code off-hand.

Title: Portal Improvement - Contacts App Improvement - Be able to test drive the portal from the Contacts page
Description:

Then you're finally able to view the portal from the contact lense. 

Creating a test link right from the contact page would just simplify this entire experience and get customers to realize the value of the portal faster.

Title: API Integration - Angie's List - Automatically bring over leads to the CRM
Description: Customer is looking for an automated way to bring over Angie's list leads into the CRM.

I don't see Zapier or any publicly available API for Angie's list. 
Will mark this as cannot be customized for now.

Title: Ability to create new items from the estimate app
Description:
User sells custom pallets and would like the ability for their sales reps to create items directly from the estimate app. 

This would streamline the estimating workflow from a sales perspective and also protect some of the sensitive data housed in the items app.
Solution:
Certainly possible

1.) On the estimate page, we could potentially create an area where a new item could be created with the appropriate required information

2.) On save create the item and make it available for use on the transaction. 

Keep in mind, each item type may require a slightly different workflow. 
But certainly possible.

Title: Ability to change the From Email before sending
Description: User would like a way to change the 'From Email' with a dropdown field to better control which emails the estimate/invoices are sent from.
Solution:
Yes, possible

1.) We can create an email template that the user can pick from and change from email.
2.) Then use that email template to mail and inherit the from email and all the information including text and branding from that email.

Title: Tags - Carry Over Tags from Activity to Activity when creating a followup
Description: Our user would like customize a way for Tags to carry over to the next activity when creating a follow-up.
Solution:
Simple customization.

1.) On the insert of the Follow-up Activity

Title: Editable Grid - Allow for Expressions on Dropdowns
Description:
Request: Allowing for expressions to be made in the dropdowns for Editable Grids

Reason: On the EstimateLineDataTable on the New/Edit Estimate screen, the item dropdown has the Item Name and the Sales Description; however if we want to add more fields, there's no way to create an expression to add a prefix to the fields like you can for regular grids.

For example; in QBDT, it works with costs and markup so the Purchase Cost is usually entered into the cost, and the Sales Price is shown as the Amount. If I have an item with Sales Price of $10 but a Purchase Cost of $2. If I wanted to show the Sales Price to show what the amount would be if I entered it, I have to actually enter it. If I show it as a column, users may find it confusing wondering what that decimal value is.

Title: QBO to Xero Migration - Customers are moving from QBO to Xero
Description: They would like to move over data, key customizations, and make sure the workflows are working correctly.

Volume of data is always a factor. 
Migrations could take 10-50 hours depending on the size. 

Screens also across accounting versions can not be easily copied as they have different accounting needs. 

Consultants should be involved to understand the scope of work and provide a personalized recommendation. At this time we do not have a support tool to help remap data to Xero.

Title: Ability to Update Work order Start time from Field Crew
Description:
Our user's field services workflows are more on a week-to-week basis and they have many recurring maintenance calls that can easily be pushed 3-4 days down the calendar.

They are wondering if the Technician can update the starting time of the work order from the field crew app, ideally, having the start job button update the Workorder date.

This would would mesh with their batch invoicing workflow where the invoice will track exactly what date a service was rendered.
Solution:
Super small and possible.

<2 minutes to customize.

Title: Group Items for QBO
Description: The customer would like to know if there is another alternative to adding group items in Method. They know they can add bundle items in QBO but want to be able to do it in Method.
Solution:
We can certainly customize something that lives in Method only. 

That can group items and display them as a single item or multiple items.
Basically, we can allow the customer to pick choose, create and modify groups as they need.

This would be based on 'QuickBooks Items' but we would structure the templates & estimates to format their specific needs when it comes to grouping.

Title: Ability to compare the customized screen versions
Description: Customer wants the feature where they can compare two different versions of a screen and note the differences, as they are learning to do customization and they cannot remember all the changes they have made, so this feature will help them to compare the changes they have made on other screen versions.

Love this request, no real option today.

The customer could use the internal version notes on a screen to log their changes and compare what was done.

Title: Work Order Routing - The ability to route from the furthest customer to the HQ
Description:
The customer wants to minimize the amount of stoppage time and travel time with a full load.  For them, it's easier to commute a longer distance in the morning and work their way back to the HQ with a heavy load. So they wish to travel as much as possible with a 'Light Truck Load' minimizing the amount of time with a 'Full Truck Load'

They wish to start the route with the furthest customer and then work backwards back to HQ. There is the ability to set a start and end address. 

However, there is nothing in the routing ability itself to route work orders in a specific way besides the current Optimize Route function.
Solution: At this time this cannot be customized.

Title: Volunteer Management
Description: Volunteer management encompasses all of the steps a nonprofit takes to recruit, track, engage, and retain volunteers. Through effective volunteer management, your organization can build a more strategic, positive volunteer experience and cultivate long-term, mutually beneficial supporter relationships.
Solution:
Likely, we can repurpose leads to track volunteers.

1.) Create a new sub-classification of Lead called Volunteer
2.) Track the volunteer as a lead but filter the information based on the lead type
3.) Also we can take the traditional lead function and make it a Donor Lead

So basically leads will include both Donor Leads and Volunteers.
Then at the app level we can separate them using view filters.

Title: Ability to print PDF Reports for Transactions - PDF reports for Estimates, Invoices, Sales Orders
Description:
Similar to the Printable PDF reports for Opportunities and Activities, can printable PDF reports be added to the Estimate and invoice Apps

Print PDF Report for Transactions
Solution:
Customization of this per app is certainly possible:

3.) Customer should expect 3-4 hours per app. 

The more filters / pdf variations will likely increase the scope and total time per app.

Title: Ability for Partner Company to submit leads from the portal
Description:

They would like to have the ability to load documents and and potentially add a previous history note that would carry into the opportunities app to better initiate the sales process.

Certainly possible, we have a similar process for our partners where they can specify leads.

Include notes, and essentially let us know what we need to do to help clore the opportunity.

Title: QBDT  - Ability to sync contacts beyond main contact
Description: The customer is looking to have the ability to sync additional contacts to QuickBooks.
Solution: Cannot be customized at this time.

Title: Redirect to the Insights Dashboard instead of the Apps when logging in
Description:
My Customer wants to have the ability to control where a user goes when they login into Method. They want them to be redirected the specific dashboard. The reason being is that the apps page is overwhelming and not very user friendly even with the ability to rearrange, hide and color the apps. 

This can also be achieved with Bookmark to Method, but that isn't the greatest as we are asking our user to think outside our platform for a feature that they want in our platform.

Title: Editable grids to have the total of all records in the view as well as the ones on the screen.
Description:
My customer wants see the total for all the records currently filtered on an editable grid instead of the records that are current visible. The reason being because an editable can get extremely long and to fix the issue of scrolling down a long page, we can limit the records shown to 5, 10 etc, but then the total at the bottom of the editable grid is inaccurate.

The current solution is to either keep the editable grid displaying all records and scroll a long time to see the total or to create a custom text box that gets updated each time the grid is saved.

Loop through Grid

- Show the total on the screen.

Title: Calendar Support for Transactions - Sales Order Calendar
Description: i'm looking to see if we can have an active calendar of the ship dates on sales orders.

Title: Payment Gateway Addition - Support for Melio

Title: Opportunity App Improvement - Automatically update Opportunity when a linked Estimate is Created or Approved

Title: Customer Payment Preference - Selecting whether a customer can pay on the portal or not
Description:
Currently, when we enable payments basically any customer can make a payment with any payment Method.

We can choose whether to allow ACH or Credit Cards in 'Bulk' but we cannot define this at an individual level. 

Ideally, I would like to be able to set acceptable payment method for customers:
eg. Credit Card Customers ( Can pay via CC, ACH, or Manually via Wire or Cheque)
eg. ACH Customers (Cannot pay via CC, but can pay via ACH Only or Manually)
eg. Manual Cheque on (Cannot pay via CC or ACH) they just send us manual payments

Based on this preferences update the Guest - Payment screen to show and process using the appropriate options available to the specific contact.

Title: Ability for Customer Type to create Tags
Description:
User is tracking wholesale and retail via the customer type field, can we customize a way to create a tag to match the customer type?

Can this process be reversed where adding a Wholesale Tag could automatically update the customer type field?

Title: Better workflow for searching Contacts or Data a User does not have access to

Nelson does not have access to Shane's Records.

1.) I Would be able to see the existing record and who it's assigned to
2.) If that's not possible, it would be great to send a request to the admin with a reason why they need access to this record.

This can certainly be customized.

Title: Email Template Discoverty - Make Email Templates Easier to Access - Make Email Templates Easier to Find or Manage
Description:
Allow access to email templates in the account settings screen, potentially links elsewhere? 

Currently only accessible through the dashboard and many of my customers do not intuitively see this.

Called email templates, copy the email template list screen into that app and redirect the 'Edit' to the Send Email >> Edit Template flow.

Title: Map Widget Improvement - Data Point Click - Allow for Actions on the Mapping Widget

Request: Having a Data Point click like on the Chart Widget would be beneficial to show data that relate to the location we're looking at.

Title: Improve Stock SMS Flows - Work Order SMS -  Use Mobile / Phone fields to send SMS

For now customer has entered all their Customer's   contact numbers as “phone” not “mobile” therefore they are not able to send an SMS until they add the contact number in Mobile field. 

Can there be a workflow where the contact number can be pulled from the either of the fields? If one field is empty then the value can be pulled from the another field?

This is certainly customizable.

or

Title: Ability to create items directly on transactions - Create Item on Estimate - Create Item on Invoice
Description: Customer would like ability to add items directly from the Estimate/Invoice App without have to jump over to the Items app.
Solution:

Title: Date Time Action Improvement - Support for UNIX Timestamp or Unix Date
Description:
A number of APIs required input / output of date & time variables in UNIX format.

See: https://www.unixtimestamp.com/

What is the unix time stamp?
The unix time stamp is a way to track time as a running total of seconds. This count starts at the Unix Epoch on January 1st, 1970 at UTC. Therefore, the unix time stamp is merely the number of seconds between a particular date and the Unix Epoch. It should also be pointed out (thanks to the comments from visitors to this site) that this point in time technically does not change no matter where you are located on the globe. This is very useful to computer systems for tracking and sorting dated information in dynamic and distributed applications both online and client side.

What happens on January 19, 2038?
On this date the Unix Time Stamp will cease to work due to a 32-bit overflow. Before this moment millions of applications will need to either adopt a new convention for time stamps or be migrated to 64-bit systems which will buy the time stamp a 'bit' more time.


In order to better leverage the Call Web Service action for some APIs, app developers need access to convert to this time format without an intermediate service!
Solution:
1.) Use the Date Add function
2.) Add seconds (This is the UNIX Timestamp) 
3.) Add it to Jan 1st, 1970

The output result should give you the timestamp date.

Title: Payment Processing Improvement - Support for Level 2 Card Data
Description:
Credit card processing methods fit into three levels: Level 1, Level 2 and Level 3. Each level is defined by the amount of information that is required or passed to complete a payment with Level 1 having the lowest requirements and potentially the highest costs.

Level 2 and Level 3 card data (also known as Level II and Level III) is a set of additional information that can be passed during a credit card transaction. Level 2 and Level 3 card data provides more information for business, commercial, corporate, purchasing, and government cardholders.
Credit card transactions submitted with Level 2 and Level 3 card data can obtain lower interchange rates and provide merchants with a lower processing cost. Therefore, it is in the best interest of merchants to submit Level 2 and Level 3 card data whenever possible.
Each card type that supports Level 2 maintains its own standards for the additional field information that is accepted. Potential fields include:
Purchase Order number
Destination Zip
Tax Indicator
Tax Amount
Requestor Name
Destination Address
Destination City
Destination State
VAT ID
Solution:
This cannot be customized or enabled today.

Some payment gateways allow for AVS but AVS is different. 
It's actually a 'cost' to the user, to 'verify' the address information provided. 

Level 2 Card Data vs. AVS are not the same and serve different purposes.

Title: API Integration - Gong - Gong.AI - Call Quality AI Tool
Description:
The customer is currently looking at using Gong.ai for sales calls and sales call monitoring.

Core Features:
Call Recording and Transcription:

Gong records sales calls across different communication platforms (phone, video conferencing, etc.) and transcribes them into text. This allows sales managers and reps to review conversations in detail.
Conversation Analysis:

Using AI, Gong analyzes recorded calls to identify patterns, key phrases, sentiment, and trends. It can detect topics discussed, questions asked, objections raised, and even the tone of the conversation.
Deal Intelligence:

Gong tracks ongoing deals by analyzing interactions with customers. It provides insights into which deals are likely to close, which might be at risk, and what steps can be taken to improve outcomes.
Coaching and Feedback:

Sales managers can use Gong to provide feedback to their reps based on actual conversations. The platform highlights areas where a rep might improve, such as objection handling, product knowledge, or closing techniques.
Integration with CRM:

Gong integrates with popular CRM systems (like Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.), automatically logging call data and insights into the CRM. This reduces manual data entry and ensures that CRM records are up-to-date.
Solution:
An integration with Gong today may be complicated and will require the direct assistance and support of a dedicated consultant. 

The levels of integration can vary; and therefore it's difficult to provide an estimate on specific needs; for example, do we need transcripts to live in Method? When do they move? What information is coming into the CRM? What information is moving to Gong?

These types of flows will need to be scoped to better assess customer needs.

Title: Purchase History Enhancement - Frequency
Description: User would like to enhance their QBooks transactions history and determine a purchase frequency field to work alongside the Purchase History catalog to identify customers who are overdue for a purchase.
Solution:
Frequency calculations are possible; however it is pretty complex and unique to the customer.

For example, calculating the frequency over the customer lifetime, you would need to calculate the number of days between the first and the second order and save the days on the second order as 'days since last order'.

This would likely require a loop through all the invoice records, calculation and then an average.

That said, when calculating frequency, we often recommend potentially looking at the last 5 or 10 orders. This is important because more recent data is likely more relevant that historical data in some cases.

eg. If the work order is assigned to 'x' rep, and the time entered is on 'y' day for 'z' customer. Connect the two together (relate them) other if these three pieces of information all match.

Title: Runsheet App - To do list - Tracking a Production Schedule - Project Tracker
Description:
Feature Request: Bi-Monthly Periodical Distribution Runsheet
Feature Name:
Bi-Monthly Periodical Distribution Runsheet

Feature Description:
The requested feature is a detailed runsheet template to streamline the process of distributing periodicals on a bi-monthly basis. This feature would provide structured phases and tasks to ensure content is finalized, printed, and distributed on time. Each task should be assigned to a specific team or individual, with deadlines to track the progress.

User Stories:
As a Content Manager, I want a clear timeline to finalize articles and images so that they are ready for publication by the distribution date.
As a Designer, I need deadlines for design and layout tasks to ensure the magazine is visually appealing and ready for print.
As a Distribution Manager, I need a task list to manage delivery and shipping logistics so the periodicals reach subscribers on time.
As a Marketing Manager, I need to ensure all advertisements and promotional content are placed in the periodicals by the deadline.
Acceptance Criteria:
Pre-Distribution Phase (2-4 Weeks Before Distribution)

Tasks:
Content Finalization: Include deadline for finalizing articles, images, ads, and other content.
Design and Layout: Include deadline for layout and formatting tasks to be completed by the design team.
Production Phase (1-2 Weeks Before Distribution)

Tasks:
Final Proofing: Include deadlines for final content proofing, revisions, and approvals.
Printing: Deadline for sending the periodical to print and proof of the physical copy.
Distribution Phase (1 Week Before Distribution)

Tasks:
Shipping and Delivery Setup: Ensure logistics are in place, including packaging, labeling, and coordinating with couriers.
Digital Distribution Setup: Ensure digital versions are uploaded and distributed via email or digital platforms.
Post-Distribution Phase

Tasks:
Subscriber Feedback Collection: Enable tracking of feedback from readers after distribution.
Performance Review: Review and analyze delivery timelines, subscriber response, and any issues in the process.
Additional Requirements:
The runsheet should allow custom deadlines and task assignments.
Automatic notifications and reminders for deadlines.
Integration with logistics and courier systems for tracking.
Digital distribution features to support e-magazine delivery.
Priority:
[Insert priority level]

Dependencies:
[Insert any dependencies with other teams or systems]

This feature request would make it easier to organize and execute the complex process of bi-monthly periodical distribution, while ensuring accountability and timely delivery.
Solution:
Customizing an app of this magnitude will require a few hours in addition to tracking key elements that may exist both inside the CRM such as invoices, activities, and work orders.

Title: Royalty App -  Royalties Management System
Description:
Problem Statement:
Producers in the entertainment industry often receive royalty payments based on complex contracts with platforms such as Netflix, Hulu, Spotify, and other distribution channels. Managing these payments manually or through multiple systems can be tedious, error-prone, and time-consuming. QuickBooks provides the payment records but lacks detailed tracking of royalties tied to specific contracts, titles, or distribution partners.

Proposed Solution:
Create a Royalties Management System within Method that:

Tracks Royalty Contracts:

Capture contract details such as royalty percentage, flat fees, distribution channels, regions, and payment schedules.
Link contracts to specific projects or titles for better organization.
Integrates with QuickBooks Payments:

Automatically sync royalty payments from QuickBooks, associating them with the respective contracts or projects.
Identify and flag discrepancies between expected and actual payments.
Royalty Reports and Forecasts:

Provide detailed reports showing payment history, outstanding royalties, and future projections based on streaming or distribution metrics.
Allow producers to break down earnings by title, platform, region, or time period.
Notification and Reminder System:

Notify producers of upcoming payment due dates or missed payments.
Send alerts when royalty payments deviate from contractual agreements.
Customizable Dashboards:

Offer dashboards for producers to monitor key royalty metrics, such as top-earning titles or platforms.
Workflow Automation:

Automate follow-ups with partners for late payments or discrepancies.
Trigger reminders for contract renewals or renegotiations.
Target Users:

Music Producers: Receiving royalties for songs or albums streamed on platforms like Spotify, Apple Music, and YouTube.
Film Producers: Managing royalties for movies and series distributed via Netflix, Hulu, Amazon Prime, etc.
Publishing Houses: Overseeing royalties for books, audiobooks, or scripts.
Benefits:

Centralized Management: Streamlines royalty tracking by consolidating contracts, payments, and reporting into one system.
Improved Accuracy: Eliminates manual errors and reduces time spent reconciling payments with contracts.
Actionable Insights: Helps producers understand their revenue streams better and make informed decisions.
Enhanced Productivity: Automates repetitive tasks and allows producers to focus on creative work.
Dependencies:

Integration with QuickBooks for syncing payments.
Support for contract customization to accommodate various royalty structures.
Ability to handle complex calculations, such as tiered royalties or time-based adjustments.
Solution: This can certainly be customized; however, due to the complexity and nature of this application and the inter-workings between contracts and payments from QuickBooks this is a relatively large project.

Title: Ability to Detach a Tenant from Multi-Tenancy
Description:
Question:
How can we simplify the process of detaching a tenant from a multi-tenancy setup while ensuring seamless continuity of their data and operations?

Summary:
Currently, the multi-tenancy feature in our platform allows separate data storage for each tenant while sharing the same software environment. Tenants can access main company data only if explicit permissions are granted. However, if a tenant decides to leave the multi-tenancy setup, the only current solution is for them to create a new account and reconnect their QuickBooks file manually. All tenant data is stored within the same database and segmented by design, but there is no straightforward process to detach a tenant and migrate them independently.

Use Case:
When a tenant leaves a multi-tenancy arrangement, they need an efficient way to transition to a standalone account.
This process should maintain their existing data, configurations, and connections without requiring extensive manual intervention.

Current Challenges:
No built-in feature exists to detach a tenant and migrate them to a standalone account.
The manual process is cumbersome and increases the risk of errors during the transition.
Users must reconnect QuickBooks and recreate configurations, leading to potential data loss or dissatisfaction.

Proposed Solution:
Develop a Tenant Detachment Tool within the platform that:
Exports all tenant-specific data and configurations from the multi-tenancy database.
Creates a new, standalone account for the tenant automatically.
Ensures QuickBooks and other integrations are preserved during the migration.
Maintains a record of the transition for auditing and support purposes.

Impact of the Feature:
Improves customer experience by simplifying the transition process.
Reduces the workload on support teams managing manual migrations.
Enhances the flexibility and scalability of the multi-tenancy feature.
Solution: This cannot be customized.
Note from Product: Multi Tenant (Arshi)

Provide the ability to format or truncate URLs for cleaner display if needed.
Maintain data security and ensure that URLs are only accessible to authorized users.

Impact:

Reduces the need for manual customization, providing an out-of-the-box solution for a common request.
Solution:
This is certainly customizable:

1.) Create a new field to store the URL
2.) On transaction / record save generate a portal URL and update the field for that record.

These tools often integrate with accounting software like QuickBooks to sync financial data and ensure compliance with regulatory deadlines. They also emphasize client-specific features like engagement tracking and document storage, tailored to the needs of accounting professionals. In contrast, traditional project management tools are more generalized, suitable for industries like construction or marketing, and may lack the nuanced functionalities required for accounting practices.

For example, Tax Filling Project
- Federally Annually Recurring Project

Title: Invoice Reporting Improvement - Profit by month
Description:
Customer is requesting a custom report/graph that mimics the Subtotal by month but for profit. 

They sell chemicals which means each item has an associated cost and they simply want a graphic report to show Profit on invoices as Subtotal - Cost
Solution:
This is quite a simple customization; however there are multiple parts to it.

First and foremost we need to calculate the profit per line item and store that information. 

Then we need to understand are their discounts applied to this transaction at all? If so how are those incorporated into the profit calculation.

Then lastly creating a screen that reports on profit using either a list screen that can be exported to csv or a chat.

Title: Import - Ability to upload line items via CSV to a transactions eg. Invoice or Estimate
Description:
Customer is using a industry specific quoting system for Audio Visual. 

They are wondering if we can customize a way to drop a CSV file and have it load into the Estimate/Invoice line item grid?
Solution:
Yes, this customization is possible; however, it's important to understand the complexities of an import.

When importing into transactions there are multiple tables that require updates. Let's take the example of an estimate.

1.) An Estimate is made up of both the Estimate Table (Header) Estimate Line Table (Line items or Detail)
2.) When importing into these tables it's important to know that line items must always be tied to a header
3.) Depending on the format of the csv, we would need to create a process that would create the header, and attach all the associated lines to it. 

At a high level, it would be best that all line items include:

1.) A unique field that indicated order number (This way we can determine what order the lines are all associated with)
2.) A date field
3.) A customer 
4.) An item
5.) A rate

From here, we can build a custom table to match the CSV and build a process that will iterate through the table by order and insert information into the Header and Line Table. 

That said this is a simplified workflow assuming the customer and Item data matches exactly what's available in QuickBooks.  If they do not, we would need to create a process to create new customers if an exact match is not found. 

For items, we could have a business rule to omit missing items or replaces with a generic 'Sales' item. 

Last but not least, the import table would need a way to determine that the record has already been imported (typically this is done by updating it with a 'recordID' which would operate as a reference to the insert. 

In a situation where the item names across systems cannot be matched, we would need to build a preference screen that would operate as a lookup table or dictionary to find the item that's being imported and correctly map it to the QuickBooks Item. 

In short, possible but can be complex.
