The customer confirms that the tool is for duplicate leads in the spreadsheet being imported, but it will still import the lead if it exists in Method. The teammate explains that selecting FullName under the Unique field will show an error and not allow the duplicate lead to be imported, but leaving it blank will add the duplicate lead as an additional contact. The customer plans to use the exported lead/customer list to clean up after the import.
Solution:
This is something that can be customized:

1.) Create a table that matches the sheet that the customer has
2.) Import the data into that custom table
3.) Loop through that table and use a retrieve value from table to determine if the email already exists.
4.) If the email exists, you can then either choose to warn the user, let them know of the duplicate, or skip it over and have them manually review after the process was completed. 

Ideally, this would be a import product improvement.

Title: Advanced Search - Grid Improvement - Separate Column Order and Field Order in Advanced Search
Description:
Allow advanced search to have its own editable sort order. 
Currently based on the column order. 

This can be confusing due to expressions and hidden fields. This also means that if a field is commonly searched it has to be on the left side of the screen in order to show at the top of the list.
Solution: Currently cannot be customized.
Note from Product:
Michael - Sept 16, 2024

The advanced chip should solve for this. The goal is to have 1 grid by late 2024/Early 2025

Title: Activity Reminder - Be able to provide a hyperlink to the contact instead of activity
Description: The customer would like the ability to go directly to the customer when getting an activity reminder, currently when getting the reminder in the email and clicking on the link is does not directly lead to the contact the activity is for.
Solution:
This cannot be customized at this time.

While you can change the screen the user is directed to in the automated reminders. The screen will try to load the activity recordID. 

Creating an error or showing the wrong contact.

Title: Portal Notification - The ability to be notified if customer changes their address in the portal
Description:
The customer would like to know if it is possible to be notified when a  customer changes their address in the portal.

Their use case:

Our industry requires that certain documentation be updated when a customer moves. Right now, if they go into the portal to pay and change their address while they're there, we don't get any sort of notification. Therefore, the account is out of compliance which can be a major issue.
Solution:
Certainly customizable.

On the Customer Portal Page 
1.) Open the Save Button
2.) Log an activity for before and after
3.) Send email & Log notification that the Customer Address has been updated.

Title: Improve Columns on the Mobile App Experience - Add more columns to Mobile
Description:
The customer is looking to resize the  Columns in items app.

At present, when multiple columns are added, they overlap. Furthermore, there is no option to horizontally scroll and view all columns.
(Video attached)

Is it possible via customization to enable horizontal scrolling and resizing of the column width within the grid?
Solution:
This is certainly customizable but there is some trial and error.
Depending on the device we might do one of the following:

1.) Build an expression (See Help Centre on how expressions are created)
2.) We might switch the Grid to an Editable Grid, which would enable horizontal scrolling and better column support.

Title: Ability to see the field limits on Text and HTML Boxes as you type
Description:
The customer would like the ability to see how many characters are in the description box when adding text to avoid going over the character limit.

In this case he was adding a description for an opportunity and got an error when trying to save as an error pop up stated he was above the character limit.

Would be useful to have a spot at the bottom or near the description box that shows how many characters are entered.
Solution: Cannot be customized.

Title: Zapier - The Ability to have a Trigger when a New Transaction is Added
Description:
In Zapier, you can create a zap which is triggered by Method. Here are the ways Method can trigger a zap:

* When a *New Contact* is added.
* When a *New Lead*, *Customer*, or *Vendor* is added.
* When a *New Activity* is added.
* When a N*ew Opportunity* is added.



It would be great to support major transactions like:
- When you create an Estimate
- When you create an Invoice
- When you create a Sales Order


The goal the customer is trying to achieve is anytime a sales order is created to send it to another 3rd party inventory system via Zapier.

As a work around we can explore customization to complete this task.
Solution: Cannot be customized at this time.

Title: The ability to send Method Users Notifications from outside of Method - Incoming Call Notifications
Description:
Is currently interested in sending notifications to his users while in the CRM when the main sales line gets a phone call.

This notifies the team that the line is currently receiving an incoming call.

Ideally he would like to show this on a screen but any solution that could notify the user that a phone call is coming is ideal.
Solution: Currently cannot be customized at this time.

Title: Audit Trail Improvement - Ability to see username who initiated merge of customers/leads
Description:
The customer was looking to get the user name who initiated the Merge. There is no user name displayed in the Audit trail. When a user initiates the Merge the Audit Trail displays two logs for now - One  for merge that shoes User- System, Source- QuickBooks, and another log for customer that gets deleted (that gets merged), it shows the name of the User that initially set up the Method Account (master admin name)

 In this scenario, the customer was claiming that an inactive user merged the customer. We explained to them inactive users cannot access the Method account. It would have been great if we had a log of who merged in Method to show them.
Audit Trail should display the User name who did the Merge in Method Account to keep track
Solution: Cannot be customized

Title: Contacts Improvement - Ability to have or link multiple customers for one contact
Description:
The customer would like to know if there is a way to display to one single contact and the companies they are linked to. I know for now we can have multiple contacts under one customer, customer would like a way to have multiple companies under one contact.
As some of their contacts have many businesses.

Customer request:

I was expecting the Contacts main view to show Contacts under the Contacts tab (unrelated to QB contacts) and Customers under the Companies tab, but Method shows Customers as both Contacts and Companies. I would like Method to treat Contacts so they don't sync to QB but can be associated to many Customers. In your example, yes I only want to see 1 Bob if he owns many companies, I would need to associate the activity to the Customer first, then related contacts like Bob should be available as the person to direct the activity to or from. Bob as a Contact would not have the existing 'Customer Details' section on the contact screen, as that info would need to be a Grid, which would show the list of associated Customers, Leads, or even other Contacts (to associate a spouse who doesn't own any of a company but it is important to know the info and relationship). In terms of the portal, each business should remain to have their own unique portal link, but a customer self serve option to join accounts to one log in and toggle back and forth between them would be cool. Each contact associated with a company should have a permission to access their associated companies portal link.
Solution: While there could be some solutions that could customize this. The scale of the project would be quite large as contacts & customers are integral to almost every app inside of Method.

Title: Support for Discount Items on Proposals
Description: The customer contacted us to inquire about applying discounts in proposals.
Solution:
This is something that can certainly be customized.

In theory, you only need to worry about the discount at the time of creating the invoice. The proposal doesn't sync with QuickBooks so we can certainly adjust the presentation to match whatever the customer wants.

At the time of invoicing it would appear as either a discount line or discount % in the transaction footer.

Title: API Integration with TextMagic
Description:
The customer would like the ability to integration with TextMagic.
Text magic allows them to send campaigns via sms, also if they have any duplicate contacts, TextMagic removes it for them automatically.

Can also schedule texts in advance , personalize texts with tags, and track delivery status.

Customer is looking to add contacts to text magic via Method. All SMS will be managed from TextMagic including campaigns.
Solution:
API Integrations are always complicated!

TextMagic, has a zapier integration.
The most common integration is when a new contact is created in Method trigger the zap to add a phone. 

More advanced API configuration and details are needed to increase the scope of this customization.

Title: Payment Processing Improvement - The ability to test payments - Test Payment Workflow
Description: As a new user, it's often intimidating to test a payment flow when I don't understand the workflow. As a user I would like to be able to have a 'test' version of the payment flow so I can test the credit card process and understand the end to end workflow.
Solution:
This is something that can be customized, in reality we can just skip over the credit card input stage. Although this isn't ideal. 

I think the customer would like to see how the credit card collection looks and how payment information can or will be saved for future use. 

Great feature request though no ideal solution.

Title: Xero Improvement - Reference to Customers should be Clients
Description:
Please rename “Customers” to be “Clients” so it’s more easily recognized by Xero customers.

During onboarding the concept of Customers is difficult to communicate to Xero users are generally the system is designed to use the word clients.
Solution: Some areas can be customized to support this; however, it's not ideal. If a customer was really adamant there are few areas that we can't customize (outside of App Names)

Title: Create a Method Only - Customer Type - Dropdown - Not Supported in the UK in QuickBooks
Description:
Customer is looking to import the customer type field in the customer table.
However, this customer is from UK and it is mentioned in the help center article that the Customer Type field is available for the US versions only. 
Can we build a solution for accounts that are not US versions to have a custom customer type field to use within Method?
I can see Customer type table shows up in their account under tables and fields but we cannot use that for import as it is not an option there. So creating a custom Customertype1 table will work?

Chat link:
https://app.intercom.com/a/inbox/a4b5qk7m/inbox/view/57922/conversation/18585500531477?view=List
Solution:
Yes, the customer can create a customer dropdown to store customer type and Manage that information in Method only.

Customer Type, should be treated like any other custom dropdown.
Should be a very easy and simple customization.

Title: Entity Table Improvement - Customer Table Improvement - Show Different levels of Subcustomers as fields
Description:
This customer currently has 3-4 levels of subcustomers.
As a customizer it's very difficult for me to determine the different sub-levels without customization.

Using conditions like 'Starts With' or 'Contains' is messy because it's never and exact match.
And I need to string together information to pull a record ID.

For example, to get the 2nd level of a 4th level subcustomer.
I must first, take the parent, find the first colon and take left.
Then i must take that output, find the last colon and take right.

Then i need to retrieve value from table using the Name to determine the record id of that sub.
It's confusing and necessary. 

Ideally, i would just love some additional fields to 'ParentFullname'
- Sublevel 0
- Sublevel 1
- Sublevel 2
- Sublevel 3
- Sublevel 4

So i can quickly just say where 

Entity = Nelson & where Sublevel0 = Nelson
- This will give me everything I need related to Nelson

Using Starts with or contacts above would also include other customer's like
Nelson's Meats

Which isn't what i want.
Solution: An App routine can be created to parse out all the levels of customers, and write them to custom fields as mentioned above.

Title: Calendar - Preference for the Start of Week Day - Calendar Format - Day Order - Weekly View
Description:
Using the Weekly View: Sunday - Saturday is currently the default view.
However, our customer is looking for  Monday - Sunday in the month view.
Solution:
This is a great request.

I can see the benefit of a Workdays View (Mon - Friday)
I could also see a benefit to hiding certain days of the week.

For example, a restaurant is always closed on Mondays, so let's make the Monday column small and disabled.
Still show it's there but since it's always going to be empty, let's minimize it from the Weekly View.

Title: Field Crew Improvement - The ability to pause time or track multiple time entries on Field Crew App
Description:
Currently there is no 'Pause' options on the Field Crew screen - this is much needed.

Multiple time tracking entries per work order or Pause button
Customer may be working on multiple jobs over the course of a day

For example visit one site in the morning then go back in the afternoon

they would like to log multiple time entries against the job
More simplistically, the crew needs to Pause to take lunch > Resume working after lunch break.
Sometimes they need to Pause to go get more materials and Resume when they return.

Keywords:
multiple time entries
Solution:
This is customizable, usually within 1-2 hours.

1.) Create the ability to store multiple time tracking entries per work order
2.) On Pause log an end time, and reset the screen to start
3.) On Start, insert a new time entry.
4.) Show a list of all time logged to this work order.
5.) This is handy especially if you have multiple people logging time against a work order as well.

Title: Advanced Routing Functionality and API Integration
Description:
What is the customer looking for?
- The customer is looking for Method CRM to do Advanced Routing capabilities

Why do they want it?
- They are using many different platforms and nothing is streamlined for them
- They have 8 technicians and they route 20jobs/tech/day in their peak season i.e. more than 160 jobs a day
- They would like better routing capability so they can filter the routes, and rearrange the jobs if it is assigned to the wrong technician so efficiency is there
- I have a nice 20 minute video which has each and every step of what they do. It is definitely worth the watch to understand everything much better

For their current software which they are using i.e. https://www.thexs.ca/xsmapping, they would like Method to:
- Update the pin location on Map if the date, location and technician is changed in Method
- They currently have to update in Method on Work Orders, Then on their exported excel file and then rerun the routing through 'xsmapping'

What software they are currently using?
- Method CRM and QBDT
- Excel files
- https://www.thexs.ca/xsmapping

Recorded video link: https://youtu.be/MjKl17qKFYA
Solution:
At this time routing for 160 across 8 techs at a single time is not possible. 
20 work orders / tech a day is possible; however, resorting jobs unfortunately is not a very simple task today.

Moving jobs and rerouting between technicians is also a challenge for us today since  we would need to identify the problematic work order.

Edit, re-assign, and re-route. 

Some great opportunities. Will update once the video is public or linked to this FR.

Title: Contacts App - Restrict Editing of QuickBooks Fields - Do not allow editing of fields that sync with QuickBooks
Description:
We love the integration with QuickBooks; however, the customer information including but not limited to address should not be edited as this information is used EXCLUSIVELY by our accounting team. 

Our sales team should be able to add contacts etc. but we do not want them to change any customer information that syncs with QuickBooks as they should only have read-only access to this information. 

Changes to this information should be requested via activities.
Solution:
This can be customized:

From View Contact, essentially restrict all Entity Editing and Primary or Alt Contact Editing. 

Ideally it would be great to just have a preference where on screen load, we could simply restrict editing of Fields labelled as QuickBooks fields but anything Method or Custom would be acceptable to edit.

Title: Single-Sign On For Outlook Gadget
Description: I was hoping the Microsoft credentials for Outlook would authenticate the Method credentials whenever the Outlook Gadget is opened. So, if I am signed in to Outlook, I would never have to sign into the Method Gadget.
Solution: This is now available in stock

Title: Using a Method Dropdown to Populate a QuickBooks Text Field
Description:
Customer uses Title fields often to manage their donors. 

They would like the ability to create a custom dropdown with a preset list of titles to choose from. 

Can this custom dropdown field be 'linked' to the stock Title fields for the purpose of syncing to QBooks?

Keywords:
InventorySite
Bin
Location
Title
Solution:
This is certainly customizable. There are two components:

1.) Create a new custom dropdown that abides to the field limit. eg. Title = 13 characters
2.) Once the field is created, on selection you can save that information in the Method Field and populate it on the QuickBooks field.

3.) Remember the same would need to happen backwards where the 'text' field from QuickBooks is updating the dropdown on load if there is a match.

Title: Import Improvement - Create Table - Creating a Table using the Import Function
Description:
Personally, one pet peeve I personally have about importing is that I have to create a table then map the fields etc. 

I would love the option to just create a new table straight from the import where the data is then imported directly into that new table. 

This helps me create a table, fields all in one go. 
Without having to create the table first and the field definition first.

This is especially helpful when importing data from different sources where we can just create a table that matches the table export and then process that information as needed.
Solution: This cannot be customized at this time.

Title: Proposals Improvement - Ability to resend same proposal when - accepted, rejected, or closed
Description:
Currently, if  customer wants to send proposal again, they will need to duplicate it to send it again. 

It would be great if we can have an option to resend proposal again from existing proposal. (This is useful in situations where a customer did not receive an email and needs to send it again.)

Keywords:
Accepted Proposal
Closed Proposal
Rejected Proposal
Solution:
This is super easy to customize. 
- Add a 'Resend Proposal' button into the button menu that calls the Send Action on the screen. 

That said 100% should be a product improvement.

Title: Calendar Improvement - The ability to Edit the Calendar Card or popup without customization
Description:
Customer is looking to switch the calendar view from showing the 'Contact Name' to 'Company Name' since they work with Companies as the contacts aren't as important. 

In addition the company information, is helpful for the techs and navigation.
Solution:
Very simple customization. 
There is help centre content that covers this customization and it's pretty straight forward.

Title: Method Subscription - Support for Pro-rated billing (Inactive Users, Partial Months, Sandbox Accounts)
Description:
When an account is cancelled, the account completely locks out users.
When a user is removed, their access is removed immediately.

Ideally, we would let the users access until their 'Cancellation Date' alternatively, we should pro-rate their billing to line up with their aforementioned access.
Solution: Cannot be customized.

Title: Shuttle Improvement - Payment Gateway Improvement - Inform customers what method of payments a gateway support
Description: Allow the system to let the client know if the selected payment gateway will allow them to receive ACH and CC payments since some clients select a payment gateway (PayPal), start the implementation process and, when they start receiving payments, They notice that they do not have the ACH option.
Solution: Cannot be customized.

Title: Set a Default Location based on Customer
Description:
QBO has a Location Field on Transactions.

At this time, this is a field that is commonly re-purposed to track sales reps.
However, there is no link to customer so it must be manually filled it.

Would it be possible to store 'Location' at the customer level, that would default or fill in when creating a transaction.
Solution:
This can be customized; however, Method provides an out of the box solution for this:

AssignedTo.

Under most conditions, we should always advise people to use assigned to:
1.) Assigned To is already rolled into every workflow (No customization Required)
2.) Assigned To also leverages Method's permission model (you can control what information people see)
3.) Notifications, All notifications across the system are always tied to Assigned To. Therefore, any and all critical workflows are always connected to the sales rep of the account. 

Steps to Customization:
1.) Add location field to entity 
2.) On the transactions retrieve value from customer and update Invoice and Estimate.

Title: Items App Improvement - Add Item Preferences Screen
Description:
Item defaults could be leveraged for COGS Account, Tax Code, Income Account, Asset Account. Quantity (Art dealer) and probably more I haven't thought of for niche business models.

I am using this to store API Defaults for Item APIs for SOS inventory . I can customize a Preferences screen but cannot update the dashboard tile to show this screen as a preference screen so it has to be accessed within the Item List Screen and creates a inconsistent user experience.
Solution:
This is a great request.

In theory, you can use the internal copy tool to copy the preferences screen from one app to items. 

This will help with all the base formatting, since the base table on the screen is the same. You should be able to add your new preferences and get the ball rolling.

Title: API Integration - Integration with NetSuite
Description: The customer would like the ability to integrate with Netsuite. They will be merging with another company who uses Netsuite and would like to keep using Method along with it.
Solution:
Netsuite does offer a number of APIs; however, the extent of the integration will need to be scoped. 

Due to the nature of both systems and their respective impact on different accounting platforms this is a sizeable project. 

https://docs.oracle.com/en/cloud/saas/netsuite/ns-online-help/section_157373386674.html#The-REST-API-Browser

Title: Non Transaction Screens - Ability to rearrange or shuffle rows on a screen
Description: The customer mentioned that it would be great if she can rearrange the rows on the Edit Template List Screen, it would help her keep the most used templates on the first page and would be convenient for her to send emails as well.
Solution:
While we can't really shuffle, the rows on the screen.

A potential solution could be to:

1.) Tag Email Templates that are Popular
2.) Then create a view filter for all email templates with the tag popular
3.) Make that the default view

Title: Improve Transaction Tables - Provide Fields for Customer Phone & Email
Description: The customer requested to have their customerPhone and CustomerEmail information included in their Invoice and Sales Order Template. We advised them to add linked fields for CustomerPhone and CustomerEmail in the appropriate tables. It would be beneficial to have these fields default included in the transaction tables.
Solution:
Super easy customization, and great submission.
There are two ways to solve this:

1.) Create a new field as text, then on customer retrieve update the fields on screen. 
- This approach offers flexibility in case the user wants to change the Phone number or the Email, rather than using the information on file. 

Think of a situation where you might want to use MOBILE instead of OFFICE. 

2.) Creating a linked field to the customer is also great, but offers less flexibility for change. 

It does automatically update for historical records.

Title: Items App Improvement - Hide Purchase Information from All Users
Description:
I like that my users have access to the Items App to see what we have in stock and the quantities currently on hand or on order. 

However, I do not need my team to know how much these items are being purchased for. It creates unnecessary confusion and I don't need them to know much much we're marking up every item.

They should just be focused on the sales or items.
Solution:
This is a pretty simple customization:

1.) Hide the column on the Item Grid
2.) Update the screens Services, Non-Inventory and Inventory to hide all purchase information. 

Very simple request and certainly possible with customization.

Title: Proposals Improvement - Ability to support Bundle and Group items
Description:
Customer uses proposal exclusively for their premium moving operation. 

They want to use bundled items to simplify the quoting process.

At the moment, Sub-items do not populate on the proposal app. 

Since their sub-items serve 2 purposes, 1) for creating the subtotal and 2) acts as a scope of work,  can this be customized?

Keywords:
Bundle
Grouping Items
Group Items
Solution:
This can be customized; however, it's not a perfect flow.
We would basically just insert each individual line item separately into the proposal. 

On the final invoice we would also need to test the workflow to make sure the bundles work and respond appropriately when the inserts and payments occur.

Title: Ability to allow customers to choose 'Type' or 'Draw' on the Signature widget as default
Description:
What do they want? - Ability to allow customers to choose 'Type' or 'Draw' on the Signature widget as default

How are they solving this today? - Since the default on the Signature widget is on 'Type', the customer has to choose 'Draw' and then sign and approve it
Solution: Cannot be customized, great feature request!

Title: Reporting - Summarize the Number of Transactions a Customer - Count Number of Transactions
Description:
Customer is looking for a way to cleanup QBDesktop via Method. 

They would like Method to query for all customers with no transactions and an entity created date over X years.

This is  to help identify cold leads for the purpose of mass deletion. 

Simlular to the Purchase transaction catalog, can we customize the ability to track how many transactions this customer has?

Keywords:
Count Number of Invoices
Solution:
This is certainly customizable there are a couple of requirements:

1.) It's important that the full sync is enabled for invoices
2.) We can then run a count of all invoices over the course of this history of the customer
3.) These can then be deleted.

Keep in mind, in QuickBooks, any entity with a transaction cannot be deleted.

Title: Transaction Improvement - Validate the email address prior to sending an email
Description:
The customer is requesting a way to check the validity of the email address they are sending the Estimate to.

They want to know or eliminate the bad emails.
Solution:
I do not believe this functionality is available in stock apps; however, older version of screens require this to be be implemented.
The implementation is basic:

2 Actions are Required:

1.) Character Function = Is Valid email, pass the email value into the action
2.) The output of the action will return 'True' or 'False', where True is a valid email. 
3.) Note that blank may validate as true so for you next step
4.) Add a conditional action, if the Email Address is Not Empty and IsValid = True

Then send the email

Otherwise, notify the user invalid email provided 

This is an oversimplified explanation; however, I believe it should help with customization.

Title: Work Order App Improvement - Support for Weekly Work Order Templates in report designer
Description:
The customer is looking to customize their print template for work orders.

Currently you can have a start and end date, they would like the ability to add each day of the week.
Use case:  our snow removal services are done on a week basis, so our work orders for that service have a table that covers that full week. I have the starting date for the week in the table, however im hoping to have the remaining days of that week in the table as well. We print our work orders so that is why we prefer to do it this way

Not every site gets servicing everyday; however, when the snow comes they need to have a list of what locations to go to and complete.

If it snows 3-5 days in a row, the team would just take that weekly work order and check off the # of visits completed to that site.
Solution:
In short, I believe this is customizable. Here is how I would approach it:

1.) The start of the work order always starts at a fixed day of the week Sunday or Monday
2.) Then between that start and end days, we create a new table called, Day of Week Breakdown. 
3.) This table is related to the work order, and populates a list of days between the start and end day.  We can add additional fields to this table, like Was Serviced, Notes, Duration of Service, Amount of Salt Used etc.
4.) On the printable work order, we would show the same in a 'List' format, where people could write in the details. Ideally, we could design the screen in a mobile view as well, to help with input via a computer.

Basically, we'd be creating a checklist within the work order, where the items on the checklist are the 7 days of the week.

Title: Improve View Sent Email System Screen - Ability to Retry Sending Email more than 14 days later
Description:
Customer is looking to be able to search beyond a 1 year period. 
- They're looking to pull up a history of all the emails sent to the customer
- And the status of those emails. 

Customer wants to be able to retry emails > 14 days later.
- During the holidays, it's easy to get caught up in the rush and not keep an eye if an email has been delivered or bounced.
- The customer would like to be able to retry emails longer than 14 days old.
Solution: Cannot be customized at this time.

Title: Create Sales Receipt - Ability to Create a Transaction via Zapier -  Ability to create donation in Method via The Giving Block using Zapier.
Description:
I am currently working with an organization on a Zapier integration, where they are connecting The Giving Block (a fundraising platform for nonprofits) to Method CRM. 

Within Method CRM, this nonprofit has a section (under contacts) that can track new donations. However, when we walked through Zapier today, I didn't see any type of action for adding a new donation.

I wanted to reach out to your team to see which action you recommend nonprofits use when bringing in new donation data to Method CRM via Zapier. We saw the option to add an activity or opportunity, but as they have this data sync from Method to QuickBooks, we wanted to make sure we were selecting the correct option.

Keywords:
Zapier Improvement
Create an Invoice using Zapier
Zapier Invoice
Zapier Estimate
Zapier Sales Order
Solution:
Creating a zap to insert into the donation table is possible today.
However, you will need to use the 'Generic Entry' zap. 

Using the Generic Entry Zap, the following steps could be completed:

1.) Determine if the Donor or Customer already exists in the CRM
2.) If no Create them, if yes, then move to next step
3.) Add Generic Entry - Sales Receipt Table, input all required fields.
4.) Once the Sales Receipt is created, take the RecordID output
5.) Add another Generic Entry - Insert into Sales Receipt Line table, input all required fields. 

This should allow you to create donations via Zapier.
The instructions above are applicable to all transactions.

That said, one should very the items that we're wanted to insert match with QuickBooks as well as all the other required fields.

Title: Ability to integrate Clearent as a payment method
Description: Customer (HCMRS) would like to know if it was possible for Method to integrate with https://clearent.com/
Solution: This could be customized using the API; however, I do not recommend taking this on.

Title: Work Order App Improvement - Ability to merge two existing work orders
Description: Customers use case: We have two different work orders for the same Customer and the Customer now wants the two jobs combined into one.
Solution:
Definitely Customizable:

Steps to customization:

1.) I would add a dropdown to the work order page that lists all the Existing Work Orders.
2.) Call it Import from WorkOrder:
3.) Allow the user to select the work order they want to bring information in from
4.) Add a button called 'import'
5.) Update the existing work order with all the information that they need from the existing workorder. 
6.) Then we can have the user decide to update the previous work order automatically as a new Status Type called 'Duplicated' or 'Deffered' and mark that work order as Closed and Do not invoice.
7.) Lastly, provide a quick Summary on the Work Order Instructions, stating that this work order was merged into another work order. 

This way a history of the work order is preserved.

Title: Activity App Improvement - Improve Recurring Activities or the Frequency Widget on the Activity App
Description:
When an activity is created, I have the ability to schedule it as recurring. 

However, what's not clear to the user is what activity is being 'repeated' into the future. 

Is it the main activity?
Is it the follow-up activity?

For example,

1.) I have a meeting scheduled for a client
2.) During that meeting the client and I schedule a recurring phone call every week for the next 3 months
3.) When I go  to my meeting activity and complete it. 

At this time, I want to setup that recurring call.
However, when I click frequency, it creates a recurring activity for my meeting.

I would like the recurring meetings (into the future) to be based on the 'Follow - up' Activity vs. the current active activity.

Today, the only way I can achieve this is.
Complete my meeting.
Then create a new activity for the new meeting type and make that recurring. 
Taking 4 page loads. vs. 2 page loads.
Solution:
This is customizable.
Here is how I would approach it:

1.) Have the customer fill in the activity and complete it as normally.
2.) If the 'Follow-up' Activity information is enabled & filled in
3.) On save prompt the customer to go to that follow-up activity
4.) If the customer chooses 'Yes', then they could create a recurrence from that follow-up activity.

--------------

Ideally, we should be able to pass a 'RecordID' into the frequency widget.
Rather than using the 'Screen Active RecordID'
We would need to use the 'Followup Activity RecordID'.

Alternatively, a recurrence action might be able to help with this as well. 
But right now, there is no easy solution outside of redirecting the user to the followup activity.

Title: Show running total for editable grids in mobile view similar to how it is done on the desktop version.
Description: Show running total for editable grids in mobile view similar to how it is done on the desktop version where a subtotal section can be enabled underneath the column to show the total for that column. Currently, this has to be done via customization where we have to add text input object on screen and then updating screen logic to always update that text input field.
Solution:
Currently this is because we're using a standard grid.

Customization can be done to replace to standard grid with an editable grid. This is about 1-2 hours per screen. 

It's also challenging since there is limited real-estate on mobile but certainly possible with the assistance of scrollbar.

Title: Portal Improvement - Provide a Preference to Restrict Historical Transactions from the Customer Portal
Description:
Customer is wondering if its possible to not sync all the historical data between QBDT and Method. 

Due to the fact, they have a very messy but necessary transaction history, can we customize the customer portal to hide transactions based on date?
Solution:
Certainly customizable

1.) We can hardcode a date on the screen (easiest)
2.) We can set a date per customer or across the whole account.

Both possible but really should be an account preference.

Title: Add brand, preferred vendor and MPN columns in the Items app for QBDT users.
Description:
This customer mentioned that he has some additional columns in his inventory section in QBDT. So, he would like to have those additional columns in the grid of the Items App:
- Brand
- Preferred vendor
- MPN: Manufacturer Part Number

Very easy customization and important. 

Most people also love to see these fields like MPN and Preferred vendor on transactions as well.

Title: Ability to add attachments to items
Description: This customer would like to have a space to add attachments to his Items so that he can add information about the technical data sheet of his products.
Solution:
Very Easy to customize.

1.) For each item type (Inventory / Non-Inventory)
2.) Add an attachment widget to the screen and voila, documents on items.

Title: Bill App Improvement - Show Both Amount Due and Total Amount on Screens
Description:
The Bill screen showing Amount Due even if the Bill is Paid. This is confusing for the Customer. Instead of Amount Due it should show something like Total Amount or Amount.

On invoices there are two sub-amounts:

Balance Remaining
Total Amount

Bills should follow the same process
Amount Due
Total Amount

Very Easy to customization.

Just drag and drop and format as text.

Title: Notification when a Contact is added to an existing Lead or Customer
Description:
Hi I would like to notify the sales rep assigned to they account, anytime a new contact is added to their account. This way they are aware that a new contact was added and they can reach out and introduce themselves and work with the customer.

Since we take calls from all customers, not all of them will be aware of new contacts that are added to the accounts.

Contacts Notification.

This is certainly possible with customization.

That said, the flow above can also be automated to notify any number of users that a new contact was added and needs their attention.

Title: Popup Blocked - Improve Application Popups - Print Reports - Exports
Description:
Currently today, the customer presses print to 'generate' a Invoice Template.
However, the print button appears to not be working since, a popup is detected.

The user is then required to Whitelist the URL so this popup can be generated and open.

There must be a way we can improve this experience, this is especially impactful for new users who may not be familiar with browser popup blocked detection.

Title: Xero Improvement - Support for Field Service Management
Description: Want to be able to schedule techs for onsite jobs. Can't do this now with Xero.
Solution: This functionality is available in Stock Apps.

Title: API Integration - Intercom and Method Integration
Description:
Customer is looking to integrate both intercom and Method together to help provide live customer support via chat on their website. 

Hi Method, we use you guys but wondering if you are using Intercom? and if so how are you connecting the two and is it possible?

While enriching the Intercom account with data from Method.

An integration of this nature is pretty large given the scope above.

Creating and generating a Method URL for each contact or customer. 
Automatically creating a lead in the CRM when a new chatter provides their email etc.

However, the level of the integration is often where the challenge of the scope occurs. 
In most cases, and integration of this nature is very large, and will likely require the help of a developer.

Title: Bills Improvement - QuickBooks Desktop - Show Taxes - Show Taxes on Bills - Vendor Invoices
Description:
I cannot find the add the tax to a vendor invoice (Bill).

QuickBooks supports the ability to keep track of tax on Bills, this appears to be a gap in the implementation of Bills or Vendor Invoices within Purchase Transactions.
Solution:
This functionality appears to be visible in QuickBooks Online versions of the Bills screens. 

For the QuickBooks Desktop screens, a simple tax line item could be used to capture and calculate tax on the transaction. 

That said, options with sync will need to be better explored to understand impact on reporting.

Title: Stock App Improvement - Multi-tenancy Support - Improve Method Multi-tenancy Experience for Users that are shared across tenants
Description:
Today, when an account is converted to multi-tenancy. 
We do a good job of blanking 'TenantID' on custom tables to ensure print templates and email templates work on day one for a new tenant. 

That said, currently users are able to provide access to different tenants using the Multi-Tenancy UI.

This access allows people to sign-in however, their Method experience is terrible and usually riddled with errors until customization is completed.

In particular, the User Dropdowns on screens are only filtered for the 'home' or 'Main' tenant the user is part of.

This means if they're added to a secondary account, their experience just does not work.
Solution:
Customizing all the references across and account to the AssignedTo or User dropdown. Is pain staking but necessary to ensure users get a good experience:

1.) All dropdowns that reference the User Table will need to be filtered for the tenant permitted list.

2.) We could also just bulk TenantID > 0 

This needs to also be implemented into any workflow that Retrieves or Inserts a user value. 

eg. Send Email action, will retrieve the From Email, from the user table so we need to add the tenantid filter to this request.

Title: Web Report Designer Improvement - Add Fill Empty Space Property - DetailBand.FillEmptySpace Property
Description:
Request: DevExpress has a feature on the Detail Band 'Fill Empty Space' that they need to fill in their Estimate/Invoice Reports. From Paul at Brownsafe: 'Sending a copy of an invoice to a customer who paid $40,000 for a high-quality hand crafter safe with a blank first page seems a bit unprofessional. Brown safe can build a safe to withstand unimaginable forces yet, their invoices look half done. Customer might get the wrong impression.

Use Case: Utilizing the new features of the report designer can benefit them by filling in the blank space so that their reports look more professional and look more complete.
Solution:
Gets or sets whether to fill the empty space between the Detail band and the next band or the end of the page.
https://docs.devexpress.com/XtraReports/DevExpress.XtraReports.UI.DetailBand.FillEmptySpace

If you enable the FillEmptySpace property, the report prints the Detail band as follows:

Detail band copies fill the empty space below the band.
Detail band copies retain the layout of the original band.
Detail band copies are not bound to data.
Report controls in these copies are printed without data.
Note that there must be a gap between the DetailBand and the content that follows it on the page. Otherwise, the FillEmptySpace option will not work.

Consider a report layout with the GroupFooterBand positioned below the DetailBand and its PrintAtBottom option disabled. In this situation, the FillEmptySpace option is unavailable because there is no gap between the Detail band and the Group Footer band that follows.


Limitations
If a report contains Group Footer or Report Footer bands, and the respective ReportFooterBand.PrintAtBottom or GroupFooterBand.PrintAtBottom options are disabled, the FillEmptySpace option has no effect.
The FillEmptySpace option is not intended for use in subreports. This option may print a report incorrectly.

Title: Date Difference Action Improvement - Provide Months & Year as an option
Description: It's impossible to calculate someone's age in years today.
Solution:
I currently don't have a great work around for calculating age:

Get Birth Year
Get Current Year

Current Year - Birth Year = This gives you the year but someone born in Dec is treated the same as someone in Jan.

So we need to compare Month Next

Get Birth Month
Get Current Month

If the current Month (number) is less than birth month then subtract 1 year.
If the current Month (number) is greater than birth month then do nothing.
If the current Month (number) is equal to birth month then

Get Birthday
Get Current Day

If the Current Day is less than Birthday then subtract 1 year.
If the Current Day is greater than or equal to birthday then do nothing.

Title: Geotagging or Geostamping - Work Orders - Completed Field Crew work

The geo stamp provides a way to query the validity of the supplied information and allows you to visualize the distribution of your form using the geographic information stamped on your form.

Title: Order Frequency - Tracking Customer Order Frequency
Description:
We want to get in a habit of re-stocking customers on a regular basis. 
Today we don't have a sense of their order frequency or time between orders, is this something we can track?
Solution:
There are a couple of things that need to be identified before we go on this customization:

1.) We need to identify a limit for the order frequency for example, do we want to take a look at the last 10 orders of a customer and determine the average time between orders
2.) Setting a limit ensures that we review only relevant data that is recent 
3.) We would then loop through each customer, then loop through the orders is chronological order
4.) While looping through the orders, we would keep track of the number of days between each order for eg.

Their last order would be calculated by Today - LastOrderDateInvoice1
Then  LastOrderDateInvoice1 - LastInvoiceDateOrder2

And so on, we would keep a running total of the total number of days and the total number of invoices. 

5.) At the end of the function (aka no invoices remaining or we hit 10)
6.) We then divide the total number of days by the total number of invoices to provide an average
7.) Then update that to the customer table.
