or 

9-12, 12-4, 4-8 
Then update the work order with that time, and build a process to determine if that slot is booked don't offer it to other people.

Title: Ability to add WEBP type images to the email body
Description:
The customer is interested in including a WEBP image in their email.
Currently, WEBP is not supported.

They mentioned 'This feature will allow us make our Lead and Donation pages look much more professional and aesthetically pleasing. Will not slowing down the load speed of these pages.'
Solution: This cannot be customized; however, images can be converted to other formats and used - but webp support is still seeking broad adoption across platforms and devices.

Title: Mailchimp Integration Improvement - Support importing Email Templates
Description:
Customer likes our integration with QuickBooks but would like to import their templates from MailChimp to use our email campaign app. 


At this time it's difficult to design email templates and copying and pasting hasn't been effective so they've opt'd to continue sending from MailChimp.
Solution: In theory, we should be able to bring the source code  and html to our editor; however, there are challenges with how those emails are received and respond to different email clients like outlook vs. gmail.

Title: Method:Sidebar 'Search' function show entity information
Description: When searching from Method:Sidebar for Gmail, the returned contacts do not show the entity they are associated with. Searching a name who might have contact on many entities makes it difficult to select the right one.
Solution: Cannot be customized

Title: Ability to add a Sales Rep field for QBO - That does not use Assigned To
Description:
User would like the abilty to track outside sales reps with a custom field.

They would like this custom field to mimic the Assign to  in functionality and utilize this field for commission reporting.
Solution:
This is a quite simple customization.

Just a custom dropdown field with Sales Rep name.
However, since all reporting is based on assigned too dozens of screens and charts with need to be updated to reflect that information. 

Futhermore, it's not future compatible just like any custom field all new functionality and reporting like screenlets will need to be manually updated to support the additional rep field.

Title: Ability to Delete sent Proposals
Description:
The customer would like the ability to delete sent proposals. 
Use case: I have a lot of proposals that I would like to delete. I was creating them and sending them to myself as I am learning how to use them.
Solution:
This can be customized; however, it is by design.

Once an agreement is accepted we shouldn't delete it as a customer will have a copy of the same agreement, and we don't want it to go missing. 

The best recommendation here without customization, would be to mark the proposal as complete.

Title: Improve Field Creation to Mimic last Field Type Used - Tables and Fields
Description:
Partner is looking to have an ability when adding fields to Tables, the Type reverted to the last one used, not always to Text.
We have this feature in classic version.

Would be great if we can have this feature in Method new as  it makes adding multiple fields to a table so easy. You just need to arrange your List of fields to create by type and it is so efficient in classic.
Solution: Cannot be customized.

Title: API Improvement - The ability to Create Tables & Fields
Description:
One aspect that's missing from the REST API that exists in the SOAP API is the ability to create tables and fields.

This is especially useful when creating integrations that require changes to the tables and schema without having to log into the ui and create those definitions manually.
Solution: Cannot be customized.

Title: Ability to delete Parent Work Order
Description:
Customer is looking to have an ability to delete Parent Work Order that have no recurring or child work order.
As for now we can only delete the recurring work order that has not been invoiced/completed but for the Parent Work Order, we can only mark them as cancelled.
User is looking to have this feature as they are not using Work Order for Invoicing, they are only using it to assign the jobs to their technicians  and then deleting them afterward to clean up the space. 
Can this be customized on their account?
Solution:
Yes, this can be customized.

The ability to delete a series is definately possible.

Title: Simplify the Proposal Workflow for Recurring or Non-Recurring Proposals
Description:
This customer today, is not interested in doing any recurring proposals; however, they find the initial 'recurrence' option on the proposal setup screen confusing as it's set to 'Monthly' and hard-coded. 

This often requires us to explain to our users that this option has no impact on whether a proposal is actually recurring or not. 

In reality the recurrence option defined at the line level is the key factor to define the recurrence.
Solution:
There is a simple customization here, where we can hide that initial recurrence menu from view. 

To avoid any confusion. 

Furthermore, we could improve the experience by bringing the cadence onto the item setup screen instead of the proposal as a whole to give more control over what items may recur at different intervals.

Title: Contacts App Improvement - Adding Tax Exempt Field
Description:
The customer would like to have the customer set to tax exempt be default  when creating a new customer or lead. 

Use case: Almost all customers we sell to our tax-exempt given the nature of our business, and the change has caused frustration with our bookkeeper. I was thinking if we could set the default to be tax-exempt, that would be the simplest answer.

By default it is unchecked in QBO as well.
Thinking we can improve our stock screens by giving an option on the 'New Contact' screen itself to check or uncheck that tax-exempt on that screen only.
Solution:
This is a very simple customization; however, I think this would be beneficial in stock.

Especially in a scenario where we're creating leads and converting them to customers.
We want to make sure the lead is created in the correct format to be consumed by QuickBooks.

Title: Xero Documentation On What Tables / Fields Sync
Description:
Recently this customer wanted to apply customizations in Method. They wanted to bring over transactional Tags to be used and reported on. Through the customization process we found that we dont have access to this.

The customer was upset to get this news and wanted to make sure we have documented this limitation so that it can be referred to on future work for future customers.
Solution:
This would be amazing to help improve the knowledge of our customers and consultants.

Improving our Help Centre content as well.

Title: Donations Charts - Chart for the Biggest Contributor
Description:
Customer is looking for a custom report to highlight their largest donor from the last calendar year. 

This report is available in the sales receipt app but since they will be employing Donor Management, exclusively, can this be customized for the donations app.
Solution:
Currently, the Sales Receipt App has a chart screen that is transferable. To the donation app. 

It includes details on the most popular items and donors. 

That said it would have to be configured for Donors and Donor Verbage.

Title: Ability to Tag contacts based on Email Campaign
Description: Can we customize a way to tag/segment customers based on their Email campaign status, i.e open, clicked, bounced. Ideally, we want to capture contact segments who may have engaged with us by using tags. For example: Engaged - 2024 Promo Based off this we can then create new campaigns to target those users.
Solution:
This is certainly possible: After the campaign has processed, we can evaluate the individual status of the contacts sent. Based off that: 
1.) We'd ask to create a Tag 
2.) Then attach that tag to the contact 
3.) Then the user would be able to filter or use that tag for future campaigns.

Title: Improve Opportunity Dropdown on Activities and related transactions
Description:
Customer has a ton of W2L inquiries which start their sales workflow from the Opportunity app. 

Because of this, they have many Opportunities assigned to a holding bucket and are named New Business from the Web to Lead Form. 

Sometimes reps create activities on the fly and would like to be able to link the Activity to an opportunity. Finding the correct opportunity is not easy. 

They would like a way where the link to Opportunity field filters to only the Opportunity associated with the contact/customer and to have the Contact name (more informative fields) displayed vs the Name of the opportunity and assigned to.
Solution:
Very simple customization.

In most cases the opportunity dropdown is filtered for the active contact.
That said we don't always know the name of the opportunity or the status.

Title: Audit Trail Improvement - The ability to filter on specific field changes
Description:
The customer mentioned that 'What I am trying to do is filter the search in the Audit Trail to only show results for updated contacts that had their email updated.'

It would be great to have the ability to filter the data further.

The customer is looking to determine when the email field, was every changed via the audit trail.
Solution:
The Audit Trail cannot be customized; however In theory, we could create a customization where anytime the email field is changed.

The log should include:

1.) Who the customer was
2.) What the original email was
3.) What the new email is
4.) The date that change occurred
5.) Who made the change

Title: Ability to Create Sub-Fields or Related Fields - Two Dropdowns Related to one another
Description:
Customer is looking to  create dynamic dropdown fields.

Based on what one dropdown value is, they want another dropdown to dynamically display options that correspond with the previous field.

If they change the value in field 1, the options in field 2 will dynamically change accordingly.

The example provided by them: There is a table that I have created for Sport, Level, and Division. In the sport drop-down, it would have Archery, Auto Racing, Badminton, and Baseball. If the value in sport is chosen to be 'baseball', then in the Level dropdown, the only options that would show would be 'Youth, Middle School, High School, College, Professional Elite, Recreational, and Retired'. Then if the value in Level is chosen to be College then the Division dropdown options would only be A blank option, D1, D2, D3, NAIA, Junior Community College, Club.
Solution:
This can be customized; however it's a 3 step process:

1.) Create a dropdown for the main category (Let's say Sport)
2.) Create another dropdown for division (This is ex. Single A, Double A etc.)
3.) Then we need to create a table, that defines the relationship between dropdown A and Dropdown B.
4.) Based off of this, on the screen we can then use this relationship table to determine, when Basketball is selected, show all the divisions associated with Basketball and save that on the screen.

Title: Ability to track Custom Category Subtotals on Transactions - Subtotal by Item Type
Description:
Customer selling home and commercial security and would like to group and subtotal his estimate and invoices. 

These groupings may include Cameras, Hardware, Services and Misc, etc. 

They would like the customer interface to have subtotals under the group
Solution:
1.) The first step would be to associate every item with a subtotal category. eg. Materials, Labour, Transportation

2.) Once this is done, this information would need to be updated and captured on the transactions.

3.) Once available on the transactions, on save we can summarize this information and show a breakdown of each category. This can be displayed as a dollar value or a % of total for example.

Title: Ability to transfer attachements/pictures/documents from one account to another
Description:
Aaron, our partner, was looking for a way to export and import all documents/pictures from a custom table with the Document and Picture type field to another account.
His client is creating a new method account and so would like to transfer the files to the account. The document field is a file field type, and the the Picture is a Picture type field (Table: Pictures)

As of now, we can't export documents or pictures using any feature in the platform today. Users have to manually download and upload these files one-by-one. This will be a great feature to have.
Solution:
While this cannot be customization in theory this could be possible via the API using two endpoints:

1.)https://developer.method.me/?_ga=2.183527968.782054154.1711463531-895868441.1697636792#tag/Files/operation/file-download 

This endpoint should allow you to download the file.

2.)https://developer.method.me/?_ga=2.183527968.782054154.1711463531-895868441.1697636792#tag/Files/operation/file-upload

This endpoint should allow you to upload the file.

That said, this has not been tested by the Professional Services team and is only a recommendation to help work around the flow.

Title: Usage Score for Users - Report on Individual CRM usage
Description:
Customer would like to customize a report that summarizes their team's CRM utilization. 

They have several roles in the business including Outside Sales, Inside, and Dispatcher, and want the report to be tailored to specific roles. 

Lastly, they would want a centralized usage KPI similar to our health score for each sales rep.
Solution:
This could be customized; however, I love the idea of having this as a stock feature - driving people to onboard and adopt. 

Especially for champions and owners today. We do not have a sense of who is using and how often.

1.) The score should include mission completion
2.) Overall CRM usage

The (2nd) option could be custom designed in Method to determine how many creates or how many records the user is generating across the platform, essentially combining all the reporting screens into a single KPI or multiple KPIs for the team.

Title: Chart Improvement - Support for Multiple Data Sources - Multiple tables to be on charts - Multi-series - Multiple Series
Description:
Customer Wants to compare estimates and Invoices based on lead source and visually see the comparison of each sources effectiveness.

Also in the chart builder the Line and Area Chart icons in the designer clearly show that more than one data set is available to be compared.

Eg. Multiple Sales Reps over time, each with their own line.
Eg. Multiple tables over time, estimates vs. invoices
Solution:
This cannot be customized with easy today. 
Two separate charts would need to be created.

Title: Recurring Sales Orders - Managing Orders that need to be fullfilled every x
Description:
User is wondering if we can create recurring/scheduled Sales orders to manage their recurring distribution workflow. 

Similar to proposals but for Sales Orders.
Solution:
I think a customization of this nature is possible within (1-2 hours) however, an expanded estimate is added here to make sure we cover. 

Naturally there are a lot of questions that go into a customization of this magnitude, certainly possible; however, the exceptions are always the most difficult to handle. 

1.) What cadence do we set the sales orders at
2.) What is the flow, is it always automated or initiated
3.) When do we know an order is recurring or not
4.) When do we know the recurrence should stop
5.) Are any notifications required to users. 
6.) If an order can't be fulfilled should another one be created?

Title: Ability to add cc email to email campaign
Description:
The customer would like to be able add a cc email  they  want to CC them so they can also email those that replied to my email campaign if  they are not available.

I tried testing this out by adding a cc email to the email template itself but did not receive an email maybe it can be done via customization?
Solution:
This can be done via customization; however, it may impact analytics. 

Ideally, it is best practice to send 1 email to 1 recipient. 
This enables our tracking to be accurate to the user, who opened, clicked etc. the email. 

Once a CC or BCC is added, these analytics could be inaccurate since you now have multiple recipients receiving and interacting with the same email.

Title: QBDT Sync Report
Description: User would like a way to export a sync report from either the QBDT sync engine or in Product reporting on all modifications, updates, sync conflicts of the previous change-only/full sync
Solution:
The Audit Trail is the best way to keep track of sync's and changes. 
It's an ongoing report of credits, edits, and deletes. 

If there is something more specific the customer is looking for, we should explore the problem they're trying to solve.

Title: Attachment Widget Improvement - Allow For Height Control On Widget
Description:
Request: Similar to how we can control the width of the Widget, it would be beneficial to be able to control the height of the widget. Currently we can only see a maximum of 4 at a time; regardless of if you extend the row of the cell the widget is on.

Benefit: If there are more than 4 attachments, we can see all of them at once instead of having to scroll through and find the specific attachments.

Use Case: Mobility City has a Documents App where all Tenants can view training documents. Some of the documents types have a lot of attachments. They don't want to utilize the 'Search in Screen' feature on their browsers as it would be one more thing to train users to do and not worth the effort. It would a lot easier if they can all be listed out without having the ability to scroll and see 4 at a time.
Solution: Cannot be customized.

Title: Opportunity App Improvement - The ability to choose what addresses are visible on the activity
Description:
Customer would like addresses, specifically shipping addresses, to be visible in the opportunities app.

This would help empower their sales reps to plan and more important, execute their scheduled sales day on the field.
Solution:
The fields to my knowledge already exist in the table
Therefore all that's required is:

1.) Add the fields to the screen
2.) Format them to respond like address fields

Keep in mind this information is just inherited from the customer linked to the contact

Title: Sales Order Notification - Internal Notification to User or Admin
Description: User would like to customize a notfication via Email or SMS whenever a Sales Order is generated via Method and assigned to a user.
Solution:
Can be customized.

SMS should be very light weight customization.
Email a little more heavy. 

1.) Create a field for phone number for user
2.) On save, notify rep / user?
3.) If yes send it.

Title: Ability to Track Location on the Lineitem Level (QuickBooks Desktop / QBDT)
Description: User would like to track Location on all transactions at the lineitems level
Solution:
Very simple customization.

Add a field to the line item should work. However, the issue isn't tracking location for most customers.

Most customers struggle with being able to identify:
1.) What item is located where?
2.) How much of that item exists at that location.

Method cannot do the above without some manual labour or cannot do it at all.

1.) Potential solution could be to list all the locations an item could exist on the item level. Then enable the user to select valid locations.

2.) Quantities by location however, are not possible at all. Method will always report on total quantity on hand.

Title: Ability to lock the Sales Order once converted to Invoice
Description:
User is wondering if they have the ability to close and make Sales Orders Uneditable once converted to invoice. 

This would allow them to manage change orders more effectively between Sales Managers and Sales reps
Solution:
Can be customized.

Once a sales order line has been linked with an invoice line. 
We can lock down that sales order / sales order line.

Keep in mind that a sales order could be converted into multiple invoices. So we would need to explore, how sales orders are converted invoices.

Title: Ability to search by organization - Search by Company
Description: The customer is looking to be able to search by organization, they would also like for the organization name to display in large letters when populating in the search.
Solution:
This solution is available in stock.

However, for customized accounts, we could build a list or filter that prioritizes Company in the list view.
Alternatively, reverting to Stock would solve this customers problem if there are no major customizations in the list view.

Title: Ability to Change the Status of an Estimate when a Work Order is Created from the Estimate
Description:
1) User typically initiate their workflow by creating an estimate, followed by generating a work order based on this estimate.

2) Upon the creation of a work order from an estimate, users expect the status of the original estimate to reflect this action. Presently, the estimate's status remains unaltered, leading to confusion regarding the progress and conversion status of the estimate.

3) The customer has requested an option to automatically update the status of the estimate when a work order is generated from it. This update could include transitioning the estimate's status to 'Converted' or 'Closed,' indicating its progression in the workflow.
Solution: Very possible; all workflows can be customized within 1-2 hours of time.

Title: Shuttle Payments - Payment Gateway Support for Freedom Merchant
Description: Ability to integrate with Freedom Merchant Payment Gateway
Solution: Cannot be customized today.

Title: Implementing Closing Date - Ability to lock the accounting period in Method
Description:
Customer is looking to  lock the accounting period in Method so that no new sales/invoices can be generated once the period is locked.

They use the accounting lock feature in QuickBooks, but when  users generate sales/invoices in Method after the period is locked, they get sync errors.
Solution:
This is certainly customizable.

We should be able to retrieve the closing date on the account.
Based off of that, restrict people's ability to create new transactions before this period on txndate change.

Title: Insight Dashboard for Donor Management
Description: User is wondering if we can customize a Donor specific insight dashboard with screenlets for recent donations, biggest donor year to date, LYBUNT, etc to bring a more graphic approach to the their Donor Dashboard.
Solution:
Definitely possible.

30 minutes to 1 hour per screenlet. For lists it may be faster for LYBUNT for example, it's a little more difficult since there are some calculations required.

Title: Show Transaction Lines on Email - Ability to see full transaction lines on email notification
Description: The customer would like to know if is is possible to show the full transaction the in the email notification to customer. For example if an invoice notification is sent the want the customer to be able to see the full invoice from the email rather than clicking on the ' view email' button. They don't believe customer should to click the button and go to the portal and click the print button to see it.
Solution:
This is possible. 

It does require some work as it requires a dynamic HTML table to be designed and added to with actions. 

1.) On the email template table create 4 new fields
2.) Table Header, Table Footer, Table Row Even, Table Row Odd
3.) In the send email action
4.) Define the table header
5.) As you loop through the items, append an item and merge it into the Table Row Even or Odd (this is useful for zebra striping)
6.) Lastly, before the loop is done, close the table with the table footer. 

Lot's of testing is required to make sure this looks good in email.

Title: Proposals Improvement - Quarterly Billing App
Description:
Customer bills for services 4x a year.

They would like to have a proposal that bills every 3 months matching the calendar year.
Solution:
Customizable; however, adjusting frequencies requires a tremendous amount of testing. 

So the bulk of this estimate revolves around testing.

Title: Proposals Improvement - Retry Processing Payments when Payment if fails
Description: IF the payment fails we currently do not retry it. We have a payment unsuccessful activity and preference to send an unsuccessful payment email to the client to take them to the portal.
Solution:
I think this is a flag, We have a payment unsuccessful activity and preference to send an unsuccessful payment email to the client to take them to the portal.

We can likely bypass this flag to try and retry payments as often as needed.
However, we should be concerned about attempting to process a card too many times in a row with failure.

Title: Estimate App Improvement - When an estimate has been accepted, converted into an invoice, converted into a work order restrict editing
Description:
Some of the users are making changes to estimates after they have been accepted or converted into invoice or work orders.

This is problematic since changes on estimates do no flow forward.
Instead the customer wants the user to know that this estimate has been converted and all future changes must be applied to the invoice or work order.

Because the customer references the estimate, this is the nature reaction of the reps.
Solution:
This is certainly customizable. 

1.) If the estimate is linked to a work order or invoice then restrict all editing on the transaction and provide a link to the appropriate transaction where the change should be made.

Title: Cases App Improvement - Make a case internal - not visible on the customer portal
Description:
Sometimes. we'll be troubleshooting issues proactively for customers.
Without their awareness, we will create a ticket for the support team to investigate the issue and resolve it. 

Typically this occurs when a customer has a history of problems (eg. sync issues).
We do not want these cases to be visible in the customer portal and would like a way to suppress the case from the portal. 

In addition to that, track who the point of contact should be (internally) when that case has been resolved.

eg. Ryan K. may make a case for support to solve an issue for Fujimats.
- Support should review the issue
- Supress the issue from the customer
- Communicate with Ryan K. to the completition of the case.
Solution:
This is customizable:

1.) Create a checkbox to mark the case internal
2.) Provide a dropdown for who the internal point of contact should be
3.) Redirect all notifications and emails to the internal contact instead of the customer contact.

Title: W2L Improvement - Case Creation on Web to Lead form - Automatic Case Creation - Customer wants support form
Description:
They would like a Case to be automatically created with the corresponding information based on selections made on the Web to Lead form. 

In some cases, they have distributors where the end user never really is one of their customers. So a portal login / account may not exist for the end user. 

However, support and warranty is handled by them. So the Web to Lead form facilitates the entry into the CRM system.  Today they forget to create a case and this would help the team stay focused and organized.
Solution:
Absolutely customizable:

1.) We would need the ability to allow the customer to select a category or issue type. 

2.) The case could be followed up with an automated portal email where they update and upload supporting documentation.

Title: Ability to generate a PDF template via API
Description:
Ability to generate a PDF template via API. 

Within Method, we can create an estimate, print it and then save that file to the job so it would then be available from the API. What customer is looking to do is to complete the process from the API without the need to login into Method.
Solution: Cannot be customized at this time.

Title: Handling Paper Based Proposals - Recurring Payments using Proposals without Signature or Acceptance
Description:
The reason for not using proposals, is because they sent manual paper contracts. 
Customer is looking for the recurring payments and perhaps payment notification available in proposals.
Solution:
The solution is to use proposals; but how they use it will be slightly different from stock. 

1.) Do manual paper proposal.
2.) Once signed.
3.) Create a proposal in the system
4.) Set the recurrence and items
5.) Accept the proposal from the New / Edit proposal
6.) Add a payment method and let it auto run without sending any communication to the customer.

Review the proposal preferences to make sure notifications are going to the customer or not. For example, when payment information needs to be updated - this is something proposals could facilitate.

Title: Audit Trail Improvement - log app and screen name for records that gets created via app routine
Description: I just wanted to pass along a feature request that would be wonderful to have. Currently you cannot see what routine caused an activity in the audit trail. The current workaround is to cross reference the routine log with the time stamp on the audit trail.
Solution: Cannot be customized at this time.

Title: Activities App Improvement - View for My Due All In the Future - Future Pending Activities
Description:
My due now activities is great at managing activities that are due today. However, sometimes, there are no activities due today, and I would like my team to get ahead on activities that are due tomorrow or the next day. 

Ideally it would be great to provide a view like this so they don't have to filter or play around with search, they can just from from the:

My Due Now list
Into
My Future Due list
Solution:
This is quite simple to customize.

Basically we can just have a filter for 'My Activities Due'
Sort based on the created date ascending. 

This view would include everything due before, on, and in the future for the selected resource or user.

Title: Ability to move attachment from Opportunities to Transactions -
Description: The User often attaches designs and opportunities and would like those attachments to carry forward into a Transactions once converted.
Solution:
Very small task.
Moving attachments from transaction to transaction.

That said today, that does eat into their storage an is generally not recommended for people using 1000s of attachments.

Again a feature request to explain why this is important to the customer is probably best.

Title: Email Campaign Improvement - Highlight and Show when a contact was created to we can target new customers
Description:
Customer is looking to send all new customers a welcome email.
However, they don't have the ability to easily identify who the new customers or contacts are and who to contact.
Solution:
This is customizable, two forms:

1.) We can track entity created date and show that on the email campaign list
2.) We can track contact created date and show that on the email campaign list

There may be scenarios where this information is blank, part of this process would be to potentially backfill this information or future proof it using app routines.

Title: Ability to edit the descriptions on the app tiles
Description:
Customer is looking to have an ability to edit the descriptions on the apps so they  can relate to what their business will use them for.
For example, Estimates states 'Create, edit and send estimates and quotes' and customer wanted to say 'Sales and short term hire'.
Is it possible through customization?
Solution:
At this time, they can be done on custom apps.

However, if the app is a stock app provided by Method (aka we're the developer). 
This cannot be done today.

Title: Increase API Limits - Provide alternatives for accounts that are enterprise level looking for higher API limits (Over 25,000)
Description:
Customer currently manages a portal for technical support.
They have a large volume of customers that are interacting with both systems and they're looking to increase their number of API Calls.
Solution:
Cannot be customized; however, salesforce and other applications allow for much high limits than what we have today. 

Would be worth exploring their needs.

Title: Ability to save generated reports to a record - Save Print PDFs
Description:
Customer currently would like to save generated pdfs to a transaction.

As things may change but also they just want a physical record of every PDF they've sent to a customer.

Ideally, we would generate the PDF and attach it to the existing record.
Today they have to generated the PDF, Save it, then upload it to the attachment widget as a work around.
Solution: At this time, generated reports (reports generated using the Generate Report Action) cannot be saved to records or attachment widgets as the URL generated will expire.

Title: Cases App Improvement - The ability to highlight what fields are visible to customers on emails or portal
Description:
As a new user of the system, I don't know what information is visible to the customer on the portal or via email when I create or email updates.

This often is a surprise to me when maybe they see something they weren't supposed to see on a email notification or portal screen (for example: Case Type). 

How can we do a better job of highlighting what's externally visible to users on cases.
Solution:
Pretty simple customization, to just highlight or mark the caption to say this is visible to contacts.

In most cases it's:
Contact Name
Phone
Email
Subject
Description
Case Type

Title: Cases App Improvement - The ability to know if a comment or activity originated from the portal user
Description:
Today there is no clear way to determine how an activity is logged against a case when it's created from the portal. 

Since the activity is assigned to the contact and the assigned to user. 
There is no way to capture the origin of where or when it was created.
Solution:
Today this could be customized by appending the contact and original to the comment from the portal. 

However, it probably would be best to capture this information an surface it up to the internal users.

Title: Ability to link Work Orders to Invoices
Description: The customer is creating Invoices in QuickBooks and wants link the Invoices to Work Orders once they are synced to Method.
Solution:
Straight forward customization.

Really just bringing the Work order dropdown onto the invoice screen and vice-versa.
Since invoices are not created via Method a manual way to link is required.

That said, it should be strongly encouraged we have users convert work orders to invoices to avoid double data entry and improve processing time in QuickBooks.

Title: Ability to fetch audit trail data on a custom app or screen
Description:
The client has a custom app that he created a couple of years ago. He previously mentioned that he could easily access the audit trail data on the screen, which was a convenient and effective method for viewing the data. However, recently the application has stopped retrieving the data and displays a message stating 'no records found.'

He mentioned that it was an easy way for him to get the information on screen rather than navigating to account settings and putting filters to get the data.
Solution: The Audit Trail is not accessible via customization at this time.

Title: Better Multi-line Support on Portal Grids - Update Portal Screens to use editable grids instead of regular grids
Description:
Currently, editable grids offer the ability to format multi-line description well.
However, our portal screens are still using the classic regular grid, which compresses all the information into a single blob.

Making it very difficult for portal users to read and understand the content in the description.
(Screenhots attached)

Better Multi-line Support on Portal Grids
Solution:
Yes, we would need to swap the grid used on the portal screen.

This could have some risks for mobile and the way the screen looks on mobile, strongly recommend:

1.) Swap the regular grid for an editable grid (ready only)
2.) Test on mobile
3.) Depending on the appearance both grids can be used to based on the medium the portal is opened in.

Title: App Routine Improvement - Ability to change/remove owner of app routine
Description: The customer would like to know if it is possible to change or remove a user from ownership of an app routine. There is more than one admin on the account and certain failed app routines notifications only go to the owner of the app routine. The customer would like to be notified of a failure of a certain routine but they are not the owner.
Solution: Cannot be customized.

Title: Migration - Sales Rep and Assign to
Description:
This is a request to enhance the remapping experience for QBDT to QBO

User was using the sales rep field in QBDT+Method, alongside the setups for restrict access to share-all record. 

Once the migration process is completed, each sales reps is unable to see their contacts since the Assign to Field is empty. 

Once  the Assign to field was updated via customization, the Estimate/Invoice Assign-to do not auto-populate based on the Customer assign to. 

What is the expectations to fully customize this workflow so all contacts and transactions are correctly assigned historically and moving forward?

Can this process be built into our current Remapping services.
Solution:
This process will take quite a few hours, the Remapping tool.
Remaps data, while preserving customization, that means all customization on transactions screens or permissions will need to be updated.

This requires changes to just about every screen that is not stock that has to be a manual lift in addition to any bulk updates to support the new data model.

Title: Discount field on Print templates
Description:
The Discount field in QBO is an optional field that can be toggled on and off. 

In Method, the discount field is always visible on the print templates. 

the User would like to hide this discount field to ensure their customers dont get mix messages about the possibility of a discount. 

In addition, can the appearance of the Discount field be controlled by the Discount preference from QBooks?
Solution:
Discounts, are toggled on and off on templates based on a Formatting rule. 
If the discount is empty or equal to 0.00 it should be hidden from print templates.

If a discount is added, it should show.

Title: Estimates App - App Ribbon Screens Improvement - Add Views so customers can create advanced search
Description:
Customer uses estimates heavily.
When they open up a contact, they want to see all the pending estimates for that specific contact.

Today the view filter is missing.
In addition to that the basic search is the only option available. 

This means that both Advanced Search & Custom Grid Views are not available for us.
Solution:
This can certainly be customized:

1.) Customize the App Ribbon screen
2.) Show Views, Enable Advanced Search
3.) Create a custom view.

Title: Email Campaign Improvement - Ability to Edit the first line of the email which is shown on inbox email previews
Description:
When you receive an email your inbox shows 4 key pieces of information:

1.) Date
2.) Who the email was from
3.) The subject of that email
4.) A brief preview of the email content

The customer is interested in modifying #4, as this is the first thing customers will see when scanning their inbox. Furthermore, other email solutions enable the ability to control and change this.
Solution:
I am not 100% sure; however, I believe this can be customized. 

In theory, we could create a custom field called 'Preview'.
On the email template, merge this as the first line on the email template.

This way it's the first content the inbox picks up and previews to users.
This will need to be tested but seems possible.

Title: Field Crew - Provide a list of available items that a technician should update quantities / time when delivering
Description:
User is in the beverage and coffee business and has fields crews that deliver consumables on a regular basis. 

The Work order generally starts with a list of items that the customer likes to buy, all with a quantity of 0. 

Instead of going into each item to make the change on quantity, the customer is wondering if we can use an editable grid to make changes on one screen, saving their drivers valuable time on each delivery.
Solution:
Certainly possible. 

1.) Prefilling the work order with the list of available items
2.) Then adding the editable grid to the screen for use.
3.) Optionally, it may be worth to have a flag on the item to say that this item should appear on work orders, so as they add / remove items they no longer are listed on work order creation.

That said, there could be a long list of items that needs to be curated

Title: Method Support Access to All Tenants by default
Description: Method Support Access to All Tenants by default
Solution: Enabling Method Support on the parent tenant should provide Method Support with access to all child accounts.

Title: Portal Improvement - Ability to Register - Ability to Create an account Through the Customer Portal
Description:
The customer would like to know if it is possible to allow self sign up through the portal.

Use case: Our business primarily functions on annual memberships. Currently we have a 3rd party that provides a way for people to create their account and get charged at the time of signup based on a selection of which type of product/membership they are signing up for. This then adds the customer to the DB in this third party which makes the sync with Quickbooks not great.
Solution:
The workflow is a little unclear; however, we can customize a solution:

1.) Users can design a web to lead form
2.) Based on this web to lead form, we will determine if the user is existing or not
3.) If the user exists then we should be able to redirect to the portal and have the customer renew that way.

The ideal workflow is Web to Lead, into Portal. 
This is how we could customize a solution.

Title: Improve the handling reserved words
Description:
There is a list of reserved words in our backend which cannot be used in custom field names. Most recently we came across an issue on account OceanMarine after adding a custom field named 'OMCurrency' to the Items table which caused table corruption and made the new field unusable.

This is a difficult concept to understand for customizers that are unfamiliar with our technology stack and related rules. We can do a better job handling reserved words when adding/using custom fields. For example, we can prevent users from adding fields that contain reserved words.

Additionally, we can provide easy to understand messaging to help educate the user such as: 'The word .... is reserved and cannot be used. Please enter a different field name.'
Solution: N/A

Title: User Management Improvement - Creating and Managing User Roles
Description: In Classic we have Roles that can be assigned to a user. We lack that in New. With the roles available in Classic we can associate a user to different tabs and tablinks - this makes it easy to set up the role and add the user to it, compared to how it is in New right now.
Solution:
While technically we could customize a solution around roles, unless absolutely required. 

It's best we wait for the development team to enable us to use and apply roles.

Title: Integration Improvement - Sync with LocationSite in SalesReceiptLine Table
Description:
Quickbooks Desktop
Customer utilizes the Advanced Inventory in Quickbooks which relies on the Location Site on the InvoiceLine table to correctly map to the correct location. This same location site field is not available on Method's Sales Receipts although it is available in Quickbooks. 

Reason we want this: We're using an API call to retrieve orders from an E-Commerce Site - Miva Merchant and recording down the order as a Sales Receipt instead of an Invoice (as it would take longer to implement the Payment Records). If we're able to run the routine everyday and take the orders and map them to the correct location on the SalesReceiptLine table, it would help their Inventory Management.
Solution: This is now available in stock!

Title: Assign a Labor Rate per User / Work Order Labor Rate - Assigned To Rate
Description:
User is a dog walking business and has tiered services based on the actual field crew who is performing the service. 

Can we customize the ability to change the line item rate based on the assign to?

Additional, they would like the ability to edit these rates as crew members gain more experience.
Solution:
This is a very simple customization and possible. 

1.) Create a new field on the user table called default service rate
2.) Then depending on the item that is selected on the work order and the combination of the item + user will then pull the default labour rate for that individual

More complex solutions are also possible where multiple rates might need to be captured by assigned to. In that case, we may want to build a lookup table where an item and a custom rate are linked together based on the assigned to. Essentially, creating a custom labor rate for a number of items for all users.

Title: Possibility to change the width of the column (Report Designer)
Description:
The customer mentioned that  'When I extend the column's width manually by dragging, or increase the width size using a number, the width then extends past the column that is adjacent to it. This disrupts the adjacent column's width, which I don't want to do. I have to adjust many of these column's widths, so I need to know how this can be prevented'

How can I increase the width of the column without consequently reducing the width of the column that is to the right of it.

Please find the image attached.
Solution:
If you're using a table, this will always be the case.

Expanding the width in one cell will shorten the neighbouring cell.
This is is the nature of the table object in the Report Designer.

As a customizer, this is something you must adjust and test accordingly.

Title: Ability to obscure credit card numbers when used in text input fields - ex. Notes
Description:
The customer expressed that when storing credit card numbers in the Notes section of customer details for security purposes, QuickBooks hide the numbers. It would be advantageous to have a similar functionality in Method.

Please find the screenshots attached.
Solution:
At this time this cannot be customized; however in some areas this functionality does flow over from QuickBooks. 

For example, if you enter a credit card number into the memo of a sales receipt for QBO, QBO will detect the CC Number, and obsure it. 

That said, today with Method, we do not have the ability to obscure content that is inputed into a text input field.

Title: Gmail Sidebar Improvement - Ability to add multiple contacts from the Gmail Sidebar
Description:
User would like the ability to add multiple points of contacts from the Gmail sidebar. 

These contacts are often CC'd on an incoming email. 

At the moment, the options are to hit the edit button and add the additional contact from the view contact screen. 

Or use the search function and add a new related (this option is difficult for the user to find).

It would be ideal if the user can add multiple contacts directly during the initial creation process.
Solution: Cannot be customized.

Title: Integration - API for Failed Payment Authorize.net
Description:
User (Promoeqp) is a subscription service and has recurring payments setup and running in Auth.net. 

All payments from Auth.net go automatically to QBooks under the correct customer profile. 

The issue is, when a payment fails, there isnt any tracking from Auth to QBooks and Auth is not a communication tool where automatic payment update emails are available. 

They were wondering if there is a way to integrate all failed payments from Auth to Method where Method takes on the automatic communications workflows.
Solution:
I don't think this is a type of work we should take on unless the customer is going to work on moving their recurring payments to Method. 

In theory, if recurring payments are handled via Method then this workflow is certainly possible. 

If the customer is looking to use Method as a CRM, then a failed payment could be surfaced as an activity where the assigned to user could follow-up or automation could take over.  However, from an Auth.net API standpoint this workflow is already available via shuttle and Method.

Remember that Method today, connects to Authorize.net via shuttle. Where we then collect information about payments in realtime for both successfully processed and failed.

Title: Display the link between Sales orders to Invoices
Description:
User is QBDT and prefers Sales orders over estimates. 

They would like to be able to track which Sales Order an invoice was created from. 

Additionally, they would like the Sales Order App to also track and show which invoice is linked with a specific Sales order.
Solution:
This relationship exists in QuickBooks; however, it is not surfaced in Method or visible in Method. 

If the customer is converting sales orders to invoices in Method, we can simply create a dropdown as a reference to the originating Sales Order. 

It's important to remember that a single sales order, could be converted into multiple invoices. Therefore, the relationship will generally live at the line level.  So the ideal solution would need to be reviewed with the client based on their needs.

Title: API Integration -  CleanSmarts
Description: user is wondering if we can create a API integration for Cleansmart with a focus on pulling over invoicing.
Solution:
Reminder that API Integrations, take a considerable amount of work and testing.

Not all workflows are supported and it's best to scope with a consultant prior project commencement. 

From the API it seems like Cleansheets is a work order application, so there would need to be a number of endpoints called and translated in order to adjust the workflow. It seems possible; however, there is no invoice end point in CleanSheets, so there would likely need to be some collection of information to aggregate the content from cleansheets then translate that into an invoice.

Title: Increasing character limits on item description
Description:
User has many items with lengthy item descriptions which often go over the 255-character limit on the Lineitem Grid. 

Can the 255-character limit by increased?
Solution:
The character limits on item descriptions are set by the QuickBooks version. 

This can be replaced with a custom field with a much higher limit if needed. 

That said, if this is for work orders, we should consider submitting a bug, as the limit should match transactions.

Title: Email Campaigns - Increase Email Body Character Limit
Description: The character limit is currently at 32,000. This is both on email campaigns and for the Send Email (Activities) app. Customer is requesting to be able to send a larger email.
Solution:
Ideally, this should be a platform change.

Alternatively, a new custom field could be created and used for email campaigns. I believe the field limit is 100,000 but certainly something the team can work around with customization

Title: Proposal App Enhancement - Ability to create post dated recurring invoices
Description:
User is in the oil gas industry and would like to have better forecasting reports. 

Once their proposals are signed, the invoice is essentially secured. 

They would like the ability for all recurring invoices to be created the moment a proposal is signed but posted dated based on the billing details of the proposal. 

This would add an element of forecasting to the stock invoice reports.
Solution:
This could be customized; where the invoices are created and set wait for sync approval. 

Ideally, the customer would need to set what the range would be. 
Look forward 6 months. 

At a high level:

1.) Create a custom table 
2.) Run through all the proposals that haven't expired in that month
3.) Create a record with Date and Value
4.) Then insert it into the table and design a chart on it. 

From here; you can also model, and calculate the number of new proposals 'expected' and the number of old proposals 'expiring'

Another potential workflow could be to create a custom table.

Title: Show Purchase orders with linked PO Items in app ribbons under customers
Description: For now, Purchase Orders show up under app ribbons only for Vendors. User is looking to have ability to show PO  in app ribbons under customers
Solution:
A custom app can be created based on PO line items. 

The app would then use the customer dropdown on the PO Line item table to show and summarize the results or the linked transactions. 

On click the user could be brought to the full PO.

Title: Action Improvement - The ability to generate a random number
Description:
User is wondering if we have the ability to generate a random yet unique number.

They would like to be able to generate a unique code for each contact.
Solution:
At this time an there is no action; however, this could be created through a combination of RecordID and the Created Date of the customer.

In theory, you could just create a random number by putting other numbers together:

ex.

RecordID + Date of Created + 12345678

While not ideal, there are ways to create numbers / generate numbers/ that will be unique for each customer.

Title: Ability to create automated activities for Work Orders
Description: The customer needs a solution that can automatically identify customers who have not placed orders in the last 3 months, create activities for them, and notify the team.
Solution:
Very simple to customize.

1.) Create an app routine
2.) Go through the list of customers, and determine the last time they purchased a service (Work Order)
3.) If the last time was > 3 months ago, then create an activity to proactively reach out.

Title: Calendar Widget Improvement - Add Additional Information to the Resource Caption (eg. Location)
Description:
The customer is looking to add the locations on the field crew calendar, they mentioned that  I believe what I'm looking for would have to be built in to the calendar. Just a way to see where my techs are going to be at when glancing at the calendar, instead of having to Click the customer which opens up a new page, which I've learned....ends up taking up a lot of time and leads me to getting lost sometimes haha. What kind of cost are we looking at for something like adding the box you were talking about to the calendar?

Please take a look at the picture attached.
Solution:
Reviewing the screenshot, this exact workflow cannot be customized.

It might be best, to pre-fix the user name with the location as an option.
Eg. Houston - Robert

As a quick solution. 
All other customization would have to happen within the individual event tile.

Title: App Routines - Ability to deactivate and change/remove schedules for stock app routines
Description: Sometimes users don't want app routines to run anymore. For example, the Proposals app routines run everyday even when there are 0 proposals on an account - this results in an app routine failure. There's no way to turn off this schedule or deactivate stock apps app routines.

Title: HTML Editor Improvement - The ability to overlay text or use a background image
Description:
The customer would like to take advantage of merging fields onto an email template.
However, their emails are very design heavy and generally want a pixel perfect email.

The user is having to manually import the image for every email.

Instead of using a background image, with text overlaid on top - that can be merged using Method data.
Solution:
Images at this time, take up a full block and text cannot be overlaid.

This is a great feature request; however, there is no easy workaround outside of designing the email completely in html.

There may be some tools online, that can convert and image into HTML but again it's just email design.

Title: API Integration - GotPhoto
Description:
Customer is a volume photographer, who works with Parents, schools etc. to take photos. 

Currently they host all the photos on a platform called GotPhoto. 
They would like to have invoices and payments available via Method but enable parents to continue using the Got Photo Platform for Photo delivery. 

Is there a way we can connect both systems?
Solution:
A brief look at the Got Photo API: https://developer.gotphoto.com/ 
Seems to allow for some key functions like creating customers and checking on order history.

It is strongly recommended, that their API is reviewed by a consultant alongside the client to make sure we understand how we want to systems to interact and determine the ideal workflow for the end user.

Title: The ability to prevent users from making changes to the SKU, item, description, and discount columns
Description:
Customer is looking to lock the SKU, item, description and the discount columns for all the user exece the Admin(Moises).
(Screenshot attached)

Please provide an estimated timeline for implementing this.
Solution:
This is possible, we would create 2 versions of the grid:

One for Admins, where fields could be changed.
One for Users, with limited editing abilities. 

The quote is per screen.

Title: API Integration - Cin7 - Inventory Management
Description: Customer is looking for an integration between Method + Cin7.
Solution:
API Integrations, are a considerable amount of work.

A quick review of cin7 and their API, it does appear we can support some workflows. 
https://api.cin7.com/api

For example, we can have sales orders move from Method through Cin7. 
I would encourage exploring direct QuickBooks integrations or zapier first to see if a workflow can be accommodated. 

That said, some workflows, should be capable.

Title: Transaction Improvement - Remove Item's that have 'I sell this service to my customer' = False
Description: Can Items that has an unchecked 'I sell this service to my customers' be excluded from line items of all sales transactions?
Solution: Should be an easy customization; however, this should be stock.

Title: QBDT Desktop Improvement - Support for Multi-currency, Multicurrency
Description:
Customer uses multi-currency on QuickBooks Desktop.
Is interested in having this integrated into their key workflows.
Solution:
Most if not all of the work is pretty simple; Multi-currency only has an direct impact on the customer or lead creation. 

Once a currency is assigned to the customer, all transactions that follow that customer will match that currency.  In most scenarios, we likely just need to surface the currency field on the screens for visual purposes.

Furthermore, depending on the workflows, some of these fields may need to be merged into Email Templates or Print Templates. 

Lastly, Payments and Payment processing should already consider the entity currency when processing payments.

Title: Portal Improvement - Support for Calendar Object
Description: We tried doing this but on the portal the resource dropdown is empty so the portal user is unable to select a resource and view the activity on the calendar.
Solution: Cannot be customized at this time as the object requires a Method User to be signed in for it to work.

Title: Proposal App enhancement - Ability to create Task based invoicing for the When Completed Billing type
Description:
User is a media company and has 2 types of project billing. 

They would like to utilize the when completed billing type to create a task based invoicing workflow. 

they would like the ability to mark a task or group of task completed and generate an invoice from the services rendered.
Solution:
Certainly possible; depending on the nature of the tasks, when a proposal is marked as completed.

A series of activities can be created to follow the proposal.

Title: API Integration - Mar-Kov ERP Software that gives you full control, from raw ingredients to shipped products.
Description:
Customer is requesting assistance integrating Method with Mar-Kov

https://mar-kov.com/
Solution:
API Integrations are always robust and require a tremendous amount of work.

At a quick review, I do not see an API endpoint where we can tap into the back end.
They do offer a direct integration with QuickBooks which may solve most of their needs. 

If information is flowing into QuickBooks, Method can consume and leverage that information on portals etc.

Title: Permission Improvement - Ability to hide a specifc activities based on type for certain users
Description:
User has a leadership team that will often assist with account management. 

They would like to create a workflow where certain types of activities are restricted from user access. 

Is this possible?
Solution:
Super simple customization.

We should be able to create filters or grids that are admin specific or view filters that filter out demos.

Title: Portal Improvement - Update the header of the company portal to include Address  and Phone
Description:
The user is looking for a way to add company details to their customer portal.
Currently when a user is directly brought to a transaction the company details like phone number are not visible.
Solution:
We would need to customize the screens on the portal to reflect the information needed. 

At this time the header is inaccessible via customization.

Title: Sales Order - Opportunity Improvement - Automated Reminders to Customers
Description:
There are a number of customers who order on a recurring basis every week.
Each order needs to be manually submitted as inventory levels and needs vary.

I would love a process to automatically remind a group of customers, to submit their order on a weekly cadence.
Solution:
This can be customized.

Ideally, we would send them to the portal to follow the re-order flow.
The customer would need an email template and provide the business rules on when to email. 

For example, is it 7 days from the last order?
Every Tuesday?
Etc.

Title: API Integration -  Home Depot Pro Xtra
Description:
Customer currently uses Buildertrend, they offer a direct integration with Home Depot:

By connecting your accounts, 25 months of purchase history and product favorite lists are available to be imported directly into your cost catalog. Plus, you’ll never have to worry about losing another paper receipt from The Home Depot. This integration captures digital receipts of each transaction a builder makes. You can even send products to your cart and check out – all from the Buildertrend platform.
Solution:
At this time I do not see an open API.
It does appear that home depot has partnered specifically with Builder Trend for this functionality; however, more research may be required.

Title: Payment Widget - Allow user to store ACH details similar to what Pre-Auth does with Credit Card details
Description:
Request - Allow Method user to store the ACH details of their customer similar to how are use Pre-Authorization for storing credit card details. The user has the expectation that it should be possible because we do allow the customers to save payment details on widget irrespective of whether it is Credit Card or ACH.   

Use Case - We have an app routine scheduled that processes payments automatically for customers with saved payment details. We allow the customer to add/update payment details on the portal through the Pre-Authorization action of the payment widget. The user can do the same in Method internal screen. However, it only works with credit card and we want to be able to do it for ACH as well.

Title: Calendar Improvement - Monthly view of the calendar for each user (side-by-side)
Description: The customer requested our calendar to work exactly like google calendar. The idea for them is to have a monthly view of their users on calendar (side by side) in Method. I asked them to duplicate tabs so they can see each user on a monthly view but they did not like the idea. (SC below)

Title: Email Gadget Improvement - Ability to Create a Quote from Gmail/Outlook
Description:
User has a high volume of RFQs that land in their inbox and would like to build an automated process to create RFQs and turn them into POs. 

Although the cases app and Web to lead are viable options, can the Inbox Gadgets be used to create RFQ directly from the inbox.
Solution:
At this time there is no way to automate quote generation from an email.
Emails can come in a variety of formats.

Title: Invite User Improvement - Control Over User Invitations in Method CRM
Description: This customer would like the option to invite employees to Method CRM without triggering notifications immediately. They want to decide when each employee becomes an active user in the CRM.
Solution:
At this time this cannot be customized.
But this is a great request, especially for users that are slowly being onboarded.

Title: Gmail Sidebar Enhancement - Automatic adding of Attachments
Description:
User is in custom blinds and windows and exchange tons of pictures during a project cycle. 

They would like the ability to have pictures sent and received to be automatically attached while using the Gmail sidebar

Currently all attachments need to be manually added to each activity submissions
Solution: Cannot be customized; but a great improvement.

Title: Ability to Sync When QuickBooks is closed
Description:
The customer would like to be able to use the fourth option when using the sync engine that would allow access to their QB file even when its not running. The reason they would like this option is because their QB file is on a server and they don't always have access to it. Explained that currently QB needs to open in order for the sync to run. 

Screenshot attached of what option I am speaking about.
Solution: At this time, this cannot be customized.

Title: Invoice Improvement - Payment Adjustment for Prepay vs Monthly
Description:
User runs a music school and would like to automate the process where a discount is applied when parents chooses to prepay. 

They would like to avoid adding an additional SKU due to the number of combinations this would create.
Solution:
This should be quiet simple; however, I am going to detail out the steps.
This could require a tremendous amount of testing.

1.) Customer to issue a monthly proposal recurring for 1 year or in  perpetuity. 
2.) If the customer decides to prepay
3.) Update the line item from Recurring to On Acceptance 
4.) Update the price listed on the work order to ((Monthly * Discount)*12). 
5.) The customer will then be able to prepay for the year. 

This is likely the easier flow; however, without proposals this estimate could be larger as proposals handles all recurring needs for Monthly subscriptions.

Title: Date Widget Improvement - Selecting a Year before 2019
Description:
At the moment, the customer has customized a birthday field. 
However, they are unable to select a year that's less than 2019. 

This workflow is pretty difficult; however, the current work around is to type the year.
Solution:
This cannot be customized at this time, the widget is designed to only go back 5 years at a time. 

If you select 2019, you'd get the option for 2014 and so on. 
At this time typing the year is the best work around.

Title: User Management Improvement - Ability to merge/mass update users data
Description:
The customer is looking to merge the user's data where they should be able to mass update the user's 'Assigned To' field at once and can transfer the data assigned to one user to another.

Tools like intercom allow you to re-assign all assignments when you make a user inactive.
Solution:
Customizing a solution for this isn't complicated but it can be time consuming because of verifying data. 

At a high level, for every table that contains assigned to data, we need to establish a criteria to update, once that's established the process to customize is quite simple. 

eg. 
Only Re-assign Open Activities
Only re-assign Open Opportunities
Re-assign all Customers, who have purchased in the last year
Re-assign Pending Estimates
Re-assign all invoices in the last year 
etc.

So depending on the complexity the total time to complete this work, could be more or less.

Title: Carrying Over Empty Lineitem from Estimate to Invoice
Description:
User uses empty line items to space out their interface and utilize description box of these empty lines for adding scope of work. 

Currently,  making a copy or converting the estimate removes all lineitems with no item name/quanity/amount, can this be customized?
Solution:
This cannot be customized nor is it supported by the SDK. 

This is a QuickBooks workaround.
Method is able to adjust spacing using our customer template editor; however, the blank line method is not supported.

Title: Character function -  Ability to Generate GUID to USe
Description:
Request: Ability to generate a GUID in Method

Use Case: Some APIs such as InFlow require you to enter the GUID when creating Sales Orders.
Solution: Currently the workaround is to use the Call Web Service action and utilize https://www.uuidgenerator.net/api/guid. There's no telling if and when this website may go down and if it does, then the customization will need to be revisted. If we're able to generate the GUID in Method, we remove the reliance of another website.

Title: App Ribbon Improvement - Ability to change the order of the apps on the app ribbon
Description:
The customer is looking to replace the Estimates with Sales Order on the app ribbon as needs easy access to it.

He can try Zoom out of screen to view all the options but would want the ability to move the apps according to the need.

Screenshot attached.
Solution: Cannot be customized today.

Title: Permissions Improvement - Subscription Improvement - Ability to create a Work Order Only user
Description:
User is inviting his shop manager to the CRM. 

The shop manager will be an exclusive user of Workorders and are happy to pay for the CRMpro package to enable this. 

However, they would like the Shop manager to have zero access to anything but the Workorders. 

Today, we are able to remove permissions for all apps in the Contact Management Pack but most leave a single app in both Sales Transactions and Pipeline. 

Can we create a standalone Work Order permission set for this role?
Solution: This cannot be customized today.

Title: Contacts App Improvement - Ability to use Phone Number as a criteria for validating duplicate customer entries
Description:
User has enabled share records for her sales reps. 

They are wondering if its possible to add Phone numbers as an additional duplicate validation to Email and Name in QB.
Solution: This is certainly customizable, the challenge is that phone numbers come in a variety of formats. While adding the check is quite simple, the data format for phone numbers can vary and therefore may not result in perfect duplicate detection.

Title: Grouping Items on Portal - Enhancing the customer portal with Sub sections
Description:
User is in custom drapery designs business and organizes their estimate by bedrooms.

Title: API Integration - Graphana - Data Visualization
Description:
Grafana can be a powerful tool when integrated with a CRM system like Method CRM. Here's how it can be used in this context:

1. Data Visualization and Reporting
Custom Dashboards: Grafana allows you to create custom dashboards that visualize CRM data in real-time. This could include sales performance metrics, customer behavior analytics, lead conversion rates, and other key performance indicators (KPIs).

Time-Series Analysis: Grafana excels at time-series data, making it ideal for tracking trends over time, such as sales growth, customer engagement, or the effectiveness of marketing campaigns.

2. Monitoring and Alerts
Real-Time Monitoring: You can set up Grafana to monitor critical CRM processes, such as lead generation, customer onboarding, or support ticket resolution times. If any of these processes deviate from expected norms, Grafana can trigger alerts.
Threshold Alerts: For example, you can configure Grafana to send alerts if sales drop below a certain threshold or if there’s a sudden spike in customer churn rates, enabling proactive management.

3. Data Aggregation
Multi-Source Data Integration: Grafana can pull data from multiple sources, not just the CRM. This means you can aggregate data from your CRM along with data from your ERP, marketing tools, or customer support systems, giving you a holistic view of your business.
Unified Reporting: By combining data from various systems, you can create unified reports that provide deeper insights into customer behavior and business performance.

4. Performance Metrics and KPIs
Sales Performance: Track individual and team sales performance, quota attainment, and revenue forecasts.
Customer Satisfaction: Integrate customer feedback or Net Promoter Score (NPS) data with CRM records to monitor customer satisfaction and loyalty.
Support Metrics: Visualize support ticket resolution times, customer service interactions, and customer satisfaction ratings.

5. Trend Analysis and Forecasting
Sales Forecasting: Use historical sales data to create trend lines and forecast future sales. Grafana can help identify patterns and predict future performance based on CRM data.
Customer Retention: Analyze historical customer data to identify trends in customer retention, predict churn, and take proactive measures.

6. Collaboration and Sharing
Team Collaboration: Grafana dashboards can be shared with team members, allowing for collaborative analysis and decision-making.
Reporting to Stakeholders: Share dashboards with stakeholders to keep them informed of key metrics and performance indicators in real time.

7. Custom Reporting for Clients
Client-Facing Dashboards: If you offer managed services or custom solutions, you can create client-facing dashboards that provide them with real-time insights into their own data, as managed through your CRM.
Integrating Grafana with Method CRM (or any CRM) allows you to enhance data-driven decision-making by providing visually rich, real-time insights into your business operations.
Solution:
Graphana to my knowledge at this time cannot be integration with Method Seamlessly; although there are likely some flows that can be supported. 

With most if not all data visualization tools you generally always need to point the tool (in this case Graphana) to a data source. Ideally, this would be the CRM; however, that's not possible as direct queries to the database are not possible. 

Everything would need to happen via the API, queries would need to be massaged into our query language. The ability for graphana to do this may or may not be possible; however, in general is best to use a recommended data connection.

So in theory, we would need to migrate / transfer CRM data, to a database eg. Postgre or Google or Azure. Make sure that information in syncing or being transfered then use this as the base for expansive reporting.

At this time, I recommend all datavisualization to be done via the platform, as the customer may run up against Method API limits.

Title: API Improvement - Method Webhooks
Description:
Customer is looking to connect two systems based on Method changes.

A webhook is a method used to automatically send real-time data from one application to another when a specific event occurs. It's a way for an application to provide other applications with real-time information. Here's a breakdown of how webhooks work and their common uses:

How Webhooks Work:

Event Trigger: A specific event occurs in the application (e.g., a new customer is created, a payment is made, or a form is submitted).

Webhook Endpoint: The application has a webhook URL (endpoint) configured. This URL is where the application will send data when the event occurs.

Data Transmission: The application sends an HTTP POST request to the webhook URL, containing a payload (usually in JSON format) with the details of the event.

Action: The receiving application can then process this data and perform predefined actions based on the information received.
Solution: As of right now we have API endpoints that can be called; however, we do not have webhook capabilities that will allow other systems to listen and take action against.
