Title: QBO Improvement - Enable Single-Directional Sync: Method ➜ QuickBooks (No Historical Pull)
Description:
Title:
Enable Single-Directional Sync: Method ➜ QuickBooks (No Historical Pull)

Request Summary:
Customers need the ability to configure Method:CRM to only push new data into QuickBooks, without importing any historical records from QuickBooks into Method.

Use Case:
Some businesses—particularly those with large or legacy QuickBooks files—prefer to treat Method as their operational front-end while avoiding clutter from legacy QB data. These customers want a clean slate in Method, using it solely for forward-facing workflows, but still require a reliable push of new records (e.g., estimates, invoices, contacts) back into QuickBooks for accounting.

Requirements:

✅ Push-only configuration: Method should allow a mode where it only syncs outbound to QuickBooks.

✅ Customer & Item Pull (one-time only): The only exception is an optional first-time pull of Customers and Items to seed Method.

🚫 No historical sync: No historical transactions, payments, or activities from QuickBooks should be imported.

✅ Supported outbound syncs include: Estimates, Invoices, Payments, Contacts, Vendors, Items (created in Method), etc.

Benefits:

Reduces clutter in Method by avoiding legacy data imports.

Increases performance for larger QuickBooks files.

Gives customers full control over what enters Method.

Ideal for businesses migrating operations or testing Method in production with live QB sync.
Solution:
If the transactions are not created in Method, we would need to run a utility to check if it's created in QB.

From there update a field to make it not visible in the CRM. 

We would need update everything from App Ribbons and dropdowns. 
Lot's of work.

Not an ideal fit today.

Title: Improve Transaction Permissions - Remove the 'Send' Button from Invoices
Description:
This customer has requested to remove the 'Send' button from the Invoice screen for some sales reps.

They would like these users to be able to create invoices, but not have the ability to send them via email or SMS.
Solution:
Certainly Possible. 

This could be a good use case where we want some people to 'lookup' transactions; however, we do not want them to communicate with the customer unless they're the assigned rep for example. 

Depending on the rules, we can either build a custom permission flow, or wire it in to existing permissions on the transactions.

Title: AI Improvement - App Design or Improvement - Using Fillable PDFs as a starting point
Description:
Description:
A customer has inquired about the ability to upload and use custom fillable PDF forms within Method:CRM. Their goal is to maintain existing business workflows that rely on standardized, client-facing documents which are already formatted as interactive PDFs (e.g., contracts, inspection forms, job checklists).

Current Limitation:
Method currently lacks native support for uploading PDF files and mapping CRM data into fillable fields within those PDFs. Additionally, there is no streamlined method to allow users to complete PDF forms directly within Method or generate them dynamically with existing customer/job data.

Requested Functionality:

Ability to upload a custom PDF with interactive (fillable) fields.

Support for mapping Method fields (e.g., customer name, service date, estimate total) to PDF form fields.

Generate a completed version of the PDF with merged data from a contact, lead, opportunity, or work order.

Optionally allow users to fill in additional fields manually within the PDF from within Method before sending or saving.

Download, email, or store the completed PDF within Method’s document library or as an activity attachment.

Example Use Cases:

Field service companies sending work authorization forms to customers for e-signature.

Manufacturers pre-filling compliance forms based on customer/job info.

Contractors generating government or insurance forms from CRM data.

Impact:
This would significantly enhance Method’s value for customers with form-heavy workflows, reduce double data entry, and increase document professionalism and consistency.

Priority: Medium to High (based on customer need and competitive differentiation)
Solution: Cannot be customized at this time.

Title: Activity App Improvement - Ability to Track Phone call activity upon dialing out
Description: Customer is wondering if we can automate a time stamped activity whenever a Phone number is clicked within Method.
Solution:
Yes, this is certainly possible. 

We would need to define the content of the activity; however from a technical standpoint, this is certainly possible.

Title: Transaction Improvemet - Ability to transform items for production
Description:
Customer is currently using a workaround in QuickBooks to manage their production workflow — creating fake sales and item returns to account for raw materials (like sheet metal) being transformed into finished goods. They're asking if MethodCRM can support a more elegant process.

We would like to explore a custom workflow in Method that allows them to:

Consume raw inventory items

Generate or update finished product inventory

Avoid manual/fake entries in QuickBooks

Optionally log the transformation process for tracking/approval
Solution:
Yes, this is certainly possible. 
Where raw material goods can be combined & tracked on an order.

Once manufactured an item could be inserted into QuickBooks and used on transactions of final invoice.
On estimates etc, we can create a secondly item list screen that is visible to the customers to review; but keep the placeholder on the QuickBooks side as 'Sales' or 'In Production' to manage the account and fiscal elements of the business.

Title: Localization - Chinese Language Support
Description: The customer’s entire team is based in China and is exploring Method CRM with the goal of having the full user interface available in Chinese.
Solution:
While technically we could customized somewhere between 85-90% of the platform. 
The google translate add-in is key to success. 

In general, I probably would not recommend Method to translate 100% of internal screen with a full Chinese user interface.

Title: Action Improvement - Prepare for Accounting Options
Description: Providing options on the Prepare for Accounting Action to wait for a response, or to be able to receive a response code, would improve our ability to test and debug complex processes that are reliant on synced information.
Solution:
This feature request is critical, as sometimes we're waiting for taxes and updates from QuickBooks - when processing via the portal. 

Since the actions run async, there could be a mismatch between an invoice total in Method vs. QuickBooks. 

And we may be under collecting / over collecting on payments.

Title: Sales Order Improvement - Barcode on Sales Order Printout + Status Trigger via Scan
Description:
Customer Request Summary:
Customer would like to include a barcode on the printed Sales Order. When this barcode is scanned using their barcode reader, they want it to trigger a status change on the corresponding Sales Order within MethodCRM.

Functional Goals:

Barcode Generation

Add a unique barcode to the Sales Order printout (e.g., representing Sales Order ID or a unique URL/token).

Barcode Scan Action

When scanned, the system should recognize the Sales Order and trigger a status update (e.g., from 'Pending' to 'In Progress' or 'Fulfilled').
Solution:
Printing a barcode on a Sales Order is certainly possible. 

Upon scanning a sales order, take an action is something that is not possible. 
This would require a connection between a physical POS / Scanner and the CRM.

At the time this is not possible within our platform.
Major API support, could make this possible; however, this is not something we would take on inhouse.

Title: Signature Component Improvement - Enhanced Capabilities for eSignature Widget
Description:
I’d like to submit a feature request to expand the capabilities of the current eSignature widget in Method. While the existing tool works well for capturing basic signatures within Method workflows, we’ve encountered limitations when using it for more complex or client-facing scenarios. specifically, compliance and business working with Gov.

Specifically
Legal Compliance & Audit Trails
Full digital certificate of completion with time-stamped audit trails
Compliant with major eSignature laws (e.g., ESIGN Act, eIDAS, UETA)
Tamper-evident seals to ensure document integrity
Solution:
Some of this information is available some is not:

1.) Signature Audit Trail is available internally via our Audit Trail. 
Signatures cannot be changed once committed - we log Portal User, IP Address, Date time. 

That said, the remaining items are not available at this time.

Title: API Integration - Method and Gymmaster
Description:
Objective
Enable seamless integration between Method:CRM and GymMaster to centralize customer data, bookings, and membership visibility for fitness businesses.

Key Requirements
Two-Way Sync with GymMaster

Memberships, billing status, and customer contact details should sync between Method CRM and GymMaster.

Updates in either system should reflect in the other.

E-Transfer Support for Bookings

Enable customers to pay for classes or sessions via e-transfer through Method CRM.

Payment status should update GymMaster accordingly for access control.

Unified Customer Portal

Members should be able to log into a branded Method portal to:

View class bookings (from GymMaster)

See payment history

Manage their personal details

View membership plan and status

This creates a consolidated view, removing the need to log in to multiple platforms.

Workflow Automation

Trigger email/text confirmations when GymMaster bookings are made or updated.

Automated reminders via Method CRM for class attendance or renewals.

Business Impact
Improved Customer Experience: Members interact with a single, branded portal.

Operational Efficiency: Reduced manual entry between platforms.

Revenue Assurance: E-transfer bookings reduce friction in the payment process.

Retention & Engagement: Personalized communications and follow-ups via Method CRM.
Solution:
Large scale implementation, APIs will need to be reviewed. 
2 way sync is always a challenge.

Title: AI Chatbot Integration with Method CRM
Description:
A digital marketing agency partner has a customer interested in using Method CRM alongside an AI chatbot solution. The core functionality requested is real-time voice/chatbot integration that can pull data from Method CRM and share visit schedules with customers who call in.

Proposed Feature Functionality
Integration Point:

Enable Method CRM to integrate with an external AI chatbot (voice-enabled).

Allow API access for the AI to retrieve customer profiles and upcoming appointments.

Use Case:

When a customer calls, the AI greets them, identifies them via phone number or basic info, and:

Pulls their profile from Method CRM.

Reads out their next scheduled visit or appointment.

Portal Enhancement (Optional but Connected):

Customers should also be able to log in via the portal to view:

Their visit history.

Upcoming appointments.

Notes or tasks (if permissions allow).

Why It Matters
This integration would improve response time and customer experience for the agency’s clients.

Reduces manual workload for front-office teams.

Reinforces Method’s positioning as a flexible, integrable platform for service businesses.

Taps into a growing trend: AI-driven customer self-service.

Impact Potential
Immediate rollout potential with one interested customer.

Scalable use case across the agency’s ~50 clients.

Differentiates Method CRM in markets that value automation and proactive service.
Solution: Cannot be customized at this time.

Title: Group Items (Method Only) - Create Method Only Group items that allow for edting.
Description:
Customer would like the ability to edit sub items when using group items in Method. 
Currently this functionality is not supported with QuickBooks Group Items. 

Could we create a Method Group Item solution where items are automatically inserted and allow for modification?

Their group items often include travel, expenses and other variables so the inability to edit sub items details is a major hurdle to their workflow.
Solution:
Yes this is possible, where when an item is selected we insert all the individual sub-items automatically as individual items. 

This enables the user to edit and control how the group items are used or managed.
Furthermore, we can customize to hide these items from end-users (customers) on pdf or portal experiences.

Title: Reorder Improvement - Applying Conditions - Ability to Reorder Evaluations in Character Functions
Description:
The customer is looking to reorder the evaluations (specifically 'with this' and 'and then this').

When using Character Functions in an action script, there is currently no way to reorder the evaluations. The only available option is to delete the existing parts and re-add them in the desired order. 
This makes editing cumbersome and time-consuming, especially for complex scripts.
Solution:
This is certainly possible; that said, depending on the level of conditions that need to be applied the scope of work could be small through to large.

These rules would need to be established, we would further need to enable some settings so the user could further configure the conditions / omissions.

Title: Items Improvement - Inventory for Multi-Entity
Description:
Feature Request: Multi-Entity Inventory Visibility & Cross-Location Sales Integration

Customer Setup:
The customer currently manages 3 separate QuickBooks Online (QBO) company files, each representing a different physical location. This structure supports their need to track inventory and perform invoicing per location. However, it lacks real-time visibility and automation across entities.

Requested Capabilities:
1. Centralized Inventory View Across Multiple QBO Entities
Goal: Enable real-time visibility of inventory counts from all 3 QBO files within a single Items App inside Method.

Benefit: Simplifies stock review and purchasing decisions across locations, reducing manual reconciliation.

2. Cross-Entity or Multi-Location Sales
Goal: Allow users to create invoices and sell inventory from another entity’s location within a single workflow.

Use Case:
For example, Location A can fulfill a sale using stock from Location B without having to manually generate internal invoices.

Current Workaround:
They currently create internal invoices to adjust inventory between entities. This is a manual process and does not reflect real-time stock availability.

Requested Improvement:
Automate this inter-entity inventory transfer or enable inventory deduction from another entity directly at the point of sale.
Solution:
This is a possibility; however, it can be complex in nature. 

1.) We can certainly serve up real-time inventories for all locations on one screen.
2.) We can certainly allow and create business logic to help pull inventory from one location to another and document how many items.

That said, this can be complex as a real-time sync connection will always be required.

Title: Purchase Order Improvement -  Auto-Fill Contact Name and Company Name in the 'Ship To' Address Field
Description:
Currently, when creating a Purchase Order (PO) in Method and selecting a customer in the 'Ship To' field, only the customer’s shipping address is populated. However, in QuickBooks, when a customer is selected in the 'Ship To' field, the shipping address includes the contact name, company name, and full address, just like it does for Estimates and Invoices.

This request is to enhance the Purchase Order 'Ship To' field in Method so it mirrors QuickBooks functionality and auto-fills:
-Contact Name (if available)
-Company Name
-Full Shipping Address

Reasons for Request:
-Improves clarity for vendors: Including the contact and company name ensures vendors know exactly who the shipment is for, avoiding confusion or delivery errors.

-Reduces manual work: Users currently need to manually copy and paste or type in the contact and company details, which is time-consuming and error-prone.

-Ensures accurate shipping details: Prevents incomplete or ambiguous shipping information from being sent out on official Purchase Orders.

-Aligns with QuickBooks behavior: QuickBooks already includes contact and company names on POs shipping address. Users expect the same seamless experience in Method.

-Improves professionalism: Including full recipient details makes POs look more polished and professional when sent to vendors.

-Supports real-world use cases: Many businesses have multiple contacts under a single customer profile. Including the contact name helps vendors know which team member to liaise with for the order.
Solution: This can be customized!

Title: QuickBooks Online - Make Class field available on Items in Method
Description:
In QBO, there is Class field on Item level.
If an Invoice is created in QBO, the lineitem shows Class and syncs with Method.

The Class field is not available in the Method on the Item table. 
So when an Invoice is created, the class field doesn't fetch the value on the line item.
However, if we select the value manually, it gets synced with QBO.

Expected Result: Method should have the Class field on the item level.
Solution:
A custom class field can be updated for this purchase.

However, it's best to sync with QuickBooks.

Title: AI-Enhanced Capture Tools for Gmail/Outlook Gadget
Description:
A customer inquired about the potential for incorporating AI-driven capture tools within the Gmail/Outlook gadget.

The goal would be to leverage AI to minimize common friction points users experience with the sidebar, such as:

Locating and searching for contacts

Tracking emails efficiently

Creating and scheduling follow-ups seamlessly

By automating or streamlining these repetitive actions, AI could improve adoption of the gadget, reduce manual effort, and enhance overall user productivity.
Solution: Cannot be customized.

Title: Integration with RingCentral
Description:
Integration with RingCentral using Zapier

Help Center:
1) https://help.method.me/en/articles/3948236-zapier-add-method-activities-for-ringcentral-phone-calls

2) https://help.method.me/en/articles/4342992-zapier-add-method-activities-for-new-ringcentral-sms-text-messages
Solution:
Zapier is able to connect systems together.

That said, we should keep in mind there are limitations.
Ringcentral's api is not necessarily the most friendly.

Title: Migration - Monday.com Data Migration to Method
Description:
Data to import:
Leads
Customers
Activities
Opportunities

Field mapping (high-level):

Company in Monday → Customer in Method
Leads in Monday → Leads in Method
Projects in Monday → Opportunities in Method
Please confirm the best object/structure on the Method side (e.g., Opportunities, Jobs, or custom table).
Solution:
Migrations can be quite large / difficult depending on the volume and quality of data.

Each migration should be personally reviewed by a consultant.

Title: QBO Sync Improvement  - Ability to Sync with QBO's OnOrder column
Description:
User is wondering if we can customize and sync with the on orders columns that is available now in QBO. 

Is this possible? 

If not, would it be viable so summarize the PO app to accomplish this without the sync?
Solution: Cannot be customized today; however, this is available when Inventory and PO Tracking is turned on in QBO.

Title: Migration - Notion to Method
Description:
Enable customers currently managing CRM, projects, and ops workflows in Notion to transition their workspaces into Method with a guided migration tool.

This includes mapping Notion databases (tables) and key properties into Method tables (Leads, Contacts, Opportunities, Activities, Workflows, and Custom Tables), with minimal manual cleanup.

Customer Problem
Many small–mid sized teams start in Notion because it’s flexible and fast to set up. Over time they outgrow it for:

Proper CRM capabilities (pipelines, automations, reminders, reporting)

Stronger integrations with accounting (QuickBooks / Xero)

Permissions, auditability, and structured data
Solution:
Map Notion databases to Method objects

Example mappings:
Notion Database: “Leads” → Method: Leads
Notion Database: “Companies / Accounts” → Method: Customers
Notion Database: “Pipeline / Deals” → Method: Opportunities
Notion Database: “Tasks” → Method: Activities / To-dos
Notion Database: “Projects” → Method: Opportunities / Custom 

Projects App
Map Notion properties to Method fields
Text → Text / Notes fields
Email → Email fields
Phone → Phone fields
Select / Multi-select → Dropdown / Multi-tag fields
Person → Method User / Assigned To
Status / Stage → Opportunity Stage / Activity Status
Date / Date-time → Corresponding date fields in Method

Title: Opportunity App Improvement - Enhanced Opportunity Stage Management
Description:
Opportunity stages is the main call to action of the Opportunities app. 

Proper usage of the opportunity app almost calls for some sort of changes to the opportunity stage. (always a good sign on a demo)

Today, Users cannot easily edit, reorder, or remove stages, leading to inconsistencies across the Edit Opportunity screen, dropdowns, and reports.

Can we:

Provide a more fluid process for editing, adding, and removing stages

Enable reordering of stages.

Ensure changes sync across all screens and reports.
Solution:
Flows here can be defined and customized; however, that said, Ideally this would be something we setup as templates. 

Where if a certain product / service is sold a pre-determined set of stages would be set.
This isn't fluid like you would see in a Kanban board - however, we should explore how stages can be configured & improved.

Title: High Line-Item Invoicing
Description:
Problem:
Transportation customer regularly generates invoices with 100+ line items. QuickBooks struggles with performance and batch processing at this volume.

Requested Capability:

Support 100+ line items in Method editable grids (performance-safe).

Ability to import large volumes of line items (CSV / automated).

Sync a summarized invoice to QuickBooks (single line item + subtotal), while retaining full line-item detail in Method.
